```text
     1→import type { CommentAnchor, RichEditorVariant } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import {
     3→  MentionPlatformProvider,
     4→  ShiroRenderer,
     5→} from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
     6→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
     7→import { useCallback, useMemo, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     8→
     9→import { BlockCommentGutter } from '../components/comments/BlockCommentGutter'
    10→import { CommentHighlighter } from '../components/comments/CommentHighlightPlugin'
    11→import { CommentSidebar } from '../components/comments/CommentSidebar'
    12→import { SelectionCommentPopup } from '../components/comments/SelectionCommentPopup'
    13→import { useTheme } from '../context/ThemeContext'
    14→import { initialContent } from '../fixtures/initial-content'
    15→
    16→export interface Comment {
    17→  id: string
    18→  text: string
    19→  anchor: CommentAnchor
    20→  createdAt: number
    21→}
    22→
    23→export interface BlockInfo {
    24→  index: number
    25→  blockId: string
    26→  type: string
    27→  textContent: string
    28→  fingerprint: string
    29→}
    30→
    31→function extractTextContent(node: any): string {
    32→  if (node.text) return node.text as string
    33→  if (node.children) {
    34→    return (node.children as any[]).map(extractTextContent).join('')
    35→  }
    36→  return ''
    37→}
    38→
    39→function computeFingerprint(text: string): string {
    40→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    41→  let hash = 5381
    42→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    43→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    44→  }
    45→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    46→}
    47→
    48→export function extractBlockInfos(state: SerializedEditorState): BlockInfo[] {
    49→  return (state.root.children as any[]).map((child, index) => {
    50→    const textContent = extractTextContent(child)
    51→    return {
    52→      index,
    53→      blockId: (child as any).__state?.blockId || `block-${index}`,
    54→      type: child.type,
    55→      textContent,
    56→      fingerprint: computeFingerprint(textContent),
    57→    }
    58→  })
    59→}
    60→
    61→export function CommentsPage() {
    62→  const theme = useTheme()
    63→  const [variant, setVariant] = useState<RichEditorVariant>('article')
    64→  const [comments, setComments] = useState<Comment[]>([])
    65→  const [activeCommentId, setActiveCommentId] = useState<string | null>(null)
    66→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    67→
    68→  const blockInfos = useMemo(
    69→    () => extractBlockInfos(initialContent),
    70→    [],
    71→  )
    72→
    73→  const handleAddComment = useCallback(
    74→    (text: string, anchor: CommentAnchor) => {
    75→      const comment: Comment = {
    76→        id: crypto.randomUUID(),
    77→        text,
    78→        anchor,
    79→        createdAt: Date.now(),
    80→      }
    81→      setComments((prev) => [...prev, comment])
    82→    },
    83→    [],
    84→  )
    85→
    86→  const handleDeleteComment = useCallback((id: string) => {
    87→    setComments((prev) => prev.filter((c) => c.id !== id))
    88→    setActiveCommentId((prev) => (prev === id ? null : prev))
    89→  }, [])
    90→
    91→  return (
    92→    <MentionPlatformProvider platforms={{}}>
    93→      <div className="page">
    94→        <div className="toolbar">
    95→          <div className="toolbar-group">
    96→            <span className="toolbar-label">Variant</span>
    97→            <button
    98→              className={variant === 'article' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
    99→              onClick={() => setVariant('article')}
   100→            >
   101→              Article
   102→            </button>
   103→            <button
   104→              className={variant === 'comment' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   105→              onClick={() => setVariant('comment')}
   106→            >
   107→              Comment
   108→            </button>
   109→            <button
   110→              className={variant === 'note' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   111→              onClick={() => setVariant('note')}
   112→            >
   113→              Note
   114→            </button>
   115→          </div>
   116→          <div className="toolbar-group">
   117→            <span className="toolbar-label">Info</span>
   118→            <span className="badge">{comments.length} comments</span>
   119→          </div>
   120→        </div>
   121→
   122→        <div className="comments-layout">
   123→          <div className="comments-editor" ref={containerRef}>
   124→            <ShiroRenderer
   125→              value={initialContent}
   126→              variant={variant}
   127→              theme={theme}
   128→            />
   129→            <SelectionCommentPopup
   130→              containerRef={containerRef}
   131→              blockInfos={blockInfos}
   132→              onAdd={handleAddComment}
   133→            />
   134→            <BlockCommentGutter
   135→              containerRef={containerRef}
   136→              blockInfos={blockInfos}
   137→              comments={comments}
   138→              onAdd={handleAddComment}
   139→            />
   140→            <CommentHighlighter
   141→              containerRef={containerRef}
   142→              blockInfos={blockInfos}
   143→              comments={comments}
   144→              activeId={activeCommentId}
   145→            />
   146→          </div>
   147→
   148→          <div className="comments-sidebar">
   149→            <div className="panel">
   150→              <div className="panel-header">
   151→                <div className="panel-header-left">
   152→                  <h3 className="panel-title">Comments</h3>
   153→                  {comments.length > 0 && (
   154→                    <span className="badge">{comments.length}</span>
   155→                  )}
   156→                </div>
   157→              </div>
   158→              <div className="panel-body">
   159→                <CommentSidebar
   160→                  comments={comments}
   161→                  activeId={activeCommentId}
   162→                  onHover={setActiveCommentId}
   163→                  onDelete={handleDeleteComment}
   164→                />
   165→              </div>
   166→            </div>
   167→          </div>
   168→        </div>
   169→      </div>
   170→    </MentionPlatformProvider>
   171→  )
   172→}

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 14:09:41Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants two changes:

1. **Block hover comment button**: Instead of the current gutter approach (positioned at `right: -40px` outside the editor), when the mouse hovers over a block in the content area, a comment button should appear on the right side of that block. This is more like a hover-triggered inline button rather than a separate gutter column.

2. **Underline decoration for range comments**: After adding a range (text selection) comment, the highlighted text should have an underline decoration (not just background highlight).

Let me implement both:

### 1. Block hover comment button
The current BlockCommentGutter positions buttons in a separate absolute-positioned gutter at `right: -40px`. 

I need to shift away from the gutter model entirely. Instead, I'll track which block the mouse is hovering over and position a floating button at the right edge of that specific block. The button will appear inline with the content when you hover anywhere on the block itself, rather than requiring you to hover over a separate gutter strip.

### 2. Underline for range comments
I'm using the CSS Custom Highlight API to add styling to the highlighted text ranges, and I'll add an underline decoration alongside the background highlight.

Now I need to update the component to track mouse position within the content area and show the button at the right edge of the hovered block, plus modify the highlight styles to include the underline effect.
</details></think>

两个改动：1) block hover 时在 block 右侧显示评论按钮；2) range 评论加下划线装饰。

**1. 重写 BlockCommentGutter —— 监听内容区 mousemove，在 hovered block 右侧显示按钮：**

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 14:10:02Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```tsx
import type { BlockAnchor, CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { MessageSquare, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
import type { RefObject } from 'react'
import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'

import type { BlockInfo, Comment } from '../../pages/CommentsPage'

interface BlockCommentGutterProps {
  containerRef: RefObject<HTMLDivElement | null>
  blockInfos: BlockInfo[]
  comments: Comment[]
  onAdd: (text: string, anchor: CommentAnchor) => void
}

function getContentElement(container: HTMLDivElement): Element | null {
  return container.querySelector('.rich-content')
}

function findBlockAtPoint(
  contentEl: Element,
  y: number,
): { index: number; rect: DOMRect } | null {
  const children = contentEl.children
  for (let i = 0; i < children.length; i++) {
    const rect = children[i].getBoundingClientRect()
    if (y >= rect.top && y <= rect.bottom) {
      return { index: i, rect }
    }
  }
  return null
}

export function BlockCommentGutter({
  containerRef,
  blockInfos,
  comments,
  onAdd,
}: BlockCommentGutterProps) {
  const [hoveredBlock, setHoveredBlock] = useState<{
    index: number
    top: number
    right: number
  } | null>(null)
  const [inputForIdx, setInputForIdx] = useState<number | null>(null)
  const [inputText, setInputText] = useState('')
  const inputRef = useRef<HTMLInputElement>(null)
  const btnRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)

  useEffect(() => {
    const container = containerRef.current
    if (!container) return

    function onMouseMove(e: MouseEvent) {
      if (inputForIdx != null) return

      const contentEl = getContentElement(container!)
      if (!contentEl) return

      const hit = findBlockAtPoint(contentEl, e.clientY)
      if (!hit) {
        setHoveredBlock(null)
        return
      }

      const containerRect = container!.getBoundingClientRect()
      setHoveredBlock({
        index: hit.index,
        top: hit.rect.top - containerRect.top,
        right: containerRect.right - hit.rect.right,
      })
    }

    function onMouseLeave(e: MouseEvent) {
      if (inputForIdx != null) return
      const related = e.relatedTarget as Node | null
      if (related && btnRef.current?.contains(related)) return
      setHoveredBlock(null)
    }

    container.addEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove)
    container.addEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave)
    return () => {
      container.removeEventListener('mousemove', onMouseMove)
      container.removeEventListener('mouseleave', onMouseLeave)
    }
  }, [containerRef, inputForIdx])

  const commentCounts = useCallback(
    (blockId: string) =>
      comments.filter((c) => c.anchor.blockId === blockId).length,
    [comments],
  )

  const handleAddClick = useCallback(
    (idx: number) => {
      setInputForIdx(idx)
      setInputText('')
      requestAnimationFrame(() => inputRef.current?.focus())
    },
    [],
  )

  const handleSubmit = useCallback(() => {
    if (inputForIdx == null || !inputText.trim()) return

    const info = blockInfos[inputForIdx]
    if (!info) return

    const anchor: BlockAnchor = {
      mode: 'block',
      blockId: info.blockId,
      blockType: info.type,
      blockFingerprint: info.fingerprint,
      snapshotText: info.textContent.slice(0, 300),
    }

    onAdd(inputText.trim(), anchor)
    setInputForIdx(null)
    setInputText('')
    setHoveredBlock(null)
  }, [blockInfos, inputForIdx, inputText, onAdd])

  const handleKeyDown = useCallback(
    (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (e.key === 'Enter') {
        e.preventDefault()
        handleSubmit()
      } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
        setInputForIdx(null)
        setInputText('')
      }
    },
    [handleSubmit],
  )

  const activeIdx = inputForIdx ?? hoveredBlock?.index ?? null
  if (activeIdx == null) return null

  const info = blockInfos[activeIdx]
  if (!info) return null

  const count = commentCounts(info.blockId)
  const top = hoveredBlock?.top ?? 0

  return (
    <div
      className="comment-block-btn-wrap"
      ref={btnRef}
      style={{ top }}
      onMouseLeave={() => {
        if (inputForIdx == null) setHoveredBlock(null)
      }}
    >
      {count > 0 && (
        <span className="comment-gutter-count">
          <MessageSquare size={12} />
          {count}
        </span>
      )}
      {inputForIdx === activeIdx ? (
        <div className="comment-gutter-input">
          <input
            ref={inputRef}
            type="text"
            value={inputText}
            onChange={(e) => setInputText(e.target.value)}
            onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
            onBlur={() => {
              if (!inputText.trim()) {
                setInputForIdx(null)
              }
            }}
            placeholder="Comment..."
            className="comment-input comment-input-sm"
          />
          <button className="btn btn-sm btn-active" onClick={handleSubmit}>
            Add
          </button>
        </div>
      ) : (
        <button
          className="comment-gutter-btn"
          onClick={() => handleAddClick(activeIdx)}
          title="Add comment to this block"
        >
          <Plus size={14} />
        </button>
      )}
    </div>
  )
}

```

**改动：**

1. **BlockCommentGutter** — 重构为 hover 触发模式。监听内容区 `mousemove`，用 `findBlockAtPoint` 检测鼠标所在 block，在该 block 右侧绝对定位显示评论按钮。鼠标离开 block 区域则隐藏。

2. **CSS `::highlight`** — range 评论高亮从纯背景色改为下划线装饰：
   - 普通状态：`text-decoration: underline` + 浅色背景 + 半透明 accent 色下划线
   - active 状态（sidebar hover）：加深背景 + 更深下划线色

   108→    this.mailService.registerEmailType(CommentReplyMailType.Owner, {
   109→      ...renderProps,

   111→  }
   112→  public get model() {
   113→    return this.commentModel
   114→  }
   115→
   116→  private getModelByRefType(
   117→    type: CollectionRefTypes,
   118→  ): ReturnModelType<typeof WriteBaseModel> {
   119→    return this.databaseService.getModelByRefType(type) as any
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  private findRangeByQuoteContext(
   123→    text: string,
   124→    quote: string,
   125→    prefix = '',
   126→    suffix = '',
   127→  ): { startOffset: number; endOffset: number } | null {
   128→    if (!quote) return null
   129→
   130→    const indexes: number[] = []
   131→    let cursor = 0
   132→    while (cursor <= text.length - quote.length) {
   133→      const index = text.indexOf(quote, cursor)
   134→      if (index === -1) break
   135→      indexes.push(index)
   136→      cursor = index + 1
   137→    }
   138→
   139→    if (!indexes.length) return null
   140→
   141→    const expectedPrefix = prefix || ''
   142→    const expectedSuffix = suffix || ''
   143→
   144→    const withContext = indexes.find((index) => {
   145→      const left = text.slice(
   146→        Math.max(0, index - expectedPrefix.length),
   147→        index,
   148→      )
   149→      const right = text.slice(
   150→        index + quote.length,
   151→        index + quote.length + expectedSuffix.length,
   152→      )
   153→      const prefixMatched = expectedPrefix ? left === expectedPrefix : true
   154→      const suffixMatched = expectedSuffix ? right === expectedSuffix : true
   155→      return prefixMatched && suffixMatched
   156→    })
   157→
   158→    const picked = withContext ?? (indexes.length === 1 ? indexes[0] : null)
   159→    if (picked == null) {
   160→      return null
   161→    }
   162→
   163→    return {
   164→      startOffset: picked,
   165→      endOffset: picked + quote.length,
   166→    }
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  private projectRangeFromSnapshot(
   170→    snapshotText: string,
   171→    currentText: string,
   172→    startOffset: number,
   173→    endOffset: number,
   174→  ): { startOffset: number; endOffset: number } | null {
   175→    const safeStart = Math.max(0, Math.min(startOffset, snapshotText.length))
   176→    const safeEnd = Math.max(safeStart, Math.min(endOffset, snapshotText.length))
   177→    const selected = snapshotText.slice(safeStart, safeEnd)
   178→    if (!selected) return null
   179→
   180→    const patches = dmp.patch_make(snapshotText, currentText)
   181→    const [projectedPrefix, prefixFlags] = dmp.patch_apply(
   182→      patches,
   183→      snapshotText.slice(0, safeStart),
   184→    )
   185→    const [projectedSelection, selectionFlags] = dmp.patch_apply(
   186→      patches,
   187→      snapshotText.slice(0, safeEnd),
   188→    )
   189→
   190→    if (
   191→      !prefixFlags.every(Boolean) ||
   192→      !selectionFlags.every(Boolean) ||
   193→      typeof projectedPrefix !== 'string' ||
   194→      typeof projectedSelection !== 'string'
   195→    ) {
   196→      return null
   197→    }
   198→
   199→    const nextStart = projectedPrefix.length
   200→    const nextEnd = projectedSelection.length
   201→
   202→    if (nextEnd < nextStart || nextEnd > currentText.length) {
   203→      return null
   204→    }
   205→
   206→    return {
   207→      startOffset: nextStart,
   208→      endOffset: nextEnd,
   209→    }
   210→  }
   211→
   212→  private findBlockByAnchor(
   213→    anchor: Pick<
   214→      CommentAnchorModel,
   215→      'blockId' | 'blockFingerprint' | 'blockType' | 'snapshotText'
   216→    >,
   217→    blocks: LexicalRootBlock[],
   218→  ): LexicalRootBlock | null {
   219→    const blockById = blocks.find((block) => block.id === anchor.blockId)
   220→    if (blockById) {
   221→      return blockById
   222→    }
   223→
   224→    const byFingerprint = blocks.find((block) => {
   225→      if (!anchor.blockFingerprint) return false
   226→      if (block.fingerprint !== anchor.blockFingerprint) return false
   227→      if (anchor.blockType && block.type !== anchor.blockType) return false
   228→      return true
   229→    })
   230→    if (byFingerprint) {
   231→      return byFingerprint
   232→    }
   233→
   234→    if (anchor.blockType) {
   235→      const bySnapshot = blocks.find(
   236→        (block) => block.type === anchor.blockType && block.text === anchor.snapshotText,
   237→      )
   238→      if (bySnapshot) {
   239→        return bySnapshot
   240→      }
   241→    }
   242→
   243→    return null
   244→  }
   245→
   246→  private resolveAnchorForCreate(
   247→    anchor: CommentAnchorInput | undefined,
   248→    refDoc: Pick<WriteBaseModel, 'contentFormat' | 'content'>,
   249→  ): CommentAnchorModel | undefined {
   250→    if (!anchor) {
   251→      return undefined
   252→    }
   253→
   254→    if (
   255→      refDoc.contentFormat !== ContentFormat.Lexical ||
   256→      !refDoc.content ||
   257→      typeof refDoc.content !== 'string'
   258→    ) {
   259→      throw new BizException(
   260→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   261→        'Anchor comments are only supported for lexical content.',
   262→      )
   263→    }
   264→
   265→    const blocks = this.lexicalService.extractRootBlocks(refDoc.content)
   266→    const block = this.findBlockByAnchor(anchor, blocks)
   267→    if (!block || !block.id) {
   268→      throw new BizException(
   269→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   270→        'Cannot find the anchor block in current lexical document.',
   271→      )
   272→    }
   273→
   274→    const now = new Date()
   275→    const contentHash = md5(refDoc.content)
   276→
   277→    if (anchor.mode === CommentAnchorMode.Block) {
   278→      return {
   279→        mode: CommentAnchorMode.Block,
   280→        blockId: block.id,
   281→        blockType: block.type,
   282→        blockFingerprint: block.fingerprint,
   283→        snapshotText: block.text,
   284→        contentHashAtCreate: contentHash,
   285→        contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   286→        lastResolvedAt: now,
   287→      }
   288→    }
   289→
   290→    const quote = anchor.quote
   291→    if (!quote) {
   292→      throw new BizException(
   293→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   294→        'Range anchor quote cannot be empty.',
   295→      )
   296→    }
   297→
   298→    const initialSlice = block.text.slice(anchor.startOffset, anchor.endOffset)
   299→    const range =
   300→      initialSlice === quote
   301→        ? {
   302→            startOffset: anchor.startOffset,
   303→            endOffset: anchor.endOffset,
   304→          }
   305→        : this.findRangeByQuoteContext(
   306→            block.text,
   307→            quote,
   308→            anchor.prefix,
   309→            anchor.suffix,
   310→          )
   311→
   312→    if (!range) {
   313→      throw new BizException(
   314→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   315→        'Cannot resolve selected text in current block.',
   316→      )
   317→    }
   318→
   319→    return {
   320→      mode: CommentAnchorMode.Range,
   321→      blockId: block.id,
   322→      blockType: block.type,
   323→      blockFingerprint: block.fingerprint,
   324→      snapshotText: block.text,
   325→      quote,
   326→      prefix: anchor.prefix ?? '',
   327→      suffix: anchor.suffix ?? '',
   328→      startOffset: range.startOffset,
   329→      endOffset: range.endOffset,
   330→      contentHashAtCreate: contentHash,
   331→      contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   332→      lastResolvedAt: now,
   333→    }
   334→  }
   335→
   336→  private resolveAnchorForUpdatedContent(
   337→    anchor: CommentAnchorModel,
   338→    blocks: LexicalRootBlock[],
   339→    contentHash: string,
   340→  ): CommentAnchorModel | null {
   341→    const targetBlock = this.findBlockByAnchor(anchor, blocks)
   342→    if (!targetBlock || !targetBlock.id) {
   343→      return null
   344→    }
   345→
   346→    const baseAnchor = {
   347→      ...anchor,
   348→      blockId: targetBlock.id,
   349→      blockType: targetBlock.type,
   350→      blockFingerprint: targetBlock.fingerprint,
   351→      snapshotText: targetBlock.text,
   352→      contentHashCurrent: contentHash,
   353→      lastResolvedAt: new Date(),
   354→    }
   355→
   356→    if (anchor.mode === CommentAnchorMode.Block) {
   357→      return {
   358→        ...baseAnchor,
   359→        mode: CommentAnchorMode.Block,
   360→      }
   361→    }
   362→
   363→    const quote = anchor.quote
   364→    if (!quote) {
   365→      return null
   366→    }
   367→
   368→    const currentSlice = targetBlock.text.slice(
   369→      anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   370→      anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   371→    )
   372→
   373→    let range =
   374→      currentSlice === quote
   375→        ? {
   376→            startOffset: anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   377→            endOffset: anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   378→          }
   379→        : this.findRangeByQuoteContext(
   380→            targetBlock.text,
   381→            quote,
   382→            anchor.prefix ?? '',
   383→            anchor.suffix ?? '',
   384→          )
   385→
   386→    if (!range && typeof anchor.snapshotText === 'string') {
   387→      const projected = this.projectRangeFromSnapshot(
   388→        anchor.snapshotText,
   389→        targetBlock.text,
   390→        anchor.startOffset ?? 0,
   391→        anchor.endOffset ?? 0,
   392→      )
   393→      if (
   394→        projected &&
   395→        targetBlock.text.slice(projected.startOffset, projected.endOffset) ===
   396→          quote
   397→      ) {
   398→        range = projected
   399→      }
   400→    }
   401→
   402→    if (!range) {
   403→      range = this.findRangeByQuoteContext(targetBlock.text, quote)
   404→    }
   405→
   406→    if (!range) {
   407→      return null
   408→    }
   409→
   410→    return {
   411→      ...baseAnchor,
   412→      mode: CommentAnchorMode.Range,
   413→      quote,
   414→      prefix: anchor.prefix ?? '',
   415→      suffix: anchor.suffix ?? '',
   416→      startOffset: range.startOffset,
   417→      endOffset: range.endOffset,
   418→    }
   419→  }
   420→
   421→  private async reanchorCommentsByRef(
   422→    refType: CollectionRefTypes,
   423→    refId: string,
   424→  ) {
   425→    if (!refId) return
   426→
   427→    const refModel = this.getModelByRefType(refType)
   428→    const refDoc = await refModel
   429→      .findById(refId)
   430→      .select('content contentFormat')
   431→      .lean()
   432→
   433→    if (
   434→      !refDoc ||
   435→      refDoc.contentFormat !== ContentFormat.Lexical ||
   436→      !refDoc.content ||
   437→      typeof refDoc.content !== 'string'
   438→    ) {
   439→      return
   440→    }
   441→
   442→    const blocks = this.lexicalService.extractRootBlocks(refDoc.content)
   443→    const contentHash = md5(refDoc.content)
   444→
   445→    const comments = await this.commentModel
   446→      .find({
   447→        ref: refId,
   448→        refType,
   449→        parent: undefined,
   450→        anchor: { $exists: true },
   451→      })
   452→      .lean()
   453→
   454→    const deleting: string[] = []
   455→
   456→    for (const comment of comments) {
   457→      if (!comment.anchor) continue
   458→
   459→      const nextAnchor = this.resolveAnchorForUpdatedContent(
   460→        comment.anchor as CommentAnchorModel,
   461→        blocks,
   462→        contentHash,
   463→      )
   464→
   465→      if (!nextAnchor) {
   466→        deleting.push(comment.id ?? comment._id.toString())
   467→        continue
   468→      }
   469→
   470→      await this.commentModel.updateOne(
   471→        { _id: comment._id },
   472→        {
   473→          $set: {
   474→            anchor: nextAnchor,
   475→          },
   476→        },
   477→      )
   478→    }
   479→
   480→    for (const id of deleting) {
   481→      try {
   482→        await this.deleteComments(id)
   483→        await this.eventManager.emit(
   484→          BusinessEvents.COMMENT_DELETE,
   485→          { id },
   486→          {
   487→            scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_VISITOR,
   488→            nextTick: true,
   489→          },
   490→        )
   491→      } catch (error) {
   492→        this.logger.error(`failed to delete orphan anchor comment ${id}`, error)
   493→      }
   494→    }
   495→  }
   496→
   497→  /**
   498→   * 使用 AI 评估评论内容
   499→   * @param text 评论文本
   500→   * @param aiReviewType 评审类型
   501→   * @param aiReviewThreshold 阈值
   502→   * @returns 是否应该被标记为垃圾评论
   503→   */
   504→  private async evaluateCommentWithAI(
   505→    text: string,
   506→    aiReviewType: 'binary' | 'score',
   507→    aiReviewThreshold: number,
   508→  ): Promise<boolean> {
   509→    const runtime = await this.aiService.getCommentReviewModel()
   510→
   511→    // 评分模式
   512→    if (aiReviewType === 'score') {
   513→      try {
   514→        const { output } = await runtime.generateStructured({
   515→          ...AI_PROMPTS.comment.score(text),
   516→        })
   517→
   518→        // 如果包含敏感内容直接拒绝
   519→        if (output.hasSensitiveContent) {
   520→          return true
   521→        }
   522→        // 否则根据评分判断
   523→        return output.score > aiReviewThreshold
   524→      } catch (error) {
   525→        this.logger.error('AI 评审评分模式出错', error)
   526→        return false
   527→      }
   528→    }
   529→    // 垃圾检测模式
   530→    else {
   531→      try {
   532→        const { output } = await runtime.generateStructured({
   533→          ...AI_PROMPTS.comment.spam(text),
   534→        })
   535→
   536→        // 如果包含敏感内容直接拒绝
   537→        if (output.hasSensitiveContent) {
   538→          return true
   539→        }
   540→        // 否则按照是否 spam 判断
   541→        return output.isSpam
   542→      } catch (error) {
   543→        this.logger.error('AI 评审垃圾检测模式出错', error)
   544→        return false
   545→      }
   546→    }
   547→  }
   548→
   549→  async checkSpam(doc: CommentModel) {
   550→    const res = await (async () => {
   551→      const commentOptions = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   552→      if (!commentOptions.antiSpam) {
   553→        return false
   554→      }
   555→      const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   556→      if (doc.author === owner.username || doc.author === owner.name) {
   557→        return false
   558→      }
   559→      if (commentOptions.blockIps) {
   560→        if (!doc.ip) {
   561→          return false
   562→        }
   563→        const isBlock = commentOptions.blockIps.some((ip) =>
   564→          // @ts-ignore
   565→          new RegExp(ip, 'gi').test(doc.ip),
   566→        )
   567→        if (isBlock) {
   568→          return true
   569→        }
   570→      }
   571→
   572→      const customKeywords = commentOptions.spamKeywords || []
   573→      const isBlock = [...customKeywords, ...BlockedKeywords].some((keyword) =>
   574→        new RegExp(keyword, 'gi').test(doc.text),
   575→      )
   576→
   577→      if (isBlock) {
   578→        return true
   579→      }
   580→
   581→      if (commentOptions.disableNoChinese && !hasChinese(doc.text)) {
   582→        return true
   583→      }
   584→
   585→      if (commentOptions.aiReview) {
   586→        return this.evaluateCommentWithAI(
   587→          doc.text,
   588→          commentOptions.aiReviewType,
   589→          commentOptions.aiReviewThreshold,
   590→        )
   591→      }
   592→      return false
   593→    })()
   594→    if (res) {
   595→      this.logger.warn(
   596→        '--> 检测到一条垃圾评论：' +
   597→          `作者：${doc.author}, IP: ${doc.ip}, 内容为：${doc.text}`,
   598→      )
   599→    }
   600→    return res
   601→  }
   602→
   603→  async assignReaderToComment(
   604→    doc: Partial<CommentModel>,
   605→  ): Promise<(ReaderModel & { id: string }) | null> {
   606→    const readerId = RequestContext.currentRequest()?.readerId
   607→
   608→    let reader: ReaderModel | null = null
   609→    if (readerId) {
   610→      reader = await this.readerService
   611→        .findReaderInIds([readerId])
   612→        .then((readers) => readers[0] ?? null)
   613→    }
   614→
   615→    if (!reader) {
   616→      return null
   617→    }
   618→    doc.author = reader.name
   619→    doc.mail = reader.email
   620→    doc.avatar = reader.image
   621→
   622→    return { ...reader, id: readerId! }
   623→  }
   624→  async createComment(
   625→    id: string,
   626→    doc: Partial<CommentModel>,
   627→    type?: CollectionRefTypes,
   628→  ) {
   629→    const reader = await this.assignReaderToComment(doc)
   630→
   631→    let ref: (WriteBaseModel & { _id: any }) | null = null
   632→    let refType = type
   633→    if (type) {
   634→      const model = this.getModelByRefType(type)
   635→
   636→      ref = await model.findById(id).lean()
   637→    } else {
   638→      const result = await this.databaseService.findGlobalById(id)
   639→      if (result) {
   640→        const { type, document } = result
   641→        ref = document as any
   642→        refType = type
   643→      }
   644→    }
   645→    if (!ref) {
   646→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentPostNotExists)
   647→    }
   648→    const normalizedAnchor = this.resolveAnchorForCreate(
   649→      doc.anchor as CommentAnchorInput | undefined,
   650→      ref,
   651→    )
   652→    if (normalizedAnchor) {
   653→      doc.anchor = normalizedAnchor
   654→    } else {
   655→      delete (doc as Partial<CommentModel>).anchor
   656→    }
   657→
   658→    const commentIndex = ref.commentsIndex || 0
   659→    doc.key = `#${commentIndex + 1}`
   660→
   661→    const comment = await this.commentModel.create({
   662→      ...doc,
   663→      state: RequestContext.currentIsAuthenticated()
   664→        ? CommentState.Read
   665→        : CommentState.Unread,
   666→      ref: new Types.ObjectId(id),
   667→      readerId: reader ? reader.id : undefined,
   668→      refType,
   669→    })
   670→
   671→    await this.databaseService.getModelByRefType(refType!).updateOne(
   672→      { _id: ref._id },
   673→      {
   674→        $inc: {
   675→          commentsIndex: 1,
   676→        },
   677→      },
   678→    )
   679→
   680→    return comment
   681→  }
   682→
   683→  async afterCreateComment(
   684→    commentId: string,
   685→    ipLocation: { ip: string },
   686→    isAuthenticated: boolean,
   687→  ) {
   688→    const comment = await this.commentModel
   689→      .findById(commentId)
   690→      .lean({
   691→        getters: true,
   692→      })
   693→      .select('+ip +agent')
   694→
   695→    const readerId = RequestContext.currentRequest()?.readerId
   696→    if (!comment) return
   697→    scheduleManager.schedule(async () => {
   698→      if (isAuthenticated) {
   699→        return
   700→      }
   701→      await this.appendIpLocation(commentId, ipLocation.ip)
   702→    })
   703→
   704→    scheduleManager.batch(async () => {
   705→      const configs = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   706→      const { commentShouldAudit } = configs
   707→      if ((await this.checkSpam(comment)) && !readerId) {
   708→        await this.commentModel.updateOne(
   709→          { _id: commentId },
   710→          {
   711→            state: CommentState.Junk,
   712→          },
   713→        )
   714→
   715→        return
   716→      } else if (!isAuthenticated) {
   717→        this.sendEmail(comment, CommentReplyMailType.Owner)
   718→      }
   719→
   720→      await this.eventManager.broadcast(
   721→        BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE,
   722→        comment,
   723→        {
   724→          scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_ADMIN,
   725→        },
   726→      )
   727→
   728→      if ((!commentShouldAudit || isAuthenticated) && !comment.isWhispers) {
   729→        await this.eventManager.broadcast(
   730→          BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE,
   731→          omit(comment, ['ip', 'agent']),
   732→          {
   733→            scope: EventScope.TO_VISITOR,
   734→          },
   735→        )
   736→      }
   737→    })
   738→  }
   739→
   740→  async validAuthorName(author: string): Promise<void> {
   741→    const isExist = await this.ownerService.isOwnerName(author)
   742→    if (isExist) {
   743→      throw new BizException(
   744→        ErrorCodeEnum.InvalidParameter,
   745→        '用户名与主人重名啦，但是你好像并不是我的主人唉',
   746→      )
   747→    }
   748→  }
   749→
   750→  async deleteComments(id: string) {
   751→    const comment = await this.commentModel.findById(id).lean()
   752→    if (!comment) {
   753→      throw new NoContentCanBeModifiedException()
   754→    }
   755→
   756→    const { children, parent } = comment
   757→    if (children && children.length > 0) {
   758→      await Promise.all(
   759→        children.map(async (id) => {
   760→          await this.deleteComments(id as any as string)
   761→        }),
   762→      )
   763→    }
   764→    if (parent) {
   765→      const parent = await this.commentModel.findById(comment.parent)
   766→      if (parent) {
   767→        await parent.updateOne({
   768→          $pull: {
   769→            children: comment._id,
   770→          },
   771→        })
   772→      }
   773→    }
   774→    await this.commentModel.deleteOne({ _id: id })
   775→  }
   776→
   777→  async allowComment(id: string, type?: CollectionRefTypes) {
   778→    if (type) {
   779→      const model = this.getModelByRefType(type)
   780→      const doc = await model.findById(id)
   781→      if (!doc) {
   782→        throw new CannotFindException()
   783→      }
   784→      return doc.allowComment ?? true
   785→    } else {
   786→      const result = await this.databaseService.findGlobalById(id)
   787→      if (!result) {
   788→        throw new CannotFindException()
   789→      }
   790→      return 'allowComment' in result ? result.allowComment : true
   791→    }
   792→  }
   793→
   794→  async getComments({ page, size, state } = { page: 1, size: 10, state: 0 }) {
   795→    const queryList = await this.commentModel.paginate(
   796→      { state },
   797→      {
   798→        select: '+ip +agent -children',
   799→        page,
   800→        limit: size,
   801→        populate: [
   802→          { path: 'parent', select: '-children' },
   803→          {
   804→            path: 'ref',
   805→            // categoryId for post
   806→            // content for recently
   807→            select: 'title _id slug nid categoryId content',
   808→          },
   809→        ],
   810→        sort: { created: -1 },
   811→        autopopulate: false,
   812→      },
   813→    )
   814→
   815→    // 过滤脏数据
   816→    this.cleanDirtyData(queryList.docs)
   817→
   818→    await this.fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl(queryList.docs)
   819→
   820→    return queryList
   821→  }
   822→
   823→  cleanDirtyData(docs: CommentModel[]) {
   824→    for (const doc of docs) {
   825→      if (!doc.children || doc.children.length === 0) {
   826→        continue
   827→      }
   828→
   829→      const nextChildren = [] as any[]
   830→
   831→      for (const child of doc.children) {
   832→        if (isObjectIdOrHexString(child)) {
   833→          this.logger.warn(`--> 检测到一条脏数据：${doc.id}.child: ${child}`)
   834→          continue
   835→        }
   836→        nextChildren.push(child)
   837→
   838→        if ((child as CommentModel).children) {
   839→          this.cleanDirtyData((child as CommentModel).children as any[])
   840→        }
   841→      }
   842→
   843→      doc.children = nextChildren
   844→    }
   845→  }
   846→
   847→  async sendEmail(comment: CommentModel, type: CommentReplyMailType) {
   848→    const enable = await this.configsService
   849→      .get('mailOptions')
   850→      .then((config) => config.enable)
   851→    if (!enable) {
   852→      return
   853→    }
   854→
   855→    const ownerInfo = await this.ownerService.getOwnerInfo()
   856→
   857→    const refType = comment.refType
   858→    const refModel = this.getModelByRefType(refType)
   859→    const refDoc = await refModel.findById(comment.ref)
   860→    const time = new Date(comment.created!)
   861→    const parent: CommentModel | null = await this.commentModel
   862→      .findOne({ _id: comment.parent })
   863→      .lean()
   864→
   865→    const parsedTime = `${time.getDate()}/${
   866→      time.getMonth() + 1
   867→    }/${time.getFullYear()}`
   868→
   869→    if (!refDoc || !ownerInfo.mail) {
   870→      return
   871→    }
   872→
   873→    this.sendCommentNotificationMail({
   874→      to: type === CommentReplyMailType.Owner ? ownerInfo.mail : parent!.mail,
   875→      type,
   876→      source: {
   877→        title: refType === CollectionRefTypes.Recently ? '速记' : refDoc.title,
   878→        text: comment.text,
   879→        author:
   880→          type === CommentReplyMailType.Guest ? parent!.author : comment.author,
   881→        owner: ownerInfo.name,
   882→        link: await this.resolveUrlByType(refType, refDoc).then(
   883→          (url) => `${url}#comments-${comment.id}`,
   884→        ),
   885→        time: parsedTime,
   886→        mail:
   887→          CommentReplyMailType.Owner === type ? comment.mail : ownerInfo.mail,
   888→        ip: comment.ip || '',
   889→
   890→        aggregate: {
   891→          owner: ownerInfo,
   892→          commentor: {
   893→            ...pick(comment, defaultCommentModelKeys),
   894→            created: new Date(comment.created!).toISOString(),
   895→            isWhispers: comment.isWhispers || false,
   896→          } as CommentModelRenderProps,
   897→          parent,
   898→          post: {
   899→            title: refDoc.title,
   900→            created: new Date(refDoc.created!).toISOString(),
   901→            id: refDoc.id!,
   902→            modified: refDoc.modified
   903→              ? new Date(refDoc.modified!).toISOString()
   904→              : null,
   905→            text: refDoc.text,
   906→          },
   907→        },
   908→      },
   909→    })
   910→  }
   911→
   912→  async resolveUrlByType(type: CollectionRefTypes, model: any) {
   913→    const {
   914→      url: { webUrl: base },
   915→    } = await this.configsService.waitForConfigReady()
   916→    switch (type) {
   917→      case CollectionRefTypes.Note: {
   918→        return new URL(`/notes/${model.nid}`, base).toString()
   919→      }
   920→      case CollectionRefTypes.Page: {
   921→        return new URL(`/${model.slug}`, base).toString()
   922→      }
   923→      case CollectionRefTypes.Post: {
   924→        return new URL(
   925→          `/posts/${model.category.slug}/${model.slug}`,
   926→          base,
   927→        ).toString()
   928→      }
   929→      case CollectionRefTypes.Recently: {
   930→        return new URL(`/thinking/${model._id}`, base).toString()
   931→      }
   932→    }
   933→  }
   934→
   935→  async appendIpLocation(id: string, ip: string) {
   936→    if (!ip) {
   937→      return
   938→    }
   939→    const { recordIpLocation } = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   940→
   941→    if (!recordIpLocation) {
   942→      return
   943→    }
   944→
   945→    const model = this.commentModel.findById(id).lean()
   946→    if (!model) {
   947→      return
   948→    }
   949→
   950→    const fnModel = (await this.serverlessService.model
   951→      .findOne({
   952→        name: 'ip',
   953→        reference: 'built-in',
   954→        type: SnippetType.Function,
   955→      })
   956→      .select('+secret')
   957→      .lean({
   958→        getters: true,
   959→      })) as SnippetModel
   960→
   961→    if (!fnModel) {
   962→      this.logger.error('[Serverless Fn] ip query function is missing.')
   963→      return model
   964→    }
   965→
   966→    const result =
   967→      await this.serverlessService.injectContextIntoServerlessFunctionAndCall(
   968→        fnModel,
   969→        {
   970→          req: {
   971→            query: { ip },
   972→          },
   973→          res: createMockedContextResponse({} as any),
   974→        } as any,
   975→      )
   976→
   977→    const location =
   978→      `${result.countryName || ''}${
   979→        result.regionName && result.regionName !== result.cityName
   980→          ? String(result.regionName)
   981→          : ''
   982→      }${result.cityName ? String(result.cityName) : ''}` || undefined
   983→
   984→    if (location) await this.commentModel.updateOne({ _id: id }, { location })
   985→  }
   986→
   987→  async fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl(comments: CommentModel[]) {
   988→    const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   989→
   990→    comments.forEach(function process(comment) {
   991→      if (typeof comment == 'string') {
   992→        return
   993→      }
   994→      // 如果是 author 是站长，就用站长自己设定的头像替换
   995→      if (comment.author === owner.name) {
   996→        comment.avatar = owner.avatar || comment.avatar
   997→      }
   998→
   999→      // 如果不存在头像就
  1000→      if (!comment.avatar) {
  1001→        comment.avatar = getAvatar(comment.mail)
  1002→      }
  1003→
  1004→      if (comment.children?.length) {
  1005→        comment.children.forEach((child) => {
  1006→          process(child as CommentModel)
  1007→        })
  1008→      }
  1009→
  1010→      return comment
  1011→    })
  1012→
  1013→    return comments
  1014→  }
  1015→
  1016→  async sendCommentNotificationMail({
  1017→    to,
  1018→    source,
  1019→    type,
  1020→  }: {
  1021→    to: string
  1022→    source: Pick<
  1023→      CommentEmailTemplateRenderProps,
  1024→      keyof CommentEmailTemplateRenderProps
  1025→    >
  1026→    type: CommentReplyMailType
  1027→  }) {
  1028→    const { seo, mailOptions } = await this.configsService.waitForConfigReady()
  1029→    const senderEmail = mailOptions.from || mailOptions.smtp?.user
  1030→    const sendfrom = `"${seo.title || 'Mx Space'}" <${senderEmail}>`
  1031→    const subject =
  1032→      type === CommentReplyMailType.Guest
  1033→        ? `[${seo.title || 'Mx Space'}] 主人给你了新的回复呐`
  1034→        : `[${seo.title || 'Mx Space'}] 有新回复了耶~`
  1035→
  1036→    source.ip ??= ''
  1037→    const options = {
  1038→      from: sendfrom,
  1039→      subject,
  1040→      to,
  1041→      html: ejs.render(
  1042→        (await this.mailService.readTemplate(type)) as string,
  1043→        source,
  1044→      ),
  1045→    }
  1046→    if (isDev) {
  1047→      // @ts-ignore
  1048→      delete options.html
  1049→      Object.assign(options, { source })
  1050→      this.logger.log(options)
  1051→      return
  1052→    }
  1053→    await this.mailService.send(options)
  1054→  }
  1055→
  1056→  @OnEvent(BusinessEvents.POST_UPDATE)
  1057→  async handlePostUpdate(payload: { id?: string }) {
  1058→    if (!payload?.id) return
  1059→    await this.reanchorCommentsByRef(CollectionRefTypes.Post, payload.id)
  1060→  }
  1061→
  1062→  @OnEvent(BusinessEvents.NOTE_UPDATE)
  1063→  async handleNoteUpdate(payload: { id?: string }) {
  1064→    if (!payload?.id) return
  1065→    await this.reanchorCommentsByRef(CollectionRefTypes.Note, payload.id)
  1066→  }
  1067→
  1068→  @OnEvent(BusinessEvents.PAGE_UPDATE)
  1069→  async handlePageUpdate(payload: { id?: string }) {
  1070→    if (!payload?.id) return
  1071→    await this.reanchorCommentsByRef(CollectionRefTypes.Page, payload.id)
  1072→  }
  1073→
  1074→  // push comment
  1075→  @OnEvent(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE)
  1076→  async pushCommentEvent(comment: CommentModel) {
  1077→    const { enable, enableComment } =
  1078→      await this.configsService.get('barkOptions')
  1079→    if (!enable || !enableComment) {
  1080→      return
  1081→    }
  1082→    const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
  1083→    if (comment.author === owner.name || comment.author === owner.username) {
  1084→      return
  1085→    }
  1086→    const { adminUrl } = await this.configsService.get('url')
  1087→
  1088→    await this.barkService.push({
  1089→      title: '收到一条新评论',
  1090→      body: `${comment.author} 评论了你的${
  1091→        comment.refType === CollectionRefTypes.Recently ? '速记' : '文章'
  1092→      }：${comment.text}`,
  1093→      icon: comment.avatar,
  1094→      url: `${adminUrl}#/comments`,
  1095→    })
  1096→  }
  1097→
  1098→  async editComment(id: string, text: string) {
  1099→    const comment = await this.commentModel.findById(id).lean()
  1100→    if (!comment) {
  1101→      throw new CannotFindException()
  1102→    }
  1103→    await this.commentModel.updateOne(
  1104→      { _id: id },
  1105→      { text, editedAt: new Date() },
  1106→    )
  1107→    await this.eventManager.broadcast(
  1108→      BusinessEvents.COMMENT_UPDATE,
  1109→      { id, text },
  1110→      {
  1111→        scope: comment.isWhispers ? EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_ADMIN : EventScope.ALL,
  1112→      },
  1113→    )
  1114→  }
  1115→}
  1116→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
Perfect! Now I have enough information. Let me create a comprehensive summary document.

## Exploration Complete: Shiroi Article/Post System Analysis

### 1. Post Rendering Pipeline

**Post Detail Page Flow:**
- **Route**: `/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`
- **Data Fetching**: 
  - Fetches `PostWithTranslation` (wrapped PostModel with translation and like data)
  - Uses server-side fetching via `getData()` in `api.tsx`
- **Rendering Decision** (`PostContent.tsx`):
  - Checks `data.contentFormat`:
    - If `'lexical'` → uses `PostLexicalRenderer`
    - Otherwise → uses `PostMarkdownRenderer`

### 2. Content Storage and Format

**Post Data Structure** (from `@mx-space/api-client` PostModel):
- `contentFormat?: string` - either `'lexical'` or undefined/markdown
- `content?: string | null` - For lexical: `SerializedEditorState` JSON string, for markdown: markdown text
- `text?: string` - Fallback markdown text (used for summary generation)

**Two Content Paths:**
1. **Markdown Path**:
   - Renderer: `PostMarkdownRenderer` → `MainMarkdown`
   - Located: `/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx`
   - Uses `markdown-to-jsx` compiler with custom renderers for headings, images, etc.

2. **Lexical Path**:
   - Renderer: `PostLexicalRenderer` → `MainLexicalContent` → `LexicalContent`
   - Located: `/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx`
   - Parses `content` as JSON into `SerializedEditorState`
   - Uses `ShiroRenderer` from `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer`

### 3. ShiroRenderer Implementation

**ShiroRenderer** (`LexicalContent.tsx`):
```typescript
<ShiroRenderer
  value={editorState}
  variant={variant}
  theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
  className={clsx(className, 'bg-transparent!')}
  style={{ ...baseVarStyle, ...editorOverrideStyle }}
/>
```

- Imported from `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer`
- Takes serialized `SerializedEditorState` and renders static read-only view
- Provides link card fetching for GitHub/TMDB/Bangumi/LeetCode/Music/mx-space APIs
- Font fallbacks: sans-serif, serif (CJK), monospace

### 4. Existing Comment System Architecture

**Comment Display Flow:**
1. **Root Container** (`page.tsx`):
   - `CommentAreaRootLazy` passed `refId={data.id}` and `allowComment={data.allowComment}`

2. **Comment Provider** (`CommentProvider.tsx`):
   - Fetches comments via `useCommentsQuery(refId)` (infinite scroll with pagination)
   - Maintains Jotai atom for comment map: `Record<string, CommentModel>`
   - Provides reader metadata for each comment
   - Renders `CommentBoxRoot` (input) + `Comments` (list)

3. **Comment Box** (`CommentBox/Root.tsx`):
   - Two modes: authenticated with reader login, or legacy anonymous form
   - Uses `CommentBoxLegacyForm` or `CommentBoxAuthedInput`
   - Integrates with socket.io for real-time updates

4. **Comment List** (`Comments.tsx` + `Comment.tsx`):
   - Displays tree-structured comments (supports nested replies)
   - Each comment renders with:
     - Avatar + author name + timestamp + location
     - Markdown content via `CommentMarkdown`
     - Edit state indicator with `(已编辑)`
     - Action buttons (pin, delete if owner)
   - Children comments indented by `ml-9`

**Comment Data Model** (from `@mx-space/api-client`):
```typescript
CommentModel {
  id: string
  text: string
  author: string
  url?: string
  avatar?: string
  readerId?: string
  parentId?: string
  parent?: CommentModel | string
  children?: CommentModel[]
  location?: string
  isWhispers?: boolean
  key?: string
  source?: string
  created: string
  editedAt?: string
  ref: string (post/note/page ID)
}

ReaderModel {
  id?: string
  name?: string
  image?: string
  handle?: string
  (social auth profile data)
}
```

### 5. Comment Anchor / Highlight Functionality

**Block Anchor System** (in rich-editor):
Located: `/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`

**Two Anchor Types:**

1. **BlockAnchor** - Whole block comment:
```typescript
interface BlockAnchor {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string               // UUID from BlockIdPlugin
  blockType: string             // node type (paragraph, heading, etc.)
  blockFingerprint: string      // hash of first 200 chars
  snapshotText: string         // first 300 chars
}
```

2. **RangeAnchor** - Highlighted text selection:
```typescript
interface RangeAnchor {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
  quote: string                 // selected text
  prefix: string               // 50 chars before
  suffix: string               // 50 chars after
  startOffset: number          // offset in block
  endOffset: number
}
```

**BlockIdPlugin** (`/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/BlockIdPlugin.tsx`):
- Auto-assigns unique `blockIdState` to each root-level block in Lexical editor
- Uses UUID for IDs
- Stores state via Lexical's `$getState()` / `$setState()`
- Normalizes on edit to ensure no duplicates

**Anchor Creation Functions:**
- `buildBlockAnchor(editor, blockKey?)` - create block anchor from selection or explicit block
- `buildRangeAnchor(editor)` - create range anchor from current text selection

**Anchor Errors:**
- `'no-selection'` - no text selection
- `'cross-block'` - selection spans multiple blocks
- `'collapsed'` - empty selection
- `'no-block-id'` - block missing ID
- `'not-root-block'` - nested too deep

### 6. Markdown Heading Anchors

**For Markdown Content** (`heading.tsx`):
- Headings assigned IDs: `${index}__${id}` format
- Each heading gets data attribute: `data-markdown-heading: true`
- Hover reveal anchor link button with hashtag icon
- Click updates URL hash and scrolls into view

### 7. Data Flow Summary

```
Post Detail Page
  ├── fetch PostWithTranslation via getData()
  ├── pass to CurrentPostDataProvider
  ├── render based on contentFormat
  │   ├── 'lexical' → ShiroRenderer(SerializedEditorState)
  │   │                  (with BlockIdPlugin for comment anchors)
  │   └── undefined/markdown → MainMarkdown()
  │                            (with heading IDs for anchors)
  │
  └── CommentAreaRootLazy(refId, allowComment)
       ├── CommentProvider → useCommentsQuery(refId)
       │   ├── Fetch infinite paginated comments
       │   ├── Map comments to Jotai atom
       │   └── Provide reader metadata
       ├── CommentBoxRoot (input + mode switching)
       └── Comments (tree display with nesting)
```

### 8. Key Files Reference

**Post Rendering:**
- Post detail: `/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`
- Post content router: `/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/PostContent.tsx`
- Lexical renderer: `/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx`
- Markdown renderer: `/apps/web/src/components/ui/markdown/Markdown.tsx`

**Comments:**
- Root lazy: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentRootLazy.tsx`
- Area root: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentRoot.tsx`
- Provider: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx`
- Comment display: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`
- Comment list: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx`
- Comment box: `/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`

**Comment Anchors:**
- Block ID plugin: `/packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/BlockIdPlugin.tsx`
- Anchor utilities: `/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`

**Queries:**
- Comment definitions: `/apps/web/src/queries/definition/comment.ts`
- Comment hooks: `/apps/web/src/queries/hooks/comment.ts`
- Comment keys: `/apps/web/src/queries/keys/comment.ts`

    46→
    47→import type { PageParams, PostDataResult, PostWithTranslation } from './api'
    48→import { getData } from './api'
    49→import {
    50→  FocusReadingEffect,
    51→  LdJsonWithAuthor,
    52→  MarkdownSelection,
    53→  PostDataReValidate,
    54→  PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider,
    55→  PostMetaBarInternal,
    56→  PostTitle,
    57→  SlugReplacer,
    58→} from './pageExtra'
    59→import { PostContent } from './PostContent'
    60→
    61→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    62→
    63→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
    64→  params: Promise<PageParams>
    65→  searchParams: Promise<{ lang?: string }>
    66→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
    67→  const params = await props.params
    68→  const searchParams = await props.searchParams
    69→  try {
    70→    const { post: data } = await getData({
    71→      ...params,
    72→      lang: searchParams.lang,
    73→    })
    74→    const {
    75→      category: { slug: categorySlug },
    76→      meta,
    77→    } = data
    78→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
    79→
    80→    const ogImage = await getOgUrl(
    81→      'post',
    82→      {
    83→        category: categorySlug,
    84→        slug: data.slug,
    85→      },
    86→      params.locale,
    87→    )
    88→
    89→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/posts/${categorySlug}/${data.slug}`
    90→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
    91→      params.locale as any,
    92→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
    93→    )
    94→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
    95→      sourceLang: data.translationMeta?.sourceLang,
    96→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
    97→    })
    98→
    99→    return {
   100→      title: data.title,
   101→      description,
   102→      openGraph: {
   103→        title: data.title,
   104→        description,
   105→        images: ogImage,
   106→        type: 'article',
   107→      },
   108→      twitter: {
   109→        images: ogImage,
   110→        title: data.title,
   111→        description,
   112→        card: 'summary_large_image',
   113→      },
   114→      keywords: meta?.keywords,
   115→      category: categorySlug,
   116→      alternates: {
   117→        canonical: canonicalPath,
   118→        languages: {
   119→          ...buildLanguageAlternates(canonicalPathNoLocale, supportedLocales),
   120→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   121→        },
   122→      },
   123→    } satisfies Metadata
   124→  } catch {
   125→    return {}
   126→  }
   127→}
   128→
   129→const Summary = ({ data }: { data: PostWithTranslation }) => {
   130→  const { id } = data
   131→  const summary = data.summary || ''
   132→  return <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} className="mb-8" />
   133→}
   134→
   135→const PostPage = ({ data }: { data: PostWithTranslation }) => {
   136→  const { id, isTranslated, translationMeta } = data
   137→  return (
   138→    <div className="relative w-full min-w-0">
   139→      <AckRead id={id} type="post" />
   140→      <div>
   141→        <div className="mb-8">
   142→          <PostTitle />
   143→          <GoToAdminEditingButton
   144→            id={id!}
   145→            type="posts"
   146→            className="absolute -top-6 right-0"
   147→          />
   148→
   149→          <PostMetaBarInternal className="mb-8 justify-center" />
   150→
   151→          {isTranslated && translationMeta ? (
   152→            <TranslationBanner translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   153→          ) : (
   154→            <Summary data={data} />
   155→          )}
   156→
   157→          <PostOutdate />
   158→
   159→          <PostRelated type="before" />
   160→        </div>
   161→        <WrappedElementProvider eoaDetect>
   162→          <ReadIndicatorForMobile />
   163→          <Presence />
   164→          <PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   165→            <MarkdownSelection>
   166→              <article
   167→                className={clsx(data.contentFormat !== 'lexical' && 'prose')}
   168→              >
   169→                <div className="sr-only">
   170→                  <PostTitle />
   171→                </div>
   172→                <FocusReadingEffect />
   173→                <PostContent
   174→                  contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   175→                  content={data.content}
   176→                />
   177→              </article>
   178→            </MarkdownSelection>
   179→          </PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   180→
   181→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   182→            <PostActionAside />
   183→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   184→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   185→      </div>
   186→      <ClientOnly>
   187→        <PostRelated />
   188→        <PostCopyright />
   189→
   190→        {/* <SubscribeBell defaultType="post_c" /> */}
   191→        <PostBottomBarAction />
   192→      </ClientOnly>
   193→    </div>
   194→  )
   195→}
   196→
   197→export default definePrerenderPage<PageParams>()<PostDataResult>({
   198→  fetcher(params) {
   199→    return getData(params)
   200→  },
   201→
   202→  Component: async (props) => {
   203→    const { data: fetchedData, params, fetchedAt } = props
   204→    const { post: data } = fetchedData
   205→
   206→    const fullPath = `/posts/${data.category.slug}/${data.slug}`
   207→    const currentPath = `/posts/${params.category}/${params.slug}`
   208→
   209→    const jsonLd: WithContext<Article> = {
   210→      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
   211→      '@type': 'BlogPosting',
   212→      headline: data.title,
   213→      image: data.meta?.cover ? [data.meta.cover] : undefined,
   214→      description: data.summary || (data.text ?? '').slice(0, 200),
   215→      datePublished: data.created,
   216→      dateModified: data.modified || undefined,
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    return (
   220→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   221→        contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   222→        content={data.content}
   223→      >
   224→        {currentPath !== fullPath && <SlugReplacer to={fullPath} />}
   225→        <LdJsonWithAuthor baseLdJson={jsonLd} />
   226→
   227→        <PageColorGradient seed={data.title + data.category.name} />
   228→        <CurrentPostDataProvider data={data} />
   229→        <PostDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   230→        <div
   231→          data-server-fetched-at={fetchedAt}
   232→          className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid"
   233→        >
   234→          <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization className="min-w-0">
   235→            <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.id)}>
   236→              <PostPage data={data} />
   237→            </RoomProvider>
   238→
   239→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   240→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   241→                refId={data.id}
   242→                allowComment={data.allowComment}
   243→              />
   244→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   245→          </BottomToUpTransitionView>
   246→
   247→          <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />
   248→        </div>
   249→
   250→        <OnlyMobile>
   251→          <TocFAB />
   252→        </OnlyMobile>
   253→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   254→    )
   255→  },
   256→})
   257→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import './Comment.css'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import clsx from 'clsx'
     5→import { atom, useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
     6→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     7→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     8→import {
     9→  createContext,
    10→  memo,
    11→  use,
    12→  useCallback,
    13→  useLayoutEffect,
    14→  useMemo,
    15→  useRef,
    16→} from 'react'
    17→import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    18→
    19→import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
    20→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    21→import { BlockLinkRenderer } from '~/components/ui/markdown/renderers/LinkRenderer'
    22→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    23→import {
    24→  getStrategyIconComponent,
    25→  UserAuthStrategyIcon,
    26→} from '~/components/ui/user/UserAuthStrategyIcon'
    27→import { softSpringPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
    28→import type { AuthSocialProviders } from '~/lib/authjs'
    29→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    30→
    31→import { CommentActionButtonGroup } from './CommentActionButtonGroup'
    32→import { CommentMarkdown } from './CommentMarkdown'
    33→import { CommentPinButton, OcticonGistSecret } from './CommentPinButton'
    34→import {
    35→  CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext,
    36→  useCommentById,
    37→  useCommentByIdSelector,
    38→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRef,
    39→  useCommentReader,
    40→} from './CommentProvider'
    41→
    42→export const Comment: Component<{
    43→  commentId: string
    44→  className?: string
    45→}> = memo(function Comment(props) {
    46→  const { commentId, className } = props
    47→  const comment = useCommentById(commentId)
    48→
    49→  if (!comment) return null
    50→  // FIXME 兜一下后端给的脏数据
    51→  if (typeof comment === 'string') return null
    52→  return <CommentRender comment={comment} className={className} />
    53→})
    54→const CommentRender: Component<{
    55→  comment: CommentModel & { new?: boolean }
    56→}> = (props) => {
    57→  const { comment, className } = props
    58→
    59→  const elAtom = useMemo(() => atom<HTMLDivElement | null>(null), [])
    60→  const isSingleLinkContent = useMemo(() => {
    61→    const trimmedContent = comment.text
    62→    if (!trimmedContent) return false
    63→    const isSingleLine = trimmedContent.split('\n').length === 1
    64→    const isURL = URL.canParse(trimmedContent)
    65→
    66→    return isSingleLine && isURL
    67→  }, [comment.text])
    68→  const reader = useCommentReader(comment.readerId)
    69→
    70→  const {
    71→    id: cid,
    72→
    73→    text,
    74→    key,
    75→    location,
    76→    isWhispers,
    77→    url,
    78→    source,
    79→  } = comment
    80→
    81→  const avatar = reader?.image || comment.avatar
    82→  const author = reader?.name || comment.author
    83→  const parentId =
    84→    typeof comment.parent === 'string' ? comment.parent : comment.parent?.id
    85→
    86→  const authorUrl = useMemo(() => {
    87→    if (url) return url
    88→    if (source === 'github' && reader?.handle) {
    89→      return `https://github.com/${reader.handle}`
    90→    }
    91→    return null
    92→  }, [url, source, reader?.handle])
    93→
    94→  const authorElement = authorUrl ? (
    95→    <a
    96→      href={authorUrl}
    97→      className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all"
    98→      target="_blank"
    99→      rel="noreferrer"
   100→    >
   101→      {author}
   102→    </a>
   103→  ) : (
   104→    <span className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all">{author}</span>
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const CommentNormalContent = (
   108→    <div
   109→      className={clsx(
   110→        'comment__message',
   111→        'relative inline-block rounded-xl text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   112→        'bg-zinc-600/5 dark:bg-zinc-500/20',
   113→        'max-w-[calc(100%-3rem)]',
   114→        'rounded-tl-sm md:rounded-bl-sm md:rounded-tl-xl',
   115→        'ml-4 px-3 py-2 md:ml-0',
   116→        // 'prose-ol:list-inside prose-ul:list-inside',
   117→      )}
   118→    >
   119→      <CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext>
   120→        <CommentMarkdown>{text}</CommentMarkdown>
   121→
   122→        <EditedCommentFooter commentId={comment.id} />
   123→      </CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext>
   124→
   125→      <CommentActionButtonGroup commentId={comment.id} />
   126→    </div>
   127→  )
   128→  return (
   129→    <>
   130→      <CommentHolderContext value={elAtom}>
   131→        <m.li
   132→          initial={
   133→            comment['new']
   134→              ? {
   135→                  opacity: 0,
   136→                  scale: 0.93,
   137→                  y: 20,
   138→                }
   139→              : true
   140→          }
   141→          transition={softSpringPreset}
   142→          animate={{
   143→            opacity: 1,
   144→            y: 0,
   145→            scale: 1,
   146→          }}
   147→          data-comment-id={cid}
   148→          data-reader-id={comment.readerId}
   149→          data-parent-id={parentId}
   150→          className={clsx('relative my-2', className)}
   151→        >
   152→          <div className="group flex w-full items-stretch gap-4">
   153→            <div
   154→              className={clsx(
   155→                'flex shrink-0 self-end md:relative md:w-9',
   156→                'absolute top-2',
   157→              )}
   158→            >
   159→              <Avatar
   160→                shadow={false}
   161→                imageUrl={avatar}
   162→                alt={`${author}'s avatar`}
   163→                className="size-6 select-none rounded-full bg-zinc-200 ring-2 ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-zinc-800 md:size-9"
   164→              />
   165→              {source &&
   166→                !!getStrategyIconComponent(source as AuthSocialProviders) && (
   167→                  <div className="center absolute -right-1.5 bottom-1 flex size-3.5 rounded-full bg-white ring-[1.5px] ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-black">
   168→                    <UserAuthStrategyIcon
   169→                      strategy={source as AuthSocialProviders}
   170→                      className="size-3"
   171→                    />
   172→                  </div>
   173→                )}
   174→            </div>
   175→
   176→            {/* Header */}
   177→            <div
   178→              className={clsx(
   179→                'flex flex-1 flex-col',
   180→                'w-full min-w-0 items-start',
   181→              )}
   182→            >
   183→              <span
   184→                className={clsx(
   185→                  'flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   186→                  'relative w-full min-w-0 justify-center',
   187→                  'mb-2 pl-7 md:pl-0',
   188→                )}
   189→              >
   190→                <span className="ml-2 flex grow flex-col flex-wrap items-start gap-0.5 md:flex-row md:items-center md:gap-2">
   191→                  {authorElement}
   192→                  <span className="-mt-1 flex min-w-0 shrink select-none flex-wrap items-center space-x-2 md:mt-0 md:self-end">
   193→                    <span className="inline-flex shrink-0 text-[0.71rem] font-medium opacity-40">
   194→                      <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
   195→                    </span>
   196→                    <span className="break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-30">
   197→                      {key}
   198→                    </span>
   199→                    {!!location && (
   200→                      <span className="min-w-0 max-w-full truncate break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-35">
   201→                        来自：{location}
   202→                      </span>
   203→                    )}
   204→                    {!!isWhispers && <OcticonGistSecret />}
   205→                  </span>
   206→                </span>
   207→
   208→                <span className="shrink-0">
   209→                  <CommentPinButton comment={comment} />
   210→                </span>
   211→              </span>
   212→
   213→              {/* Content */}
   214→              {isSingleLinkContent ? (
   215→                <div className="relative inline-block">
   216→                  <BlockLinkRenderer
   217→                    href={text}
   218→                    accessory={
   219→                      <CommentActionButtonGroup
   220→                        commentId={comment.id}
   221→                        className="bottom-4"
   222→                      />
   223→                    }
   224→                    fallback={CommentNormalContent}
   225→                  />
   226→                </div>
   227→              ) : (
   228→                CommentNormalContent
   229→              )}
   230→            </div>
   231→          </div>
   232→        </m.li>
   233→
   234→        <CommentBoxHolderProvider />
   235→      </CommentHolderContext>
   236→      {comment.children && comment.children.length > 0 && (
   237→        <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
   238→          {comment.children.map((child) => (
   239→            <Comment key={child.id} commentId={child.id} className="ml-9" />
   240→          ))}
   241→        </ul>
   242→      )}
   243→    </>
   244→  )
   245→}
   246→
   247→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   248→
   249→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   250→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   251→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   252→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   253→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   254→
   255→    return () => {
   256→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   257→    }
   258→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   259→  return <div ref={ref} />
   260→}
   261→
   262→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   263→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   264→
   265→  if (!portalElement) return null
   266→
   267→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   268→}
   269→
   270→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   271→  commentId: string
   272→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   273→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   274→    commentId,
   275→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   276→  )
   277→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   278→
   279→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   280→    if (!ref) return null
   281→    return ref.lastChild
   282→  }, [ref])
   283→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   284→    if (!lastNode) return false
   285→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   286→  }, [lastNode])
   287→
   288→  if (!editedAt) return null
   289→
   290→  const InlineEl = (
   291→    <FloatPopover
   292→      type="tooltip"
   293→      triggerElement={
   294→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   295→      }
   296→    >
   297→      <div>
   298→        <span>编辑于</span>
   299→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   300→      </div>
   301→    </FloatPopover>
   302→  )
   303→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   304→
   305→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   306→}
   307→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/style.css'
     4→
     5→import type {
     6→  LinkCardFetchContext,
     7→  RichEditorVariant,
     8→} from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
     9→import { createThemeStyle, LinkCardFetchProvider } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro'
    10→import { ShiroRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-kit-shiro/renderer'
    11→import clsx from 'clsx'
    12→import type { SerializedEditorState } from 'lexical'
    13→import { useMemo } from 'react'
    14→
    15→import { useIsDark } from '~/hooks/common/use-is-dark'
    16→import { fetchGitHubApi } from '~/lib/github'
    17→
    18→const fallbackSansFont =
    19→  "var(--app-font-sans, system-ui), -apple-system, 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, 'noto sans sc', 'hiragino sans gb', sans-serif, Apple Color Emoji, Segoe UI Emoji, Not Color Emoji"
    20→const fallbackSerifFont =
    21→  "'Noto Serif CJK SC', 'Noto Serif SC', var(--app-font-serif, 'Source Han Serif SC'), 'Source Han Serif SC', 'Source Han Serif', source-han-serif-sc, SongTi SC, SimSum, 'Hiragino Sans GB', system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, 'Microsoft YaHei', 'WenQuanYi Micro Hei', sans-serif"
    22→const fallbackMonoFont =
    23→  "'OperatorMonoSSmLig Nerd Font', 'Cascadia Code PL', 'FantasqueSansMono Nerd Font', 'operator mono', JetBrainsMono, 'Fira code Retina', 'Fira code', Consolas, Monaco, 'Hannotate SC', monospace, -apple-system"
    24→
    25→const linkCardFetchContext: LinkCardFetchContext = {
    26→  adapters: {
    27→    github: {
    28→      request: fetchGitHubApi,
    29→    },
    30→    tmdb: {
    31→      request: (url) => {
    32→        const u = new URL(url)
    33→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/3\//, '')
    34→        return fetch(`/api/tmdb/${path}${u.search}`).then((r) => r.json())
    35→      },
    36→    },
    37→    bangumi: {
    38→      request: (url) => {
    39→        const u = new URL(url)
    40→        const path = u.pathname.replace(/^\/v0\//, '')
    41→        return fetch(`/api/bangumi/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    42→      },
    43→    },
    44→    leetcode: {
    45→      request: (_url, init) => {
    46→        return fetch('/api/leetcode', init).then((r) => r.json())
    47→      },
    48→    },
    49→    'netease-music': {
    50→      request: (url) => {
    51→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    52→        return fetch('/api/music/netease', {
    53→          method: 'POST',
    54→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    55→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    56→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    57→      },
    58→    },
    59→    'qq-music': {
    60→      request: (url) => {
    61→        const songId = new URL(url).pathname.split('/').pop()
    62→        return fetch('/api/music/tencent', {
    63→          method: 'POST',
    64→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    65→          body: JSON.stringify({ songId }),
    66→        }).then((r) => r.json())
    67→      },
    68→    },
    69→    'mx-space': {
    70→      request: (path) => {
    71→        return fetch(`/api/v2/${path}`).then((r) => r.json())
    72→      },
    73→    },
    74→  },
    75→}
    76→
    77→export interface LexicalContentProps {
    78→  content: string
    79→  variant?: RichEditorVariant
    80→  className?: string
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function LexicalContent({
    84→  content,
    85→  variant,
    86→  className,
    87→}: LexicalContentProps) {
    88→  const editorState = useMemo<SerializedEditorState | null>(() => {
    89→    try {
    90→      return JSON.parse(content)
    91→    } catch {
    92→      return null
    93→    }
    94→  }, [content])
    95→
    96→  const isDark = useIsDark()
    97→
    98→  const baseVarStyle = useMemo(
    99→    () =>
   100→      ({
   101→        '--font-sans': fallbackSansFont,
   102→        '--font-serif': fallbackSerifFont,
   103→        '--font-mono': fallbackMonoFont,
   104→      }) as React.CSSProperties,
   105→    [],
   106→  )
   107→
   108→  const editorOverrideStyle = useMemo(
   109→    () =>
   110→      createThemeStyle({
   111→        color: {
   112→          accent: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   113→          link: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   114→          accentLight:
   115→            'color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8)) 20%, transparent)',
   116→          quoteBorder: 'var(--color-accent, var(--color-primary, #33a6b8))',
   117→        },
   118→        layout: { maxWidth: '100%' },
   119→        typography: {
   120→          fontFamily:
   121→            variant === 'note'
   122→              ? `var(--note-font-override, ${fallbackSerifFont})`
   123→              : fallbackSansFont,
   124→          fontFamilySerif: fallbackSerifFont,
   125→          fontMono: fallbackMonoFont,
   126→        },
   127→      }),
   128→    [variant],
   129→  )
   130→
   131→  if (!editorState) return null
   132→
   133→  return (
   134→    <LinkCardFetchProvider value={linkCardFetchContext}>
   135→      <ShiroRenderer
   136→        value={editorState}
   137→        variant={variant}
   138→        theme={isDark ? 'dark' : 'light'}
   139→        className={clsx(className, 'bg-transparent!')}
   140→        style={{ ...baseVarStyle, ...editorOverrideStyle }}
   141→      />
   142→    </LinkCardFetchProvider>
   143→  )
   144→}
   145→
```
</details></tool-use>
