     1→import { useMutation } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import clsx from 'clsx'
     3→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { useCallback, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     8→import { useSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
     9→import { TiltedSendIcon } from '~/components/icons/TiltedSendIcon'
    10→import { AutoResizeHeight } from '~/components/modules/shared/AutoResizeHeight'
    11→import { TextArea } from '~/components/ui/input'
    12→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    13→
    14→import { CommentBoxRootLazy } from '.'
    15→import { CommentBoxHolderPortal } from './Comment'
    16→import { useCommentBoxRefIdValue } from './CommentBox/hooks'
    17→import { CommentIsReplyProvider } from './CommentBox/providers'
    18→import { useCommentByIdSelector, useUpdateComment } from './CommentProvider'
    19→
    20→export const CommentActionButtonGroup: FC<{
    21→  commentId: string
    22→  className?: string
    23→}> = ({ commentId, className }) => {
    24→  const [replyFormOpen, setReplyFormOpen] = useState(false)
    25→  const [editFormOpen, setEditFormOpen] = useState(false)
    26→  const originalRefId = useCommentBoxRefIdValue()
    27→  const onReplyCompleted = useCallback(() => {
    28→    setReplyFormOpen(false)
    29→  }, [])
    30→
    31→  const isOwner = useIsOwnerLogged()
    32→  const readerId = useCommentByIdSelector(
    33→    commentId,
    34→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.readerId, []),
    35→  )
    36→  const readerSession = useSessionReader()
    37→  const canEdit = isOwner || (readerId && readerId === readerSession?.id)
    38→  const isButtonGroup = canEdit
    39→  return (
    40→    <div className="absolute bottom-0 right-0 flex min-h-0 translate-x-2/3 translate-y-1/4 items-center">
    41→      {canEdit && (
    42→        <button
    43→          aria-label="编辑"
    44→          className={clsx(
    45→            'text-xs',
    46→            'aspect-square',
    47→            !isButtonGroup ? 'rounded-full' : 'rounded-l-full border-r-0',
    48→            'center box-content flex size-6 p-[2px]',
    49→            'border border-slate-200 bg-zinc-100 dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-zinc-800',
    50→            'invisible cursor-pointer opacity-0',
    51→            'group-[:hover]:visible group-[:hover]:opacity-70',
    52→            className,
    53→          )}
    54→          onClick={() => {
    55→            setReplyFormOpen(false)
    56→            setEditFormOpen((s) => !s)
    57→          }}
    58→        >
    59→          <i className="i-mingcute-edit-2-line" />
    60→        </button>
    61→      )}
    62→      {isButtonGroup && (
    63→        <div className="pointer-events-none hidden h-full w-px shrink-0 select-none border-l border-base-content/10 text-transparent group-hover:inline-block">
    64→          {'1'}
    65→        </div>
    66→      )}
    67→      <button
    68→        aria-label="回复"
    69→        className={clsx(
    70→          'text-xs',
    71→          'aspect-square',
    72→          !isButtonGroup ? 'rounded-full' : 'rounded-r-full border-l-0',
    73→          'center box-content flex size-6 p-[2px]',
    74→          'border border-slate-200 bg-zinc-100 dark:border-neutral-700 dark:bg-zinc-800',
    75→          'invisible cursor-pointer opacity-0',
    76→          'group-[:hover]:visible group-[:hover]:opacity-70',
    77→          className,
    78→        )}
    79→        onClick={() => {
    80→          setEditFormOpen(false)
    81→          setReplyFormOpen((o) => !o)
    82→        }}
    83→      >
    84→        <i className="i-mingcute-comment-line" />
    85→      </button>
    86→      <CommentBoxHolderPortal>
    87→        <CommentIsReplyProvider
    88→          isReply
    89→          originalRefId={originalRefId}
    90→          onCompleted={onReplyCompleted}
    91→        >
    92→          <AutoResizeHeight duration={0.2}>
    93→            {replyFormOpen && (
    94→              <div className="py-6">
    95→                <CommentBoxRootLazy refId={commentId} />
    96→              </div>
    97→            )}
    98→          </AutoResizeHeight>
    99→        </CommentIsReplyProvider>
   100→      </CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   101→
   102→      <CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   103→        <AutoResizeHeight duration={0.2}>
   104→          {editFormOpen && (
   105→            <EditCommentForm
   106→              commentId={commentId}
   107→              onCompleted={() => {
   108→                setEditFormOpen(false)
   109→              }}
   110→            />
   111→          )}
   112→        </AutoResizeHeight>
   113→      </CommentBoxHolderPortal>
   114→    </div>
   115→  )
   116→}
   117→
   118→const EditCommentForm: FC<{
   119→  commentId: string
   120→  onCompleted: () => void
   121→}> = ({ commentId, onCompleted }) => {
   122→  const commentText = useCommentByIdSelector(
   123→    commentId,
   124→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.text, []),
   125→  )
   126→  const { mutateAsync: updateComment, isPending } = useMutation({
   127→    mutationFn: (text: string) => {
   128→      return apiClient.comment.proxy.edit(commentId).patch({
   129→        data: {
   130→          text,
   131→        },
   132→      })
   133→    },
   134→  })
   135→  const textAreaRef = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)
   136→  const updateCommentUI = useUpdateComment()
   137→  return (
   138→    <div className="px-2 py-6">
   139→      <div className="mb-2 pl-2 text-sm">你正在编辑评论：</div>
   140→      <div className="relative">
   141→        <TextArea
   142→          ref={textAreaRef}
   143→          defaultValue={commentText}
   144→          wrapperClassName="bg-zinc-200/50 dark:bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-xl h-[150px]"
   145→        />
   146→        <div className="absolute bottom-2 right-4 flex items-center gap-2">
   147→          <m.button
   148→            whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   149→            whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   150→            type="button"
   151→            className="flex items-center gap-1"
   152→            onClick={() => {
   153→              onCompleted()
   154→            }}
   155→          >
   156→            <i className="i-mingcute-close-line" />
   157→            <span className="text-sm">取消</span>
   158→          </m.button>
   159→          <SaveButton
   160→            isPending={isPending}
   161→            onClickSave={() => {
   162→              const text = textAreaRef.current?.value
   163→              if (!text) {
   164→                return
   165→              }
   166→              updateComment(text).then(() => {
   167→                onCompleted()
   168→                updateCommentUI({
   169→                  id: commentId,
   170→                  text,
   171→                })
   172→              })
   173→            }}
   174→          />
   175→        </div>
   176→      </div>
   177→    </div>
   178→  )
   179→}
   180→
   181→const SaveButton: FC<{
   182→  isPending: boolean
   183→  onClickSave: () => void
   184→}> = ({ isPending, onClickSave }) => {
   185→  return (
   186→    <m.button
   187→      className="flex appearance-none items-center space-x-1 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50"
   188→      whileHover={{ scale: 1.05 }}
   189→      whileTap={{ scale: 0.95 }}
   190→      type="button"
   191→      disabled={isPending}
   192→      onClick={onClickSave}
   193→    >
   194→      {isPending ? (
   195→        <i className="loading loading-spinner loading-sm size-4" />
   196→      ) : (
   197→        <TiltedSendIcon />
   198→      )}
   199→      <m.span className="text-sm" layout="size">
   200→        {isPending ? '' : '保存'}
   201→      </m.span>
   202→    </m.button>
   203→  )
   204→}
   205→
```

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-27 14:27:36Z)**_

Perfect! Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive report:

---

## Comprehensive Comment System Investigation for Shiroi

### 1. CommentModel Types & Structure

**Location**: The `CommentModel` type comes from `@mx-space/api-client` (external dependency).

**Key Fields** (from code usage):
- `id`: Comment unique identifier
- `text`: Comment content
- `author`: Commenter name
- `mail`: Commenter email
- `avatar`: Avatar URL (for anonymous)
- `url`: Commenter website/profile URL
- `source`: Authentication provider (e.g., 'github')
- `key`: Browser fingerprint/identifier
- `location`: Geographic location
- `isWhispers`: Whisper mode flag (visible only to owner)
- `readerId`: ID of authenticated reader
- `parent`: Parent comment reference (for replies)
- `children`: Array of child comments (replies)
- `created`: Creation timestamp
- `modified`: Modification timestamp
- `editedAt`: Edit timestamp
- `pin`: Pin status flag
- `ref`: Reference ID (post/note ID)

**Current State**: No `anchor` field exists in the current `CommentModel`. The anchor functionality is available in the Lexical editor's comment-anchor utility (`packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`) but is NOT currently integrated into the API comment model.

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`

---

### 2. Comment Creation Flow

#### 2.1 Entry Point: CommentBoxRoot
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`

- Routes between legacy form and auth-based input based on `CommentBoxMode`
- Wraps content in `CommentBoxProvider` which manages:
  - `text` (Jotai atom)
  - `author`, `mail`, `url` (persisted to localStorage via `atomWithStorage`)
  - `avatar`, `source` (session-based)
  - `isWhisper`, `syncToRecently` (settings)

#### 2.2 Comment Submission: useSendComment Hook
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx` (lines 109-296)

**Data Constructed**:
```typescript
const commentDto: CommentDto = { 
  text,      // Required
  author,    // Optional
  mail,      // Optional
  avatar,    // Optional (omitted if owner logged in)
  source,    // Optional
  url        // Optional
}
```

**API Endpoints Called**:

1. **Normal Comment (Owner)**:
   ```typescript
   apiClient.comment.proxy.owner.comment(refId).post({
     data: { text, source }
   })
   ```

2. **Normal Comment (Anonymous)**:
   ```typescript
   apiClient.comment.comment(refId, commentDto)
   ```

3. **Reply Comment (Owner)**:
   ```typescript
   apiClient.comment.proxy.owner.reply(refId).post({
     data: { text, source }
   })
   ```

4. **Reply Comment (Anonymous)**:
   ```typescript
   apiClient.comment.reply(refId, commentDto)
   ```

**Post-Submit Behavior**:
- Clears text field
- Shows toast notification
- Updates React Query cache (adds to first page or as child comment)
- Optionally syncs to "recently" (碎碎念) if owner checked "sync to thinking"

#### 2.3 Comment States & Providers
**Files**:
- `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`
- Contains `CommentBoxContext` (input state) and lifecycle context
- Contains `CommentIsReplyProvider` (for reply chains)

---

### 3. Comment Display Flow

#### 3.1 Comments List
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx`

- Wraps everything in `CommentProvider` (manages comment tree state)
- Renders `Comment` component for each comment in the list
- Handles real-time updates via WebSocket (`BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE`, `COMMENT_UPDATE`)
- Supports infinite scroll with `LoadMoreIndicator`

#### 3.2 Individual Comment Rendering
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`

**Rendered Fields**:
- Avatar with provider badge icon
- Author name (links to profile if URL available)
- Timestamp (relative time)
- Location (if available)
- Whisper badge (if `isWhispers` true)
- Text content (markdown via `CommentMarkdown`)
- Edit indicator (if `editedAt` exists)
- Action buttons (edit/reply for owner or session reader)
- Child comments (recursively rendered)

**Key Implementation Details**:
- Uses Jotai atoms to store comments in a flat map for efficient lookup
- `useCommentById()` and `useCommentByIdSelector()` for accessing comments
- Action buttons portal system for edit/reply forms
- Comment holder context for positioning reply forms

#### 3.3 Comment Provider Context
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx` (lines 41-115)

- Fetches comments via `useCommentsQuery(refId)`
- Builds a flat map of comments indexed by ID in Jotai atom
- Maintains reader map for quick lookup of commenter info
- Supports infinite pagination

---

### 4. Post/Note Detail Pages Layout

#### 4.1 Post Detail Page
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`

**Structure**:
```
<TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
  <CurrentPostDataProvider>
    <BottomToUpTransitionView>
      <RoomProvider>
        <PostPage>
          <WrappedElementProvider>
            <article>
              <PostContent />
            </article>
          </WrappedElementProvider>
          <PostActionAside />
        </PostPage>
      </RoomProvider>
      <CommentAreaRootLazy />  ← Comments section
    </BottomToUpTransitionView>
  </CurrentPostDataProvider>
</TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
```

#### 4.2 Note Detail Page
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/app/[locale]/notes/[id]/page.tsx`

**Structure**:
```
<TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
  <CurrentNoteDataProvider>
    <WrappedElementProvider>
      <NoteContent />        ← Content
    </WrappedElementProvider>
  </CurrentNoteDataProvider>
  <CommentAreaRootLazy />    ← Comments section
</TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
```

**Key**: Comments are siblings to content, rendered below via lazy-loading.

---

### 5. LexicalContent Rendering

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/LexicalContent.tsx`

- Parses serialized Lexical editor state from JSON
- Wraps in `LinkCardFetchProvider` for link card rendering
- Uses `ShiroRenderer` from `@haklex/rich-kit-shiro`
- Configures theme colors and typography
- Creates theming via `createThemeStyle()` with CSS variables

**MainLexicalContent** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/ui/rich-content/MainLexicalContent.tsx`):
- Wraps `LexicalContent` in a div with ID `MAIN_CONTENT_ID`
- Sets reference for reading/TOC tracking
- Dispatches custom event to refresh TOC on content change

---

### 6. Comment Anchor System (Not Yet Integrated)

**Location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`

**Types**:
```typescript
interface BlockAnchor {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
}

interface RangeAnchor {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
  quote: string
  prefix: string
  suffix: string
  startOffset: number
  endOffset: number
}
```

**Functions**:
- `buildBlockAnchor(editor, blockKey?)`: Creates anchor for an entire block
- `buildRangeAnchor(editor)`: Creates anchor for selected text range
- Both return `AnchorResult<T>` with error handling

**Block ID Plugin Integration**: Requires `blockIdState` from `BlockIdPlugin` to track block identifiers.

---

### 7. Comment Query Keys & API Calls

#### 7.1 Query Keys
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/queries/keys/comment.ts`

```typescript
buildCommentsQueryKey(refId) → ['comments', refId]
```

#### 7.2 Query Definition
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/queries/definition/comment.ts`

Admin comment queries (for dashboard):
```typescript
commentAdmin.byState(state) → queryKey: ['comment', 'admin', state]
```

#### 7.3 Fetch Query
**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/hooks.tsx` (lines 1-38)

```typescript
apiClient.comment.getByRefId(refId, { page })
```

Returns paginated result with comment tree structure and reader map.

---

### 8. API Client Proxy Methods

**Comment API endpoints**:
- `apiClient.comment.comment(refId, dto)` - Create comment (anonymous)
- `apiClient.comment.reply(refId, dto)` - Reply to comment (anonymous)
- `apiClient.comment.proxy.edit(commentId).patch()` - Edit comment (owner)
- `apiClient.comment.proxy.owner.comment(refId)` - Create comment (owner)
- `apiClient.comment.proxy.owner.reply(refId)` - Reply (owner)
- `apiClient.comment.proxy(commentId).patch()` - Update comment state
- `apiClient.comment.proxy(commentId).delete()` - Delete comment
- `apiClient.proxy.comments.get()` - Get comments with state filter (admin)
- `apiClient.proxy.comments.owner.reply(id).post()` - Owner reply

---

### 9. All Comment Component Files

1. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentRoot.tsx` - Entry component
2. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentRootLazy.tsx` - Lazy wrapper
3. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx` - Comment list
4. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx` - Individual comment
5. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentProvider.tsx` - State management
6. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentMarkdown.tsx` - Content renderer
7. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentActionButtonGroup.tsx` - Edit/Reply buttons
8. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentPinButton.tsx` - Pin toggle
9. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts` - Type definitions
10. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`
11. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/AuthedInput.tsx`
12. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx`
13. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`
14. `<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/ActionBar.tsx`
15. Plus 9 more utility files

---

### Key Findings for Implementation

1. **No anchor field yet**: You'll need to extend `CommentModel` (or create a wrapper) to include anchor data

2. **Two-stage creation**: Comments can be created via:
   - Anonymous form (requires all personal fields)
   - Owner/logged-in form (simpler, just text + source)

3. **State shape**: Comment state is a flat map indexed by ID, with children arrays for threading

4. **Content positioning**: `LexicalContent` is wrapped in `MainLexicalContent` which sets `MAIN_CONTENT_ID` and tracks reference. This is the target for range selection

5. **Real-time updates**: WebSocket events via `BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE` and `COMMENT_UPDATE` can be leveraged for anchor notifications

6. **Query architecture**: Comments use infinite query with pagination, easy to cache/refetch

7. **Edit flow**: Existing edit mutation can be extended to support anchor data alongside text

Now I have all the information I need. Let me create a comprehensive summary:

## Summary: Comment Anchor Data Flow Through the API

Based on my investigation, here's how the comment anchor data flows through the API:

### 1. **mx-core Comment Controller** (`<GIT_DIR>/mx-core/apps/core/src/modules/comment/comment.controller.ts`)

- **Line 200**: The `comment()` POST endpoint receives a `CommentDto` body that OMITS anchor (see schema definition below)
- **Line 223**: The body is merged with IP location data: `const model: Partial<CommentModel> = { ...body, ...ipLocation }`
- The anchor field is NOT passed through the standard `CommentDto` - it's stripped out before the DTO validation

### 2. **mx-core Comment Schema** (`<GIT_DIR>/mx-core/apps/core/src/modules/comment/comment.schema.ts`)

The schema defines TWO anchor modes with full validation:

**Lines 9-15: BlockCommentAnchorSchema**
```typescript
const BlockCommentAnchorSchema = z.object({
  mode: z.literal(CommentAnchorMode.Block),
  blockId: z.string().trim().min(1).max(128),
  blockType: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
  blockFingerprint: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
  snapshotText: z.string().max(20000).optional(),
})
```

**Lines 17-33: RangeCommentAnchorSchema**
```typescript
const RangeCommentAnchorSchema = z.object({
  mode: z.literal(CommentAnchorMode.Range),
  blockId: z.string().trim().min(1).max(128),
  blockType: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
  blockFingerprint: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
  snapshotText: z.string().max(20000).optional(),
  quote: z.string().min(1).max(1000),
  prefix: z.string().max(300).default(''),
  suffix: z.string().max(300).default(''),
  startOffset: z.number().int().min(0),
  endOffset: z.number().int().min(0),
})
```

**Lines 43-65: Full CommentSchema with anchor**
```typescript
export const CommentSchema = z.object({
  author: z.string().min(1).max(20),
  text: z.string().min(1).max(500),
  mail: z.string().email().max(50),
  url: z.string().url().max(50).optional(),
  isWhispers: z.boolean().optional(),
  source: z.string().optional(),
  avatar: z.string().url().refine(...).optional(),
  anchor: CommentAnchorSchema.optional(),  // ← ANCHOR IS HERE
})
```

**Line 67: CommentDto OMITS anchor**
```typescript
export class CommentDto extends createZodDto(CommentSchema.omit({ anchor: true })) {}
```

### 3. **mx-core Comment Model** (`<GIT_DIR>/mx-core/apps/core/src/modules/comment/comment.model.ts`)

**Lines 26-65: CommentAnchorModel class**
```typescript
export class CommentAnchorModel {
  @prop({ required: true, enum: CommentAnchorMode, type: String })
  mode: CommentAnchorMode
  @prop({ required: true, trim: true })
  blockId: string
  @prop({ trim: true })
  blockType?: string
  @prop({ trim: true })
  blockFingerprint?: string
  @prop()
  snapshotText?: string
  @prop()
  quote?: string
  @prop()
  prefix?: string
  @prop()
  suffix?: string
  @prop()
  startOffset?: number
  @prop()
  endOffset?: number
  @prop()
  contentHashAtCreate?: string
  @prop()
  contentHashCurrent?: string
  @prop()
  lastResolvedAt?: Date
}
```

**Lines 179-180: CommentModel stores anchor**
```typescript
@prop({ type: () => CommentAnchorModel, _id: false })
anchor?: CommentAnchorModel
```

### 4. **@mx-space/api-client Types** (`<REPO_ROOT>/node_modules/.pnpm/@mx-space+api-client@2.1.1/`)

**CommentDto interface (does NOT include anchor)**:
```typescript
interface CommentDto {
  author: string;
  text: string;
  mail: string;
  url?: string;
  source?: 'github' | 'google';
  avatar?: string;
}
```

**CommentModel interface (does NOT include anchor)**:
```typescript
interface CommentModel extends BaseModel {
  refType: CollectionRefTypes;
  ref: string;
  state: number;
  commentsIndex: number;
  author: string;
  text: string;
  mail?: string;
  url?: string;
  ip?: string;
  agent?: string;
  key: string;
  pin?: boolean;
  avatar: string;
  parent?: CommentModel | string;
  children: CommentModel[];
  isWhispers?: boolean;
  location?: string;
  source?: string;
  readerId?: string;
  editedAt?: string;
}
```

### 5. **Shiroi Web App Comment Creation** (`<REPO_ROOT>/apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx`)

**Lines 109-296: useSendComment() hook**

Currently the web app creates comments WITHOUT anchor support:

```typescript
const commentDto: CommentDto = { text, author, mail, avatar, source, url }
```

The code DOES NOT pass anchor data to the API.

### 6. **Shiroi Comment Anchor Utils** (`<REPO_ROOT>/packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`)

The infrastructure exists to BUILD anchors:

```typescript
export interface BlockAnchor {
  mode: 'block'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
}

export interface RangeAnchor {
  mode: 'range'
  blockId: string
  blockType: string
  blockFingerprint: string
  snapshotText: string
  quote: string
  prefix: string
  suffix: string
  startOffset: number
  endOffset: number
}

export function buildBlockAnchor(editor: LexicalEditor, blockKey?: string): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor>
export function buildRangeAnchor(editor: LexicalEditor): AnchorResult<RangeAnchor>
```

### KEY FINDINGS:

1. **Backend accepts anchor**: mx-core has full anchor support in CommentSchema (optional), CommentAnchorModel, and stores it in CommentModel.anchor

2. **API client doesn't expose anchor**: The @mx-space/api-client TypeScript types for CommentDto and CommentModel don't include anchor field

3. **Web app doesn't send anchor**: The Shiroi web app currently doesn't pass anchor when creating comments

4. **Frontend can build anchors**: The rich-editor package has full utilities to build BlockAnchor or RangeAnchor from Lexical editor state

### TO PASS ANCHOR DATA:

You need to:
1. Update CommentDto type in @mx-space/api-client to include optional `anchor` field matching `CommentAnchorInput` type from mx-core
2. Modify the web app's `useSendComment()` hook to build and include anchor data:
```typescript
import { buildRangeAnchor, buildBlockAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

const anchor = buildRangeAnchor(editor) // or buildBlockAnchor
if (anchor.ok) {
  commentDto.anchor = anchor.anchor
}
```
3. Pass the anchor in the POST data: `apiClient.comment.comment(refId, commentDto)`

   137→      const text = jotaiStore.get(textAtom)
   138→      const author = jotaiStore.get(authorAtom)
   139→      const mail = jotaiStore.get(mailAtom)
   140→      const avatar = jotaiStore.get(avatarAtom)
   141→      const source = jotaiStore.get(sourceAtom) as any
   142→      const url = jotaiStore.get(urlAtom)
   143→
   144→      const commentDto: CommentDto = { text, author, mail, avatar, source, url }
   145→
   146→      if (isLogged) {
   147→        delete commentDto.avatar
   148→      }
   149→
   150→      // Omit empty string key
   151→      Object.keys(commentDto).forEach((key) => {
   152→        // @ts-expect-error
   153→        if (commentDto[key] === '') delete commentDto[key]
   154→      })
   155→
   156→      // Reply Comment
   157→      if (isReply) {
   158→        if (isLogged) {
   159→          return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   160→            .reply(refId)
   161→            .post<CommentModel>({
   162→              data: {
   163→                text,
   164→                source,
   165→              },
   166→            })
   167→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   168→        } else {
   169→          return apiClient.comment
   170→            .reply(refId, commentDto)
   171→            .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   172→        }
   173→      }
   174→
   175→      // Normal Comment
   176→      const isWhisper = jotaiStore.get(isWhisperAtom)
   177→      const syncToRecently = jotaiStore.get(syncToRecentlyAtom)
   178→
   179→      if (isLogged) {
   180→        return apiClient.comment.proxy.owner
   181→          .comment(refId)
   182→          .post<CommentModel>({
   183→            data: { text, source },
   184→          })
   185→          .then(async (res) => {
   186→            if (syncToRecently)
   187→              apiClient.recently.proxy
   188→                .post({
   189→                  data: {
   190→                    content: text,
   191→                    ref: refId,
   192→                  },
   193→                })
   194→                .then(() => {
   195→                  toast.success('已同步到碎碎念')
   196→                })
   197→
   198→            return res
   199→          })
   200→          .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   201→      }
   202→      // @ts-ignore
   203→      commentDto.isWhispers = isWhisper
   204→      return apiClient.comment
   205→        .comment(refId, commentDto)
   206→        .then(wrappedCompletedCallback)
   207→    },
   208→    mutationKey: [commentRefId, 'comment'],
   209→    onError(error: RequestError) {
   210→      toast.error(getErrorMessageFromRequestError(error))
   211→    },
   212→    onSuccess(data) {
   213→      afterSubmit?.()
   214→
   215→      const toastCopy = isLogged
   216→        ? '发表成功啦~'
   217→        : isReply
   218→          ? '感谢你的回复！'
   219→          : '感谢你的评论！'
   220→
   221→      const commentListQueryKey = buildCommentsQueryKey(originalRefId)
   222→
   223→      toast.success(toastCopy)
   224→      jotaiStore.set(textAtom, '')
   225→
   226→      queryClient.setQueryData<
   227→        InfiniteData<
   228→          PaginateResult<
   229→            CommentModel & {
   230→              ref: string
   231→            }
   232→          >
   233→        >
   234→      >(commentListQueryKey, (oldData) => {
   235→        if (!oldData) return oldData
   236→        if (isReply) {
   237→          // find the reply refed comment
   238→
   239→          return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   240→            const dfs = (
   241→              data: CommentModel,
   242→              commentRefId: string,
   243→              newData: CommentModel & { new?: boolean },
   244→            ) => {
   245→              if (data.id === commentRefId) {
   246→                if (!data.children) {
   247→                  data.children = []
   248→                }
   249→                ;(data.children as (CommentModel & { new: boolean })[]).push({
   250→                  ...newData,
   251→                  new: true,
   252→                })
   253→                return true
   254→              }
   255→              if (!data.children) {
   256→                return
   257→              }
   258→              for (const child of data.children) {
   259→                if (dfs(child, commentRefId, newData)) {
   260→                  return true
   261→                }
   262→              }
   263→              return false
   264→            }
   265→
   266→            const dataToAdd = {
   267→              ...data,
   268→              new: true,
   269→            }
   270→
   271→            for (const page of draft.pages) {
   272→              for (const item of page.data) {
   273→                if (dfs(item, commentRefId, dataToAdd)) {
   274→                  break
   275→                }
   276→              }
   277→            }
   278→          })
   279→        }
   280→
   281→        return produce(oldData, (draft) => {
   282→          draft.pages[0].data.unshift({
   283→            ...data,
   284→            // @ts-ignore
   285→            new: true,
   286→          })
   287→        })
   288→      })
   289→    },
   290→  })
   291→
   292→  return [
   293→    useCallback(() => mutate(commentRefId), [commentRefId, mutate]),
   294→    isPending,
   295→  ] as const
   296→}
   297→
```
</details></tool-use>

    41→
    42→export const Comment: Component<{

    44→  className?: string
    45→}> = memo(function Comment(props) {

    47→  const comment = useCommentById(commentId)
    48→
    49→  if (!comment) return null
    50→  // FIXME 兜一下后端给的脏数据
    51→  if (typeof comment === 'string') return null
    52→  return <CommentRender comment={comment} className={className} />
    53→})
    54→const CommentRender: Component<{
    55→  comment: CommentModel & { new?: boolean }
    56→}> = (props) => {
    57→  const { comment, className } = props
    58→
    59→  const elAtom = useMemo(() => atom<HTMLDivElement | null>(null), [])
    60→  const isSingleLinkContent = useMemo(() => {
    61→    const trimmedContent = comment.text
    62→    if (!trimmedContent) return false
    63→    const isSingleLine = trimmedContent.split('\n').length === 1
    64→    const isURL = URL.canParse(trimmedContent)
    65→
    66→    return isSingleLine && isURL
    67→  }, [comment.text])
    68→  const reader = useCommentReader(comment.readerId)
    69→
    70→  const {

    72→
    73→    text,

    76→    isWhispers,
    77→    url,
    78→    source,
    79→  } = comment
    80→
    81→  const avatar = reader?.image || comment.avatar
    82→  const author = reader?.name || comment.author
    83→  const parentId =
    84→    typeof comment.parent === 'string' ? comment.parent : comment.parent?.id
    85→
    86→  const authorUrl = useMemo(() => {
    87→    if (url) return url
    88→    if (source === 'github' && reader?.handle) {

    90→    }
    91→    return null
    92→  }, [url, source, reader?.handle])
    93→
    94→  const authorElement = authorUrl ? (
    95→    <a
    96→      href={authorUrl}
    97→      className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all"
    98→      target="_blank"
    99→      rel="noreferrer"
   100→    >
   101→      {author}
   102→    </a>
   103→  ) : (
   104→    <span className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all">{author}</span>
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const CommentNormalContent = (

   109→      className={clsx(
   110→        'comment__message',
   111→        'relative inline-block rounded-xl text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   112→        'bg-zinc-600/5 dark:bg-zinc-500/20',

   124→
   125→      <CommentActionButtonGroup commentId={comment.id} />

   127→  )

   130→      <CommentHolderContext value={elAtom}>
   131→        <m.li
   132→          initial={

   134→              ? {
   135→                  opacity: 0,
   136→                  scale: 0.93,
   137→                  y: 20,
   138→                }
   139→              : true
   140→          }
   141→          transition={softSpringPreset}
   142→          animate={{
   143→            opacity: 1,
   144→            y: 0,
   145→            scale: 1,
   146→          }}
   147→          data-comment-id={cid}
   148→          data-reader-id={comment.readerId}
   149→          data-parent-id={parentId}
   150→          className={clsx('relative my-2', className)}
   151→        >
   152→          <div className="group flex w-full items-stretch gap-4">
   153→            <div
   154→              className={clsx(
   155→                'flex shrink-0 self-end md:relative md:w-9',
   156→                'absolute top-2',
   157→              )}
   158→            >
   159→              <Avatar
   160→                shadow={false}
   161→                imageUrl={avatar}
   162→                alt={`${author}'s avatar`}
   163→                className="size-6 select-none rounded-full bg-zinc-200 ring-2 ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-zinc-800 md:size-9"
   164→              />
   165→              {source &&
   166→                !!getStrategyIconComponent(source as AuthSocialProviders) && (
   167→                  <div className="center absolute -right-1.5 bottom-1 flex size-3.5 rounded-full bg-white ring-[1.5px] ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-black">
   168→                    <UserAuthStrategyIcon
   169→                      strategy={source as AuthSocialProviders}
   170→                      className="size-3"
   171→                    />
   172→                  </div>
   173→                )}
   174→            </div>
   175→
   176→            {/* Header */}
   177→            <div
   178→              className={clsx(
   179→                'flex flex-1 flex-col',
   180→                'w-full min-w-0 items-start',
   181→              )}
   182→            >
   183→              <span
   184→                className={clsx(
   185→                  'flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   186→                  'relative w-full min-w-0 justify-center',
   187→                  'mb-2 pl-7 md:pl-0',
   188→                )}
   189→              >

   191→                  {authorElement}
   192→                  <span className="-mt-1 flex min-w-0 shrink select-none flex-wrap items-center space-x-2 md:mt-0 md:self-end">
   193→                    <span className="inline-flex shrink-0 text-[0.71rem] font-medium opacity-40">
   194→                      <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
   195→                    </span>
   196→                    <span className="break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-30">
   197→                      {key}
   198→                    </span>
   199→                    {!!location && (

   201→                        来自：{location}
   202→                      </span>
   203→                    )}
   204→                    {!!isWhispers && <OcticonGistSecret />}
   205→                  </span>
   206→                </span>
   207→
   208→                <span className="shrink-0">
   209→                  <CommentPinButton comment={comment} />
   210→                </span>
   211→              </span>
   212→
   213→              {/* Content */}
   214→              {isSingleLinkContent ? (
   215→                <div className="relative inline-block">
   216→                  <BlockLinkRenderer
   217→                    href={text}
   218→                    accessory={
   219→                      <CommentActionButtonGroup
   220→                        commentId={comment.id}
   221→                        className="bottom-4"
   222→                      />
   223→                    }
   224→                    fallback={CommentNormalContent}
   225→                  />
   226→                </div>
   227→              ) : (
   228→                CommentNormalContent
   229→              )}
   230→            </div>
   231→          </div>
   232→        </m.li>
   233→
   234→        <CommentBoxHolderProvider />
   235→      </CommentHolderContext>
   236→      {comment.children && comment.children.length > 0 && (
   237→        <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
   238→          {comment.children.map((child) => (
   239→            <Comment key={child.id} commentId={child.id} className="ml-9" />
   240→          ))}
   241→        </ul>
   242→      )}
   243→    </>
   244→  )
   245→}
   246→
   247→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   248→
   249→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   250→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   251→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   252→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   253→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   254→
   255→    return () => {
   256→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   257→    }
   258→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   259→  return <div ref={ref} />
   260→}
   261→
   262→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   263→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   264→
   265→  if (!portalElement) return null
   266→
   267→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   268→}
   269→
   270→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   271→  commentId: string
   272→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   273→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   274→    commentId,
   275→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   276→  )
   277→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   278→
   279→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   280→    if (!ref) return null
   281→    return ref.lastChild
   282→  }, [ref])
   283→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   284→    if (!lastNode) return false
   285→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   286→  }, [lastNode])
   287→
   288→  if (!editedAt) return null
   289→
   290→  const InlineEl = (
   291→    <FloatPopover
   292→      type="tooltip"
   293→      triggerElement={
   294→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   295→      }
   296→    >
   297→      <div>
   298→        <span>编辑于</span>
   299→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   300→      </div>
   301→    </FloatPopover>
   302→  )
   303→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   304→
   305→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   306→}
   307→
```
</details></tool-use>

    16→
    17→import { ApiController } from '~/common/decorators/api-controller.decorator'
    18→import { Auth } from '~/common/decorators/auth.decorator'
    19→import { CurrentReaderId } from '~/common/decorators/current-user.decorator'
    20→import { HTTPDecorators } from '~/common/decorators/http.decorator'

    24→import { BizException } from '~/common/exceptions/biz.exception'
    25→import { CannotFindException } from '~/common/exceptions/cant-find.exception'
    26→import { NoContentCanBeModifiedException } from '~/common/exceptions/no-content-canbe-modified.exception'
    27→import { BusinessEvents, EventScope } from '~/constants/business-event.constant'
    28→import { ErrorCodeEnum } from '~/constants/error-code.constant'
    29→import { EventManagerService } from '~/processors/helper/helper.event.service'
    30→import { MongoIdDto } from '~/shared/dto/id.dto'
    31→import { PagerDto } from '~/shared/dto/pager.dto'
    32→import { transformDataToPaginate } from '~/transformers/paginate.transformer'
    33→import { scheduleManager } from '~/utils/schedule.util'
    34→
    35→import { ConfigsService } from '../configs/configs.service'
    36→import { OwnerService } from '../owner/owner.service'
    37→import { ReaderService } from '../reader/reader.service'
    38→import { CommentReplyMailType } from './comment.enum'
    39→import { CommentFilterEmailInterceptor } from './comment.interceptor'
    40→import type { CommentModel } from './comment.model'
    41→import { CommentState } from './comment.model'
    42→import {
    43→  BatchCommentDeleteDto,
    44→  BatchCommentStateDto,
    45→  CommentDto,
    46→  CommentRefTypesDto,
    47→  CommentStatePatchDto,
    48→  EditCommentDto,
    49→  TextOnlyDto,
    50→} from './comment.schema'
    51→import { CommentService } from './comment.service'
    52→
    53→const idempotenceMessage = '哦吼，这句话你已经说过啦'
    54→const NESTED_REPLY_MAX = 10
    55→@ApiController({ path: 'comments' })
    56→@UseInterceptors(CommentFilterEmailInterceptor)
    57→export class CommentController {
    58→  constructor(
    59→    private readonly commentService: CommentService,
    60→    private readonly eventManager: EventManagerService,
    61→    private readonly configsService: ConfigsService,
    62→    private readonly ownerService: OwnerService,
    63→    @Inject(forwardRef(() => ReaderService))
    64→    private readonly readerService: ReaderService,
    65→  ) {}
    66→
    67→  @Get('/')
    68→  @Auth()
    69→  async getRecentlyComments(@Query() query: PagerDto) {
    70→    const { size = 10, page = 1, state = 0 } = query
    71→
    72→    const comments = await this.commentService.getComments({
    73→      size,
    74→      page,
    75→      state,
    76→    })
    77→    const readers = await this.readerService.findReaderInIds(
    78→      comments.docs.map((doc) => doc.readerId).filter(Boolean) as string[],
    79→    )
    80→
    81→    const res = transformDataToPaginate(comments)
    82→    Object.assign(res, {
    83→      readers: keyBy(readers, 'id'),
    84→    })
    85→    return res
    86→  }
    87→
    88→  @Get('/:id')
    89→  async getComments(
    90→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
    91→    @IsAuthenticated() isAuthenticated: boolean,
    92→  ) {
    93→    const { id } = params
    94→    const data: CommentModel | null = await this.commentService.model
    95→      .findOne({
    96→        _id: id,
    97→      })
    98→      .populate('parent')
    99→      .lean()
   100→
   101→    if (!data) {
   102→      throw new CannotFindException()
   103→    }
   104→    if (data.isWhispers && !isAuthenticated) {
   105→      throw new CannotFindException()
   106→    }
   107→
   108→    await this.commentService.fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl([data])
   109→    if (data.readerId) {
   110→      const reader = await this.readerService.findReaderInIds([data.readerId])
   111→      Object.assign(data, {
   112→        reader: reader[0],
   113→      })
   114→    }
   115→
   116→    return data
   117→  }
   118→
   119→  // 面向 C 端的评论查询接口
   120→  @Get('/ref/:id')
   121→  async getCommentsByRefId(
   122→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   123→    @Query() query: PagerDto,
   124→    @IsAuthenticated() isAuthenticated: boolean,
   125→  ) {
   126→    const { id } = params
   127→    const { page = 1, size = 10 } = query
   128→
   129→    const configs = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   130→    const { commentShouldAudit } = configs
   131→
   132→    const $and: QueryFilter<CommentModel & Document<any, any, any>>[] = [
   133→      {
   134→        parent: undefined,
   135→        ref: id,
   136→      },
   137→      {
   138→        $or: commentShouldAudit
   139→          ? [
   140→              {
   141→                state: CommentState.Read,
   142→              },
   143→            ]
   144→          : [
   145→              {
   146→                state: CommentState.Read,
   147→              },
   148→              { state: CommentState.Unread },
   149→            ],
   150→      },
   151→    ]
   152→
   153→    if (!isAuthenticated) {
   154→      $and.push({
   155→        $or: [
   156→          { isWhispers: false },
   157→          {
   158→            isWhispers: { $exists: false },
   159→          },
   160→        ],
   161→      })
   162→    }
   163→    const comments = await this.commentService.model.paginate(
   164→      {
   165→        $and,
   166→      },
   167→      {
   168→        limit: size,
   169→        page,
   170→        sort: { pin: -1, created: -1 },
   171→        populate: {
   172→          path: 'children',
   173→          maxDepth: NESTED_REPLY_MAX,
   174→        },
   175→      },
   176→    )
   177→
   178→    await this.commentService.fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl(comments.docs)
   179→    this.commentService.cleanDirtyData(comments.docs)
   180→    const result = transformDataToPaginate(comments)
   181→    const readerIds = comments.docs
   182→      .map((comment) => comment.readerId)
   183→      .filter(Boolean) as string[]
   184→    const readers = await this.readerService.findReaderInIds(readerIds)
   185→
   186→    Object.assign(result, {
   187→      readers: keyBy(readers, 'id'),
   188→    })
   189→
   190→    return result
   191→  }
   192→
   193→  @Post('/:id')
   194→  @HTTPDecorators.Idempotence({
   195→    expired: 20,
   196→    errorMessage: idempotenceMessage,
   197→  })
   198→  async comment(
   199→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   200→    @Body() body: CommentDto,
   201→    @IsAuthenticated() isAuthenticated: boolean,
   202→    @IpLocation() ipLocation: IpRecord,
   203→    @Query() query: CommentRefTypesDto,
   204→  ) {
   205→    const { disableComment } = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   206→    if (disableComment) {
   207→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentDisabled)
   208→    }
   209→    if (!isAuthenticated) {
   210→      await this.commentService.validAuthorName(body.author)
   211→    }
   212→
   213→    const { ref } = query
   214→
   215→    const id = params.id
   216→    if (
   217→      !(await this.commentService.allowComment(id, ref)) &&
   218→      !isAuthenticated
   219→    ) {
   220→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentForbidden)
   221→    }
   222→
   223→    const model: Partial<CommentModel> = { ...body, ...ipLocation }
   224→
   225→    const comment = await this.commentService.createComment(id, model, ref)
   226→
   227→    this.commentService.afterCreateComment(
   228→      comment.id,
   229→      ipLocation,
   230→      isAuthenticated,
   231→    )
   232→
   233→    return this.commentService
   234→      .fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl([comment])
   235→      .then((docs) => docs[0])
   236→  }
   237→
   238→  @Post('/reply/:id')
   239→  @HTTPDecorators.Idempotence({
   240→    expired: 20,
   241→    errorMessage: idempotenceMessage,
   242→  })
   243→  async replyByCid(
   244→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   245→    @Body() body: CommentDto,
   246→    @Body('author') author: string,
   247→    @IsAuthenticated() isAuthenticated: boolean,
   248→    @IpLocation() ipLocation: IpRecord,
   249→  ) {
   250→    const { disableComment } = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   251→    if (disableComment) {
   252→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentDisabled)
   253→    }
   254→
   255→    if (!isAuthenticated) {
   256→      await this.commentService.validAuthorName(author)
   257→    }
   258→
   259→    const { id } = params
   260→
   261→    const parent = await this.commentService.model.findById(id).populate('ref')
   262→    if (!parent) {
   263→      throw new CannotFindException()
   264→    }
   265→    const commentIndex = parent.commentsIndex
   266→
   267→    if (parent.key && parent.key.split('#').length >= NESTED_REPLY_MAX) {
   268→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentTooDeep)
   269→    }
   270→
   271→    const key = `${parent.key}#${commentIndex}`
   272→
   273→    const model: Partial<CommentModel> = {
   274→      parent,
   275→      ref: (parent.ref as DocumentType<any>)._id,
   276→      refType: parent.refType,
   277→      ...body,
   278→      ...ipLocation,
   279→      key,
   280→      isWhispers: parent.isWhispers,
   281→      state: isAuthenticated ? CommentState.Read : CommentState.Unread,
   282→    }
   283→
   284→    await this.commentService.assignReaderToComment(model)
   285→
   286→    const comment = await this.commentService.model.create(model)
   287→    const commentId = comment._id.toString()
   288→    scheduleManager.schedule(async () => {
   289→      if (isAuthenticated) {
   290→        return
   291→      }
   292→      await this.commentService.appendIpLocation(commentId, ipLocation.ip)
   293→    })
   294→
   295→    await parent.updateOne({
   296→      $push: {
   297→        children: comment._id,
   298→      },
   299→      $inc: {
   300→        commentsIndex: 1,
   301→      },
   302→      state:
   303→        comment.state === CommentState.Read &&
   304→        parent.state !== CommentState.Read
   305→          ? CommentState.Read
   306→          : parent.state,
   307→    })
   308→    if (isAuthenticated) {
   309→      this.commentService.sendEmail(comment, CommentReplyMailType.Guest)
   310→      this.eventManager.broadcast(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, comment, {
   311→        scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_VISITOR,
   312→      })
   313→    } else {
   314→      const configs = await this.configsService.get('commentOptions')
   315→      const { commentShouldAudit } = configs
   316→
   317→      if (commentShouldAudit) {
   318→        this.eventManager.broadcast(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, comment, {
   319→          scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_ADMIN,
   320→        })
   321→        return
   322→      }
   323→
   324→      this.commentService.sendEmail(comment, CommentReplyMailType.Owner)
   325→      this.eventManager.broadcast(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, comment, {
   326→        scope: EventScope.ALL,
   327→      })
   328→    }
   329→    return this.commentService
   330→      .fillAndReplaceAvatarUrl([comment])
   331→      .then((docs) => docs[0])
   332→  }
   333→
   334→  @Post('/owner/comment/:id')
   335→  @Auth()
   336→  @HTTPDecorators.Idempotence({
   337→    expired: 20,
   338→    errorMessage: idempotenceMessage,
   339→  })
   340→  async commentByOwner(
   341→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   342→    @Body() body: TextOnlyDto,
   343→    @IpLocation() ipLocation: IpRecord,
   344→    @Query() query: CommentRefTypesDto,
   345→  ) {
   346→    const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   347→    const { name, mail, url } = owner
   348→    const model: CommentDto = {
   349→      author: name,
   350→      ...body,
   351→      mail,
   352→      url,
   353→      state: CommentState.Read,
   354→    } as CommentDto
   355→    return await this.comment(params, model as any, true, ipLocation, query)
   356→  }
   357→
   358→  @Post('/owner/reply/:id')
   359→  @Auth()
   360→  @HTTPDecorators.Idempotence({
   361→    expired: 20,
   362→    errorMessage: idempotenceMessage,
   363→  })
   364→  async replyByOwner(
   365→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   366→    @Body() body: TextOnlyDto,
   367→    @IpLocation() ipLocation: IpRecord,
   368→  ) {
   369→    const owner = await this.ownerService.getOwner()
   370→    const { name, mail, url } = owner
   371→    const model: CommentDto = {
   372→      author: name,
   373→      ...body,
   374→      mail,
   375→      url,
   376→      state: CommentState.Read,
   377→    } as CommentDto
   378→    // @ts-ignore
   379→    return await this.replyByCid(params, model, undefined, true, ipLocation)
   380→  }
   381→
   382→  @Patch('/:id')
   383→  @Auth()
   384→  async modifyCommentState(
   385→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   386→    @Body() body: CommentStatePatchDto,
   387→  ) {
   388→    const { id } = params
   389→    const { state, pin } = body
   390→
   391→    const updateResult: Record<string, any> = {}
   392→
   393→    if (!isUndefined(state)) updateResult.state = state
   394→    if (!isUndefined(pin)) updateResult.pin = pin
   395→
   396→    if (pin) {
   397→      const currentRefModel = await this.commentService.model
   398→        .findOne({
   399→          _id: id,
   400→        })
   401→        .lean()
   402→        .populate('ref')
   403→
   404→      const refId = (currentRefModel?.ref as any)?._id
   405→      if (refId) {
   406→        await this.commentService.model.updateMany(
   407→          {
   408→            ref: refId,
   409→          },
   410→          {
   411→            pin: false,
   412→          },
   413→        )
   414→      }
   415→    }
   416→
   417→    try {
   418→      await this.commentService.model.updateOne(
   419→        {
   420→          _id: id,
   421→        },
   422→        updateResult,
   423→      )
   424→
   425→      return
   426→    } catch {
   427→      throw new NoContentCanBeModifiedException()
   428→    }
   429→  }
   430→
   431→  @Delete('/:id')
   432→  @Auth()
   433→  async deleteComment(@Param() params: MongoIdDto) {
   434→    const { id } = params
   435→    await this.commentService.deleteComments(id)
   436→    await this.eventManager.emit(
   437→      BusinessEvents.COMMENT_DELETE,
   438→      { id },
   439→      {
   440→        scope: EventScope.TO_SYSTEM_VISITOR,
   441→        nextTick: true,
   442→      },
   443→    )
   444→    return
   445→  }
   446→
   447→  @Patch('/batch/state')
   448→  @Auth()
   449→  async batchUpdateState(@Body() body: BatchCommentStateDto) {
   450→    const { ids, all, state, currentState } = body
   451→
   452→    if (all) {
   453→      const filter: Record<string, any> = {}
   454→      if (!isUndefined(currentState)) {
   455→        filter.state = currentState
   456→      }
   457→      await this.commentService.model.updateMany(filter, { state })
   458→    } else if (ids?.length) {
   459→      await this.commentService.model.updateMany(
   460→        { _id: { $in: ids } },
   461→        { state },
   462→      )
   463→    }
   464→
   465→    return
   466→  }
   467→
   468→  @Delete('/batch')
   469→  @Auth()
   470→  async batchDelete(@Body() body: BatchCommentDeleteDto) {
   471→    const { ids, all, state } = body
   472→
   473→    if (all) {
   474→      const filter: Record<string, any> = {}
   475→      if (!isUndefined(state)) {
   476→        filter.state = state
   477→      }
   478→      const comments = await this.commentService.model.find(filter).lean()
   479→      for (const comment of comments) {
   480→        await this.commentService.deleteComments(comment._id.toString())
   481→      }
   482→    } else if (ids?.length) {
   483→      for (const id of ids) {
   484→        await this.commentService.deleteComments(id)
   485→      }
   486→    }
   487→
   488→    return
   489→  }
   490→
   491→  @Patch('/edit/:id')
   492→  async editComment(
   493→    @Param() params: MongoIdDto,
   494→    @Body() body: EditCommentDto,
   495→    @IsAuthenticated() isAuthenticated: boolean,
   496→    @CurrentReaderId() readerId: string,
   497→  ) {
   498→    const { id } = params
   499→    const { text } = body
   500→    const comment = await this.commentService.model.findById(id).lean()
   501→    if (!comment) {
   502→      throw new CannotFindException()
   503→    }
   504→    if (comment.readerId !== readerId && !isAuthenticated) {
   505→      throw new BizException(ErrorCodeEnum.CommentForbidden)
   506→    }
   507→    await this.commentService.editComment(id, text)
   508→  }
   509→}
   510→
```

     1→import { createZodDto } from 'nestjs-zod'
     2→import { z } from 'zod'
     3→
     4→import { CollectionRefTypes } from '~/constants/db.constant'
     5→import { normalizeRefType } from '~/utils/database.util'
     6→
     7→import { CommentAnchorMode } from './comment.model'
     8→
     9→const BlockCommentAnchorSchema = z.object({
    10→  mode: z.literal(CommentAnchorMode.Block),
    11→  blockId: z.string().trim().min(1).max(128),
    12→  blockType: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
    13→  blockFingerprint: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
    14→  snapshotText: z.string().max(20000).optional(),
    15→})
    16→
    17→const RangeCommentAnchorSchema = z
    18→  .object({
    19→    mode: z.literal(CommentAnchorMode.Range),
    20→    blockId: z.string().trim().min(1).max(128),
    21→    blockType: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
    22→    blockFingerprint: z.string().trim().min(1).max(64).optional(),
    23→    snapshotText: z.string().max(20000).optional(),
    24→    quote: z.string().min(1).max(1000),
    25→    prefix: z.string().max(300).default(''),
    26→    suffix: z.string().max(300).default(''),
    27→    startOffset: z.number().int().min(0),
    28→    endOffset: z.number().int().min(0),
    29→  })
    30→  .refine((data) => data.endOffset >= data.startOffset, {
    31→    message: 'endOffset must be greater than or equal to startOffset',
    32→    path: ['endOffset'],
    33→  })
    34→
    35→export const CommentAnchorSchema = z.discriminatedUnion('mode', [
    36→  BlockCommentAnchorSchema,
    37→  RangeCommentAnchorSchema,
    38→])
    39→
    40→/**
    41→ * Comment schema for API validation
    42→ */
    43→export const CommentSchema = z.object({
    44→  author: z.string().min(1).max(20, { message: '昵称不得大于 20 个字符' }),
    45→  text: z.string().min(1).max(500, { message: '评论内容不得大于 500 个字符' }),
    46→  mail: z
    47→    .string()
    48→    .email({ message: '请更正为正确的邮箱' })
    49→    .max(50, { message: '邮箱地址不得大于 50 个字符' }),
    50→  url: z
    51→    .string()
    52→    .url({ message: '请更正为正确的网址' })
    53→    .max(50, { message: '地址不得大于 50 个字符' })
    54→    .optional(),
    55→  isWhispers: z.boolean().optional(),
    56→  source: z.string().optional(),
    57→  avatar: z
    58→    .string()
    59→    .url({ message: '头像必须是合法的 HTTPS URL 哦' })
    60→    .refine((val) => val.startsWith('https://'), {
    61→      message: '头像必须是合法的 HTTPS URL 哦',
    62→    })
    63→    .optional(),
    64→  anchor: CommentAnchorSchema.optional(),
    65→})
    66→
    67→export class CommentDto extends createZodDto(CommentSchema.omit({ anchor: true })) {}
    68→
    69→/**
    70→ * Edit comment schema
    71→ */
    72→export const EditCommentSchema = z.object({
    73→  text: z.string().min(1),
    74→})
    75→
    76→export class EditCommentDto extends createZodDto(EditCommentSchema) {}
    77→
    78→/**
    79→ * Required guest reader comment schema
    80→ */
    81→export const RequiredGuestReaderCommentSchema = CommentSchema.extend({
    82→  author: z.string().min(1).max(20, { message: '昵称不得大于 20 个字符' }),
    83→  mail: z
    84→    .string()
    85→    .email({ message: '请更正为正确的邮箱' })
    86→    .max(50, { message: '邮箱地址不得大于 50 个字符' }),
    87→})
    88→
    89→export class RequiredGuestReaderCommentDto extends createZodDto(
    90→  RequiredGuestReaderCommentSchema,
    91→) {}
    92→
    93→/**
    94→ * Text only schema
    95→ */
    96→export const TextOnlySchema = z.object({
    97→  text: z.string().min(1),
    98→  source: z.string().optional(),
    99→})
   100→
   101→export class TextOnlyDto extends createZodDto(TextOnlySchema) {}
   102→
   103→/**
   104→ * Comment ref types schema
   105→ */
   106→export const CommentRefTypesSchema = z.object({
   107→  ref: z
   108→    .preprocess((val) => {
   109→      if (!val) return undefined
   110→      return normalizeRefType(val as any)
   111→    }, z.enum(CollectionRefTypes))
   112→    .optional(),
   113→})
   114→
   115→export class CommentRefTypesDto extends createZodDto(CommentRefTypesSchema) {}
   116→
   117→/**
   118→ * Comment state patch schema
   119→ */
   120→export const CommentStatePatchSchema = z.object({
   121→  state: z
   122→    .number()
   123→    .int()
   124→    .refine((val) => [0, 1, 2].includes(val))
   125→    .optional(),
   126→  pin: z.boolean().optional(),
   127→})
   128→
   129→export class CommentStatePatchDto extends createZodDto(
   130→  CommentStatePatchSchema,
   131→) {}
   132→
   133→/**
   134→ * Batch update comment state schema
   135→ */
   136→export const BatchCommentStateSchema = z
   137→  .object({
   138→    ids: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
   139→    all: z.boolean().optional(),
   140→    state: z
   141→      .number()
   142→      .int()
   143→      .refine((val) => [0, 1, 2].includes(val)),
   144→    currentState: z
   145→      .number()
   146→      .int()
   147→      .refine((val) => [0, 1, 2].includes(val))
   148→      .optional(),
   149→  })
   150→  .refine((data) => data.ids?.length || data.all, {
   151→    message: 'Either ids or all must be provided',
   152→  })
   153→
   154→export class BatchCommentStateDto extends createZodDto(
   155→  BatchCommentStateSchema,
   156→) {}
   157→
   158→/**
   159→ * Batch delete comment schema
   160→ */
   161→export const BatchCommentDeleteSchema = z
   162→  .object({
   163→    ids: z.array(z.string()).optional(),
   164→    all: z.boolean().optional(),
   165→    state: z
   166→      .number()
   167→      .int()
   168→      .refine((val) => [0, 1, 2].includes(val))
   169→      .optional(),
   170→  })
   171→  .refine((data) => data.ids?.length || data.all, {
   172→    message: 'Either ids or all must be provided',
   173→  })
   174→
   175→export class BatchCommentDeleteDto extends createZodDto(
   176→  BatchCommentDeleteSchema,
   177→) {}
   178→
   179→// Type exports
   180→export type CommentInput = z.infer<typeof CommentSchema>
   181→export type CommentAnchorInput = z.infer<typeof CommentAnchorSchema>
   182→export type EditCommentInput = z.infer<typeof EditCommentSchema>
   183→export type RequiredGuestReaderCommentInput = z.infer<
   184→  typeof RequiredGuestReaderCommentSchema
   185→>
   186→export type TextOnlyInput = z.infer<typeof TextOnlySchema>
   187→export type CommentRefTypesInput = z.infer<typeof CommentRefTypesSchema>
   188→export type CommentStatePatchInput = z.infer<typeof CommentStatePatchSchema>
   189→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type {
     2→  ElementNode,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  RangeSelection,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import {
     8→  $getRoot,
     9→  $getSelection,
    10→  $getState,
    11→  $isElementNode,
    12→  $isLineBreakNode,
    13→  $isRangeSelection,
    14→  $isTextNode,
    15→} from 'lexical'
    16→
    17→import { blockIdState } from '../plugins/BlockIdPlugin'
    18→
    19→export interface BlockAnchor {
    20→  mode: 'block'
    21→  blockId: string
    22→  blockType: string
    23→  blockFingerprint: string
    24→  snapshotText: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→export interface RangeAnchor {
    28→  mode: 'range'
    29→  blockId: string
    30→  blockType: string
    31→  blockFingerprint: string
    32→  snapshotText: string
    33→  quote: string
    34→  prefix: string
    35→  suffix: string
    36→  startOffset: number
    37→  endOffset: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
    41→
    42→export type AnchorError =
    43→  | 'no-selection'
    44→  | 'cross-block'
    45→  | 'collapsed'
    46→  | 'no-block-id'
    47→  | 'not-root-block'
    48→
    49→export type AnchorResult<T> =
    50→  | { ok: true; anchor: T }
    51→  | { ok: false; error: AnchorError }
    52→
    53→function computeBlockFingerprint(block: ElementNode): string {
    54→  const text = block.getTextContent()
    55→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    56→  let hash = 5381
    57→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    58→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    59→  }
    60→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function $getRootBlock(node: LexicalNode): ElementNode | null {
    64→  const root = $getRoot()
    65→  let current: LexicalNode | null = node
    66→  while (current) {
    67→    const parent: ElementNode | null = current.getParent()
    68→    if (parent === root && 'getChildren' in current) {
    69→      return current as ElementNode
    70→    }
    71→    current = parent
    72→  }
    73→  return null
    74→}
    75→
    76→function $resolveSelectionPoint(
    77→  selection: RangeSelection,
    78→  which: 'anchor' | 'focus',
    79→): { node: LexicalNode; offset: number } {
    80→  const point = selection[which]
    81→  const node = point.getNode()
    82→
    83→  if ($isElementNode(node)) {
    84→    const children = node.getChildren()
    85→    if (point.offset < children.length) {
    86→      return { node: children[point.offset], offset: 0 }
    87→    }
    88→    const last = children.at(-1)
    89→    if (last && $isTextNode(last)) {
    90→      return { node: last, offset: last.getTextContentSize() }
    91→    }
    92→    return { node, offset: 0 }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  return { node, offset: point.offset }
    96→}
    97→
    98→function $getTextOffsetInBlock(
    99→  block: ElementNode,
   100→  targetNode: LexicalNode,
   101→  targetOffset: number,
   102→): number {
   103→  let offset = 0
   104→
   105→  function walk(node: LexicalNode): boolean {
   106→    if (node.is(targetNode)) {
   107→      offset += targetOffset
   108→      return true
   109→    }
   110→    if ($isTextNode(node)) {
   111→      offset += node.getTextContentSize()
   112→    } else if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) {
   113→      offset += 1
   114→    } else if ($isElementNode(node)) {
   115→      for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   116→        if (walk(child)) return true
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  for (const child of block.getChildren()) {
   123→    if (walk(child)) break
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return offset
   127→}
   128→
   129→function $buildBlockAnchorData(block: ElementNode): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   130→  const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   131→  if (!blockId) {
   132→    return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  return {
   136→    ok: true,
   137→    anchor: {
   138→      mode: 'block',
   139→      blockId,
   140→      blockType: block.getType(),
   141→      blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   142→      snapshotText: block.getTextContent().slice(0, 300),
   143→    },
   144→  }
   145→}
   146→
   147→export function buildBlockAnchor(
   148→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   149→  blockKey?: string,
   150→): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   151→  return editor.read(() => {
   152→    if (blockKey) {
   153→      const node = $getRoot()
   154→        .getChildren()
   155→        .find((c) => c.getKey() === blockKey)
   156→      if (!node || !('getChildren' in node)) {
   157→        return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   158→      }
   159→      return $buildBlockAnchorData(node as ElementNode)
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    const selection = $getSelection()
   163→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   164→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
   168→    const block = $getRootBlock(anchorNode)
   169→    if (!block) {
   170→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    return $buildBlockAnchorData(block)
   174→  })
   175→}
   176→
   177→export function buildRangeAnchor(
   178→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   179→): AnchorResult<RangeAnchor> {
   180→  return editor.read(() => {
   181→    const selection = $getSelection()
   182→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   183→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   184→    }
   185→
   186→    if (selection.isCollapsed()) {
   187→      return { ok: false, error: 'collapsed' }
   188→    }
   189→
   190→    const anchorBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.anchor.getNode())
   191→    const focusBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.focus.getNode())
   192→
   193→    if (!anchorBlock || !focusBlock) {
   194→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    if (anchorBlock !== focusBlock) {
   198→      return { ok: false, error: 'cross-block' }
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    const block = anchorBlock
   202→    const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   203→    if (!blockId) {
   204→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const anchorPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'anchor')
   208→    const focusPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'focus')
   209→
   210→    let startOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   211→      block,
   212→      anchorPoint.node,
   213→      anchorPoint.offset,
   214→    )
   215→    let endOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   216→      block,
   217→      focusPoint.node,
   218→      focusPoint.offset,
   219→    )
   220→
   221→    if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   222→      ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   223→    }
   224→
   225→    const text = block.getTextContent()
   226→    const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   227→    const prefix = text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset)
   228→    const suffix = text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50)
   229→
   230→    return {
   231→      ok: true,
   232→      anchor: {
   233→        mode: 'range',
   234→        blockId,
   235→        blockType: block.getType(),
   236→        blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   237→        snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   238→        quote,
   239→        prefix,
   240→        suffix,
   241→        startOffset,
   242→        endOffset,
   243→      },
   244→    }
   245→  })
   246→}
   247→
```
</details></tool-use>

Now let me check the BlockIdPlugin:

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-02-27 14:28:29Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/BlockIdPlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import {
     3→  $addUpdateTag,
     4→  $getRoot,
     5→  $getState,
     6→  $setState,
     7→  createState,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { useEffect } from 'react'
    10→
    11→export const blockIdState = createState('blockId', {
    12→  parse: (v: unknown) => (typeof v === 'string' ? v : ''),
    13→})
    14→
    15→const NORMALIZATION_TAG = 'block-id-normalization'
    16→
    17→export function BlockIdPlugin() {
    18→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ tags }) => {
    22→      if (tags.has(NORMALIZATION_TAG)) return
    23→
    24→      editor.read(() => {
    25→        const children = $getRoot().getChildren()
    26→        let needsUpdate = false
    27→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    28→
    29→        for (const child of children) {
    30→          const id = $getState(child, blockIdState)
    31→          if (id === '' || seen.has(id)) {
    32→            needsUpdate = true
    33→            break
    34→          }
    35→          seen.add(id)
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        if (!needsUpdate) return
    39→
    40→        editor.update(
    41→          () => {
    42→            $addUpdateTag('history-merge')
    43→            const children = $getRoot().getChildren()
    44→            const seen = new Set<string>()
    45→
    46→            for (const child of children) {
    47→              let id = $getState(child, blockIdState)
    48→              if (id === '' || seen.has(id)) {
    49→                id = crypto.randomUUID()
    50→                $setState(child, blockIdState, id)
    51→              }
    52→              seen.add(id)
    53→            }
    54→          },
    55→          { tag: NORMALIZATION_TAG },
    56→        )
    57→      })
    58→    })
    59→  }, [editor])
    60→
    61→  return null
    62→}
    63→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { CommentModel, PaginateResult } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import { CommentState } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     3→import type { InfiniteData, MutationOptions } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     4→import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { produce } from 'immer'
     6→import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
     7→
     8→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     9→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
    10→
    11→import { commentAdmin } from '../definition/comment'
    12→
    13→const useGetCurrentCommentStateFromQuery = () => {
    14→  const search = useSearchParams()
    15→  const state = search.get('tab') as any as CommentState
    16→  return state || CommentState.Unread
    17→}
    18→export const useUpdateCommentStateMutation = (
    19→  options?: MutationOptions<any>,
    20→) => {
    21→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    22→
    23→  const state = useGetCurrentCommentStateFromQuery()
    24→  return useMutation({
    25→    mutationKey: ['comment', 'updateState'],
    26→    mutationFn: async ({ id, state }: { id: string; state: CommentState }) =>
    27→      apiClient.proxy.comments(id).patch({ data: { state } }),
    28→    onMutate: async ({ id }) => {
    29→      queryClient.setQueryData<InfiniteData<PaginateResult<CommentModel>>>(
    30→        commentAdmin.byState(state).queryKey,
    31→        produce((draft) => {
    32→          draft?.pages.forEach((page) => {
    33→            page.data = page.data.filter((comment) => comment.id !== id)
    34→          })
    35→        }),
    36→      )
    37→    },
    38→    onSuccess: (...rest) => {
    39→      options?.onSuccess?.apply(null, rest as any)
    40→      toast.success('操作成功')
    41→    },
    42→    onError: () => {
    43→      toast.error('操作失败')
    44→    },
    45→  })
    46→}
    47→
    48→export const useDeleteCommentMutation = (options?: MutationOptions<any>) => {
    49→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    50→  const state = useGetCurrentCommentStateFromQuery()
    51→
    52→  return useMutation({
    53→    mutationKey: ['comment', 'delete'],
    54→    mutationFn: async ({ id }: { id: string }) =>
    55→      apiClient.proxy.comments(id).delete(),
    56→    onMutate: async ({ id }) => {
    57→      queryClient.setQueryData<InfiniteData<PaginateResult<CommentModel>>>(
    58→        commentAdmin.byState(state).queryKey,
    59→        produce((draft) => {
    60→          draft?.pages.forEach((page) => {
    61→            page.data = page.data.filter((comment) => comment.id !== id)
    62→          })
    63→        }),
    64→      )
    65→    },
    66→    onSuccess: (...rest) => {
    67→      toast.success('删除成功')
    68→      options?.onSuccess?.apply(null, rest as any)
    69→    },
    70→    onError: () => {
    71→      toast.error('删除失败')
    72→    },
    73→  })
    74→}
    75→
    76→export const useReplyCommentMutation = () => {
    77→  const queryClient = useQueryClient()
    78→  const state = useGetCurrentCommentStateFromQuery()
    79→
    80→  return useMutation({
    81→    mutationKey: ['comment', 'reply'],
    82→    mutationFn: async ({ id, content }: { id: string; content: string }) =>
    83→      apiClient.proxy.comments.owner.reply(id).post({
    84→        data: {
    85→          text: content,
    86→        },
    87→      }),
    88→    onMutate({ id }) {
    89→      queryClient.setQueryData<InfiniteData<PaginateResult<CommentModel>>>(
    90→        commentAdmin.byState(state).queryKey,
    91→        produce((draft) => {
    92→          draft?.pages.forEach((page) => {
    93→            page.data = page.data.filter((comment) => comment.id !== id)
    94→          })
    95→        }),
    96→      )
    97→    },
    98→    onSuccess: (_) => {
    99→      toast.success('回复成功')
   100→    },
   101→    onError: () => {
   102→      queryClient.invalidateQueries({
   103→        queryKey: commentAdmin.byState(state).queryKey,
   104→      })
   105→
   106→      toast.error('回复失败')
   107→    },
   108→  })
   109→}
   110→
```
