<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./apps/web/src/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { createContextState } from 'foxact/create-context-state'
     4→import { useIsomorphicLayoutEffect } from 'foxact/use-isomorphic-layout-effect'
     5→import type * as React from 'react'
     6→import { memo, useEffect, useRef } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { ProviderComposer } from '~/components/common/ProviderComposer'
     9→import { useStateToRef } from '~/hooks/common/use-state-ref'
    10→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    11→
    12→import { usePageScrollDirection } from '../root/page-scroll-info-provider'
    13→
    14→const [
    15→  WrappedElementProviderInternal,
    16→  useWrappedElement,
    17→  useSetWrappedElement,
    18→] = createContextState<HTMLDivElement | null>(undefined as any)
    19→
    20→const [
    21→  ElementSizeProviderInternal,
    22→  useWrappedElementSize,
    23→  useSetWrappedElementSize,
    24→] = createContextState({
    25→  h: 0,
    26→  w: 0,
    27→})
    28→
    29→const [
    30→  ElementPositionProviderInternal,
    31→  useWrappedElementPosition,
    32→  useSetElementPosition,
    33→] = createContextState({
    34→  x: 0,
    35→  y: 0,
    36→})
    37→
    38→const [
    39→  IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal,
    40→  useIsEoFWrappedElement,
    41→  useSetIsEOArticleElement,
    42→] = createContextState<boolean>(false)
    43→
    44→const Providers = [
    45→  <WrappedElementProviderInternal key="ArticleElementProviderInternal" />,
    46→  <ElementSizeProviderInternal key="ElementSizeProviderInternal" />,
    47→  <ElementPositionProviderInternal key="ElementPositionProviderInternal" />,
    48→  <IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal key="IsEOArticleElementProviderInternal" />,
    49→]
    50→
    51→interface WrappedElementProviderProps {
    52→  eoaDetect?: boolean
    53→  as?: keyof React.JSX.IntrinsicElements
    54→  style?: React.CSSProperties
    55→}
    56→
    57→export const WrappedElementProvider: Component<WrappedElementProviderProps> = ({
    58→  children,
    59→  className,
    60→  style,
    61→  ...props
    62→}) => (
    63→  <ProviderComposer contexts={Providers}>
    64→    <ElementResizeObserver />
    65→    <Content {...props} className={className} style={style}>
    66→      {children}
    67→    </Content>
    68→  </ProviderComposer>
    69→)
    70→const ElementResizeObserver = () => {
    71→  const setSize = useSetWrappedElementSize()
    72→  const setPos = useSetElementPosition()
    73→  const $element = useWrappedElement()
    74→  useIsomorphicLayoutEffect(() => {
    75→    if (!$element) return
    76→    const { height, width, left, top } = $element.getBoundingClientRect()
    77→    setSize({ h: height, w: width })
    78→
    79→    const pageX = window.scrollX + left
    80→    const pageY = window.scrollY + top
    81→    setPos({ x: pageX, y: pageY })
    82→
    83→    const observer = new ResizeObserver((entries) => {
    84→      const entry = entries[0]
    85→
    86→      const { height, width } = entry.contentRect
    87→      const { left, top } = $element.getBoundingClientRect()
    88→      const pageX = window.scrollX + left
    89→      const pageY = window.scrollY + top
    90→
    91→      setSize((size) => {
    92→        if (size.h === height && size.w === width) return size
    93→        return { h: height, w: width }
    94→      })
    95→      setPos((pos) => {
    96→        if (pos.x === pageX && pos.y === pageY) return pos
    97→        return { x: pageX, y: pageY }
    98→      })
    99→    })
   100→    observer.observe($element)
   101→    return () => {
   102→      observer.unobserve($element)
   103→      observer.disconnect()
   104→    }
   105→  }, [$element])
   106→
   107→  return null
   108→}
   109→
   110→const Content: Component<WrappedElementProviderProps> = memo(
   111→  ({ children, className, style, eoaDetect, as = 'div' }) => {
   112→    const setElement = useSetWrappedElement()
   113→
   114→    const As = as as any
   115→    return (
   116→      <As
   117→        className={clsxm('relative', className)}
   118→        style={style}
   119→        ref={setElement}
   120→      >
   121→        {children}
   122→        {eoaDetect && <EOADetector />}
   123→      </As>
   124→    )
   125→  },
   126→)
   127→
   128→Content.displayName = 'ArticleElementProviderContent'
   129→
   130→const EOADetector: Component = () => {
   131→  const dir = usePageScrollDirection()
   132→  const getDir = useStateToRef(dir)
   133→  const setter = useSetIsEOArticleElement()
   134→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   135→  useEffect(() => {
   136→    if (!ref.current) return
   137→    const $el = ref.current
   138→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
   139→      (entries) => {
   140→        const entry = entries[0]
   141→
   142→        if (!entry.isIntersecting && getDir.current === 'down') {
   143→          return
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        setter(entry.isIntersecting)
   147→      },
   148→      {
   149→        rootMargin: '0px 0px 0px 0px',
   150→      },
   151→    )
   152→
   153→    observer.observe($el)
   154→    return () => {
   155→      observer.unobserve($el)
   156→      observer.disconnect()
   157→    }
   158→  }, [])
   159→
   160→  return <div ref={ref} />
   161→}
   162→
   163→export {
   164→  useIsEoFWrappedElement,
   165→  useSetWrappedElement,
   166→  useWrappedElement,
   167→  useWrappedElementPosition,
   168→  useWrappedElementSize,
   169→}
   170→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import type { NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     5→import { createModelDataProvider } from 'jojoo/react'
     6→import { useSearchParams } from 'next/navigation'
     7→import { useLocale } from 'next-intl'
     8→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     9→
    10→import { queries } from '~/queries/definition'
    11→
    12→const {
    13→  ModelDataProvider,
    14→  ModelDataAtomProvider,
    15→  getGlobalModelData: getModelData,
    16→  setGlobalModelData: setModelData,
    17→  useModelDataSelector,
    18→  useSetModelData,
    19→} = createModelDataProvider<NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload>()
    20→
    21→export {
    22→  ModelDataAtomProvider as CurrentNoteDataAtomProvider,
    23→  ModelDataProvider as CurrentNoteDataProvider,
    24→  getModelData as getCurrentNoteData,
    25→  setModelData as setCurrentNoteData,
    26→  useModelDataSelector as useCurrentNoteDataSelector,
    27→  useSetModelData as useSetCurrentNoteData,
    28→}
    29→
    30→export const SyncNoteDataAfterLoggedIn = () => {
    31→  const nid = useModelDataSelector((data) => data?.data.nid)
    32→  const password = useSearchParams().get('password')
    33→  const locale = useLocale()
    34→  const { data } = useQuery({
    35→    ...queries.note.byNid(nid?.toString() || '', password, locale),
    36→    enabled: !!nid,
    37→  })
    38→
    39→  useEffect(() => {
    40→    if (data) {
    41→      const noteData = data as NoteWrappedWithLikedAndTranslationPayload
    42→      setModelData((draft) => {
    43→        draft.data = noteData.data
    44→      })
    45→    }
    46→  }, [data])
    47→
    48→  return null
    49→}
    50→
```

 `./apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/page.tsx`

```text
     1→import { clsx } from 'clsx'
     2→import type { Metadata } from 'next'
     3→import type { Article, WithContext } from 'schema-dts'
     4→
     5→import { AckRead } from '~/components/common/AckRead'
     6→import { ClientOnly } from '~/components/common/ClientOnly'
     7→import { PageColorGradient } from '~/components/common/PageColorGradient'
     8→import {
     9→  buildRoomName,
    10→  Presence,
    11→  RoomProvider,
    12→} from '~/components/modules/activity'
    13→import { CommentAreaRootLazy } from '~/components/modules/comment'
    14→import {
    15→  PostActionAside,
    16→  PostBottomBarAction,
    17→  PostCopyright,
    18→  PostOutdate,
    19→  PostRelated,
    20→} from '~/components/modules/post'
    21→import { GoToAdminEditingButton } from '~/components/modules/shared/GoToAdminEditingButton'
    22→import { ReadIndicatorForMobile } from '~/components/modules/shared/ReadIndicator'
    23→import { SummarySwitcher } from '~/components/modules/shared/SummarySwitcher'
    24→import { TocFAB } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocFAB'
    25→import { TocHeadingStrategyProvider } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy'
    26→import { TranslationBanner } from '~/components/modules/translation/TranslationBanner'
    27→import {
    28→  BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView,
    29→  BottomToUpTransitionView,
    30→} from '~/components/ui/transition'
    31→import { OnlyMobile } from '~/components/ui/viewport/OnlyMobile'
    32→import { getOgUrl } from '~/lib/helper.server'
    33→import { getSummaryFromMd } from '~/lib/markdown'
    34→import { definePrerenderPage } from '~/lib/request.server'
    35→import {
    36→  buildLanguageAlternates,
    37→  buildLocalePrefixedPath,
    38→  getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations,
    39→} from '~/lib/seo/hreflang'
    40→import { CurrentPostDataProvider } from '~/providers/post/CurrentPostDataProvider'
    41→import {
    42→  LayoutRightSidePortal,
    43→  LayoutRightSideProvider,
    44→} from '~/providers/shared/LayoutRightSideProvider'
    45→import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    46→
    47→import type { PageParams, PostDataResult, PostWithTranslation } from './api'
    48→import { getData } from './api'
    49→import {
    50→  FocusReadingEffect,
    51→  LdJsonWithAuthor,
    52→  MarkdownSelection,
    53→  PostDataReValidate,
    54→  PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider,
    55→  PostMetaBarInternal,
    56→  PostTitle,
    57→  SlugReplacer,
    58→} from './pageExtra'
    59→import { PostContent } from './PostContent'
    60→
    61→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    62→
    63→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
    64→  params: Promise<PageParams>
    65→  searchParams: Promise<{ lang?: string }>
    66→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
    67→  const params = await props.params
    68→  const searchParams = await props.searchParams
    69→  try {
    70→    const { post: data } = await getData({
    71→      ...params,
    72→      lang: searchParams.lang,
    73→    })
    74→    const {
    75→      category: { slug: categorySlug },
    76→      meta,
    77→    } = data
    78→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
    79→
    80→    const ogImage = await getOgUrl(
    81→      'post',
    82→      {
    83→        category: categorySlug,
    84→        slug: data.slug,
    85→      },
    86→      params.locale,
    87→    )
    88→
    89→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/posts/${categorySlug}/${data.slug}`
    90→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
    91→      params.locale as any,
    92→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
    93→    )
    94→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
    95→      sourceLang: data.translationMeta?.sourceLang,
    96→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
    97→    })
    98→
    99→    return {
   100→      title: data.title,
   101→      description,
   102→      openGraph: {
   103→        title: data.title,
   104→        description,
   105→        images: ogImage,
   106→        type: 'article',
   107→      },
   108→      twitter: {
   109→        images: ogImage,
   110→        title: data.title,
   111→        description,
   112→        card: 'summary_large_image',
   113→      },
   114→      keywords: meta?.keywords,
   115→      category: categorySlug,
   116→      alternates: {
   117→        canonical: canonicalPath,
   118→        languages: {
   119→          ...buildLanguageAlternates(canonicalPathNoLocale, supportedLocales),
   120→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   121→        },
   122→      },
   123→    } satisfies Metadata
   124→  } catch {
   125→    return {}
   126→  }
   127→}
   128→
   129→const Summary = ({ data }: { data: PostWithTranslation }) => {
   130→  const { id } = data
   131→  const summary = data.summary || ''
   132→  return <SummarySwitcher articleId={id!} summary={summary} className="mb-8" />
   133→}
   134→
   135→const PostPage = ({ data }: { data: PostWithTranslation }) => {
   136→  const { id, isTranslated, translationMeta } = data
   137→  return (
   138→    <div className="relative w-full min-w-0">
   139→      <AckRead id={id} type="post" />
   140→      <div>
   141→        <div className="mb-8">
   142→          <PostTitle />
   143→          <GoToAdminEditingButton
   144→            id={id!}
   145→            type="posts"
   146→            className="absolute -top-6 right-0"
   147→          />
   148→
   149→          <PostMetaBarInternal className="mb-8 justify-center" />
   150→
   151→          {isTranslated && translationMeta ? (
   152→            <TranslationBanner translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   153→          ) : (
   154→            <Summary data={data} />
   155→          )}
   156→
   157→          <PostOutdate />
   158→
   159→          <PostRelated type="before" />
   160→        </div>
   161→        <WrappedElementProvider eoaDetect>
   162→          <ReadIndicatorForMobile />
   163→          <Presence />
   164→          <PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   165→            <MarkdownSelection>
   166→              <article
   167→                className={clsx(data.contentFormat !== 'lexical' && 'prose')}
   168→              >
   169→                <div className="sr-only">
   170→                  <PostTitle />
   171→                </div>
   172→                <FocusReadingEffect />
   173→                <PostContent
   174→                  contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   175→                  content={data.content}
   176→                />
   177→              </article>
   178→            </MarkdownSelection>
   179→          </PostMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   180→
   181→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   182→            <PostActionAside />
   183→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   184→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   185→      </div>
   186→      <ClientOnly>
   187→        <PostRelated />
   188→        <PostCopyright />
   189→
   190→        {/* <SubscribeBell defaultType="post_c" /> */}
   191→        <PostBottomBarAction />
   192→      </ClientOnly>
   193→    </div>
   194→  )
   195→}
   196→
   197→export default definePrerenderPage<PageParams>()<PostDataResult>({
   198→  fetcher(params) {
   199→    return getData(params)
   200→  },
   201→
   202→  Component: async (props) => {
   203→    const { data: fetchedData, params, fetchedAt } = props
   204→    const { post: data } = fetchedData
   205→
   206→    const fullPath = `/posts/${data.category.slug}/${data.slug}`
   207→    const currentPath = `/posts/${params.category}/${params.slug}`
   208→
   209→    const jsonLd: WithContext<Article> = {
   210→      '@context': 'https://schema.org',
   211→      '@type': 'BlogPosting',
   212→      headline: data.title,
   213→      image: data.meta?.cover ? [data.meta.cover] : undefined,
   214→      description: data.summary || (data.text ?? '').slice(0, 200),
   215→      datePublished: data.created,
   216→      dateModified: data.modified || undefined,
   217→    }
   218→
   219→    return (
   220→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   221→        contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   222→        content={data.content}
   223→      >
   224→        {currentPath !== fullPath && <SlugReplacer to={fullPath} />}
   225→        <LdJsonWithAuthor baseLdJson={jsonLd} />
   226→
   227→        <PageColorGradient seed={data.title + data.category.name} />
   228→        <CurrentPostDataProvider data={data} />
   229→        <PostDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   230→        <div
   231→          data-server-fetched-at={fetchedAt}
   232→          className="relative flex min-h-[120px] grid-cols-[auto_200px] lg:grid"
   233→        >
   234→          <BottomToUpTransitionView lcpOptimization className="min-w-0">
   235→            <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.id)}>
   236→              <PostPage data={data} />
   237→            </RoomProvider>
   238→
   239→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   240→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   241→                refId={data.id}
   242→                allowComment={data.allowComment}
   243→              />
   244→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   245→          </BottomToUpTransitionView>
   246→
   247→          <LayoutRightSideProvider className="relative hidden lg:block" />
   248→        </div>
   249→
   250→        <OnlyMobile>
   251→          <TocFAB />
   252→        </OnlyMobile>
   253→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   254→    )
   255→  },
   256→})
   257→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    10→
    11→import { AckRead } from '~/components/common/AckRead'
    12→import { ClientOnly } from '~/components/common/ClientOnly'
    13→import { PageColorGradient } from '~/components/common/PageColorGradient'
    14→import {
    15→  buildRoomName,
    16→  Presence,
    17→  RoomProvider,
    18→} from '~/components/modules/activity'
    19→import { CommentAreaRootLazy } from '~/components/modules/comment'
    20→import {
    21→  NoteActionAside,
    22→  NoteBottomBarAction,
    23→  NoteBottomTopic,
    24→  NoteFooterNavigationBarForMobile,
    25→  NoteMetaBar,
    26→  NoteMetaReadingCount,
    27→  NotePasswordForm,
    28→} from '~/components/modules/note'
    29→import {
    30→  NoteBanner,
    31→  NoteRootBanner,
    32→} from '~/components/modules/note/NoteBanner'
    33→import { NoteFontSettingFab } from '~/components/modules/note/NoteFontFab'
    34→import { NoteMainContainer } from '~/components/modules/note/NoteMainContainer'
    35→import { BanCopyWrapper } from '~/components/modules/shared/BanCopyWrapper'
    36→import { ReadIndicatorForMobile } from '~/components/modules/shared/ReadIndicator'
    37→import { Signature } from '~/components/modules/shared/Signature'
    38→import { SummarySwitcher } from '~/components/modules/shared/SummarySwitcher'
    39→import { TocFAB } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocFAB'
    40→import { TocHeadingStrategyProvider } from '~/components/modules/toc/TocHeadingStrategy'
    41→import { TranslationBanner } from '~/components/modules/translation/TranslationBanner'
    42→import { BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
    43→import { OnlyMobile } from '~/components/ui/viewport/OnlyMobile'
    44→import { getOgUrl } from '~/lib/helper.server'
    45→import { getSummaryFromMd } from '~/lib/markdown'
    46→import { definePrerenderPage } from '~/lib/request.server'
    47→import {
    48→  buildLanguageAlternates,
    49→  buildLocalePrefixedPath,
    50→  getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations,
    51→} from '~/lib/seo/hreflang'
    52→import {
    53→  CurrentNoteDataProvider,
    54→  SyncNoteDataAfterLoggedIn,
    55→} from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteDataProvider'
    56→import { CurrentNoteNidProvider } from '~/providers/note/CurrentNoteIdProvider'
    57→import { LayoutRightSidePortal } from '~/providers/shared/LayoutRightSideProvider'
    58→import { WrappedElementProvider } from '~/providers/shared/WrappedElementProvider'
    59→
    60→import { Paper } from '../../../../components/layout/container/Paper'
    61→import { NoteHeadCover } from '../../../../components/modules/note/NoteHeadCover'
    62→import { NoteHideIfSecret } from '../../../../components/modules/note/NoteHideIfSecret'
    63→import type { NoteDataResult } from './api'
    64→import { getData } from './api'
    65→import { NoteContent } from './NoteContent'
    66→import {
    67→  IndentArticleContainer,
    68→  MarkdownSelection,
    69→  NoteDataReValidate,
    70→  NoteHeaderDate,
    71→  NoteMarkdownImageRecordProvider,
    72→  NoteTitle,
    73→} from './pageExtra'
    74→import { Transition } from './Transition'
    75→
    76→type NoteWithTranslation = ModelWithLiked<ModelWithTranslation<NoteModel>>
    77→
    78→export const dynamic = 'force-dynamic'
    79→
    80→const Summary = ({ data }: { data: NoteWithTranslation }) => {
    81→  return <SummarySwitcher articleId={data.id!} className="mb-8" />
    82→}
    83→
    84→function PageInner({
    85→  data,
    86→  privateLoginOnlyMessage,
    87→}: {
    88→  data: NoteWithTranslation
    89→  privateLoginOnlyMessage: string
    90→}) {
    91→  const coverImage = data.images?.find((i) => i.src === data.meta?.cover)
    92→  const { isTranslated, translationMeta } = data
    93→
    94→  return (
    95→    <>
    96→      <AckRead id={data.id} type="note" />
    97→
    98→      <NoteHeadCover image={data.meta?.cover} />
    99→      {!!data.meta?.cover && !!coverImage?.accent && (
   100→        <PageColorGradient baseColor={coverImage.accent} />
   101→      )}
   102→      <div>
   103→        <NoteTitle />
   104→        <span className="flex flex-wrap items-center text-sm text-neutral/60">
   105→          <NoteHeaderDate />
   106→
   107→          <NoteMetaBar />
   108→          <NoteMetaReadingCount />
   109→        </span>
   110→
   111→        <NoteRootBanner />
   112→        {!data.isPublished && (
   113→          <NoteBanner type="warning" message={privateLoginOnlyMessage} />
   114→        )}
   115→      </div>
   116→
   117→      <NoteHideIfSecret>
   118→        {isTranslated && translationMeta ? (
   119→          <div className="mt-4">
   120→            <TranslationBanner translationMeta={translationMeta} />
   121→          </div>
   122→        ) : (
   123→          <Summary data={data} />
   124→        )}
   125→        <WrappedElementProvider eoaDetect>
   126→          <Presence />
   127→          <ReadIndicatorForMobile />
   128→          <NoteMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   129→            <BanCopyWrapper>
   130→              <MarkdownSelection>
   131→                <IndentArticleContainer
   132→                  prose={data.contentFormat !== 'lexical'}
   133→                >
   134→                  <header className="sr-only">
   135→                    <NoteTitle />
   136→                  </header>
   137→                  <NoteContent
   138→                    contentFormat={data.contentFormat}
   139→                    content={data.content}
   140→                  />
   141→                </IndentArticleContainer>
   142→              </MarkdownSelection>
   143→            </BanCopyWrapper>
   144→          </NoteMarkdownImageRecordProvider>
   145→
   146→          <LayoutRightSidePortal>
   147→            <NoteActionAside />
   148→          </LayoutRightSidePortal>
   149→        </WrappedElementProvider>
   150→      </NoteHideIfSecret>
   151→      <Signature />
   152→      {/* <SubscribeBell defaultType="note_c" /> */}
   153→      <ClientOnly>
   154→        <div className="mt-8" data-hide-print />
   155→        <NoteBottomBarAction />
   156→        <NoteBottomTopic />
   157→        <NoteFooterNavigationBarForMobile />
   158→      </ClientOnly>
   159→    </>
   160→  )
   161→}
   162→
   163→type NoteDetailPageParams = LocaleParams & {
   164→  id: string
   165→  password?: string
   166→}
   167→export const generateMetadata = async (props: {
   168→  params: Promise<NoteDetailPageParams>
   169→  searchParams?: Promise<{
   170→    password?: string | string[]
   171→    lang?: string
   172→  }>
   173→}): Promise<Metadata> => {
   174→  const params = await props.params
   175→  const searchParams = (await props.searchParams) ?? {}
   176→  const password = Array.isArray(searchParams.password)
   177→    ? searchParams.password[0]
   178→    : searchParams.password
   179→  try {
   180→    const { note: res } = await getData({
   181→      ...params,
   182→      password,
   183→      lang: searchParams.lang,
   184→    })
   185→
   186→    const { data } = res
   187→    const description = getSummaryFromMd(data.text ?? '')
   188→
   189→    const ogUrl = await getOgUrl(
   190→      'note',
   191→      {
   192→        nid: params.id,
   193→      },
   194→      params.locale,
   195→    )
   196→
   197→    const canonicalPathNoLocale = `/notes/${params.id}`
   198→    const canonicalPath = buildLocalePrefixedPath(
   199→      params.locale as any,
   200→      canonicalPathNoLocale,
   201→    )
   202→    const supportedLocales = getSupportedLocalesFromTranslations({
   203→      sourceLang: (data as any).translationMeta?.sourceLang,
   204→      availableTranslations: (data as any).availableTranslations,
   205→    })
   206→
   207→    return {
   208→      title: data.title,
   209→      description,
   210→      openGraph: {
   211→        title: data.title,
   212→        description,
   213→        images: ogUrl,
   214→        type: 'article',
   215→      },
   216→      twitter: {
   217→        images: ogUrl,
   218→        title: data.title,
   219→        description,
   220→        card: 'summary_large_image',
   221→      },
   222→      alternates: {
   223→        canonical: canonicalPath,
   224→        languages: {
   225→          ...buildLanguageAlternates(canonicalPathNoLocale, supportedLocales),
   226→          'x-default': canonicalPathNoLocale,
   227→        },
   228→      },
   229→    } satisfies Metadata
   230→  } catch {
   231→    return {}
   232→  }
   233→}
   234→
   235→export default definePrerenderPage<NoteDetailPageParams>()<NoteDataResult>({
   236→  fetcher: getData,
   237→  requestErrorRenderer(_error, parsed, { id }) {
   238→    const { status } = parsed
   239→
   240→    if (status === 403) {
   241→      return (
   242→        <Paper>
   243→          <NotePasswordForm />
   244→          <CurrentNoteNidProvider nid={id} />
   245→        </Paper>
   246→      )
   247→    }
   248→  },
   249→  async Component({
   250→    data: fetchedData,
   251→    params: { id: nid, locale },
   252→    fetchedAt,
   253→  }) {
   254→    const { note: data } = fetchedData
   255→    const t = await getTranslations({
   256→      namespace: 'note',
   257→      locale,
   258→    })
   259→
   260→    return (
   261→      <TocHeadingStrategyProvider
   262→        contentFormat={data.data.contentFormat}
   263→        content={data.data.content}
   264→      >
   265→        <CurrentNoteNidProvider nid={nid} />
   266→        <CurrentNoteDataProvider data={data} />
   267→        <NoteDataReValidate fetchedAt={fetchedAt} />
   268→        <SyncNoteDataAfterLoggedIn />
   269→        <RoomProvider roomName={buildRoomName(data.data.id)}>
   270→          <Transition className="min-w-0" lcpOptimization>
   271→            <Paper key={nid} as={NoteMainContainer}>
   272→              <PageInner
   273→                data={data.data}
   274→                privateLoginOnlyMessage={t('private_login_only')}
   275→              />
   276→            </Paper>
   277→            <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView delay={500}>
   278→              <CommentAreaRootLazy
   279→                refId={data.data.id}
   280→                allowComment={data.data.allowComment}
   281→              />
   282→            </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
   283→          </Transition>
   284→        </RoomProvider>
   285→
   286→        <NoteFontSettingFab />
   287→
   288→        <OnlyMobile>
   289→          <TocFAB />
   290→        </OnlyMobile>
   291→      </TocHeadingStrategyProvider>
   292→    )
   293→  },
   294→})
   295→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { n as IRequestAdapter, r as RequestOptions, t as IAdaptorRequestResponseType } from "./adapter-DLzJOGbI.cjs";
     2→
     3→//#region interfaces/controller.d.ts
     4→interface IController {
     5→  base: string;
     6→  name: string | string[];
     7→}
     8→//#endregion
     9→//#region interfaces/types.d.ts
    10→type Class<T> = new (...args: any[]) => T;
    11→type SelectFields<T extends string> = `${'+' | '-' | ''}${T}`[];
    12→//#endregion
    13→//#region interfaces/client.d.ts
    14→interface IClientOptions {
    15→  controllers: Class<IController>[];
    16→  getCodeMessageFromException: <T = Error>(error: T) => {
    17→    message?: string | undefined | null;
    18→    code?: number | undefined | null;
    19→  };
    20→  customThrowResponseError: <T extends Error = Error>(err: any) => T;
    21→  transformResponse: <T = any>(data: any) => T;
    22→  /**
    23→   *
    24→   * @default (res) => res.data
    25→   */
    26→  getDataFromResponse: <T = any>(response: unknown) => T;
    27→}
    28→type ClientOptions = Partial<IClientOptions>;
    29→//#endregion
    30→//#region interfaces/request.d.ts
    31→type NoStringIndex<T> = { [K in keyof T as string extends K ? never : K]: T[K] };
    32→interface IRequestHandler<ResponseWrapper> {
    33→  (path?: string | number): IRequestHandler<ResponseWrapper>;
    34→  get: <P = unknown>(options?: Omit<NoStringIndex<RequestOptions>, 'data'>) => RequestProxyResult<P, ResponseWrapper>;
    35→  post: <P = unknown>(options?: RequestOptions) => RequestProxyResult<P, ResponseWrapper>;
    36→  patch: <P = unknown>(options?: RequestOptions) => RequestProxyResult<P, ResponseWrapper>;
    37→  delete: <P = unknown>(options?: Omit<NoStringIndex<RequestOptions>, 'data'>) => RequestProxyResult<P, ResponseWrapper>;
    38→  put: <P = unknown>(options?: RequestOptions) => RequestProxyResult<P, ResponseWrapper>;
    39→  toString: (withBase?: boolean) => string;
    40→  valueOf: (withBase?: boolean) => string;
    41→  [key: string]: IRequestHandler<ResponseWrapper>;
    42→}
    43→type RequestProxyResult<T, ResponseWrapper, R = (ResponseWrapper extends unknown ? {
    44→  data: T;
    45→  [key: string]: any;
    46→} : ResponseWrapper extends {
    47→  data: T;
    48→} ? ResponseWrapper : Omit<ResponseWrapper, 'data'> & {
    49→  data: T;
    50→})> = Promise<ResponseProxyExtraRaw<T, R, ResponseWrapper>>;
    51→type CamelToSnake<T extends string, P extends string = ''> = string extends T ? string : T extends `${infer C0}${infer R}` ? CamelToSnake<R, `${P}${C0 extends Lowercase<C0> ? '' : '_'}${Lowercase<C0>}`> : P;
    52→type CamelKeysToSnake<T> = { [K in keyof T as CamelToSnake<Extract<K, string>>]: T[K] };
    53→type ResponseWrapperType<Response, RawData, T> = {
    54→  $raw: Response extends {
    55→    data: infer T;
    56→  } ? Response : Response extends unknown ? {
    57→    [i: string]: any;
    58→    data: RawData extends unknown ? CamelKeysToSnake<T> : RawData;
    59→  } : Response;
    60→  $request: {
    61→    path: string;
    62→    method: string;
    63→    [k: string]: string;
    64→  };
    65→  $serialized: T;
    66→};
    67→type ResponseProxyExtraRaw<T, RawData = unknown, Response = unknown> = T extends object ? T & ResponseWrapperType<Response, RawData, T> : T extends unknown ? T & ResponseWrapperType<Response, RawData, T> : unknown;
    68→//#endregion
    69→//#region core/client.d.ts
    70→declare class HTTPClient<T extends IRequestAdapter = IRequestAdapter, ResponseWrapper = unknown> {
    71→  private readonly _endpoint;
    72→  private _adaptor;
    73→  private options;
    74→  private readonly _proxy;
    75→  constructor(_endpoint: string, _adaptor: T, options?: Omit<ClientOptions, 'controllers'>);
    76→  private initGetClient;
    77→  injectControllers(...Controller: Class<IController>[]): void;
    78→  injectControllers(Controller: Class<IController>[]): void;
    79→  get endpoint(): string;

    81→  request(options: {
    82→    url: string;
    83→    method?: string;
    84→    data?: any;
    85→    params?: any;
    86→  }): Promise<IAdaptorRequestResponseType<any>>;
    87→  get proxy(): IRequestHandler<ResponseWrapper>;
    88→  private buildRoute;
    89→}
    90→declare function createClient<T extends IRequestAdapter>(adapter: T): <ResponseWrapper = (T extends {
    91→  responseWrapper: infer Type;
    92→} ? Type extends undefined ? unknown : Type : unknown)>(endpoint: string, options?: ClientOptions) => HTTPClient<T, ResponseWrapper>;
    93→//#endregion
    94→//#region core/error.d.ts
    95→declare class RequestError extends Error {
    96→  status: number;
    97→  path: string;
    98→  raw: any;
    99→  constructor(message: string, status: number, path: string, raw: any);
   100→}
   101→//#endregion
   102→//#region controllers/ack.d.ts
   103→declare module '@mx-space/api-client' {
   104→  interface HTTPClient<T extends IRequestAdapter = IRequestAdapter, ResponseWrapper = unknown> {
   105→    ack: AckController<ResponseWrapper>;
   106→  }
   107→}
   108→/**
   109→ * @support core >= 4.4.0
   110→ */
   111→declare class AckController<ResponseWrapper> implements IController {
   112→  private client;
   113→  base: string;
   114→  name: string;
   115→  constructor(client: HTTPClient);
   116→  get proxy(): IRequestHandler<ResponseWrapper>;
   117→  read(type: 'post' | 'note', id: string): RequestProxyResult<never, ResponseWrapper, ResponseWrapper extends unknown ? {
   118→    [key: string]: any;
   119→    data: never;
   120→  } : ResponseWrapper extends {

   122→  } ? ResponseWrapper : Omit<ResponseWrapper, "data"> & {
   123→    data: never;
   124→  }>;
   125→}
   126→//#endregion
   127→//#region ../../apps/core/src/constants/db.constant.d.ts

   143→  type: string;

   181→  content: string;
   182→  images?: Image[];
   183→  modified: string | null;
   184→  meta?: Record<string, any> | null;
   185→}
   186→type TextBaseModel = TextBaseModelMarkdown | TextBaseModelLexical;
   187→type ModelWithLiked<T> = T & {

   189→};
   190→interface TranslationMeta {
   191→  sourceLang: string;
   192→  targetLang: string;

   195→type ModelWithTranslation<T> = T & {
   196→  isTranslated: boolean;
   197→  translationMeta?: TranslationMeta;
   198→  availableTranslations?: string[];
   199→};
```

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
     6→import { useSessionReader } from '~/atoms/hooks/reader'
     7→import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
     8→import { AutoResizeHeight } from '~/components/modules/shared/AutoResizeHeight'
     9→import { clsxm } from '~/lib/helper'
    10→
    11→import type { CommentBaseProps } from '../types'
    12→import { CommentBoxAuthedInput } from './AuthedInput'
    13→import { CommentBoxLegacyForm } from './CommentBoxLegacyForm'
    14→import { CommentBoxMode, setCommentMode, useCommentMode } from './hooks'
    15→import { CommentBoxProvider } from './providers'
    16→import { CommentBoxSignedOutContent } from './SignedOutContent'
    17→import { SwitchCommentMode } from './SwitchCommentMode'
    18→
    19→export const CommentBoxRoot: Component<CommentBaseProps> = (props) => {
    20→  const { refId, className, afterSubmit, initialValue, autoFocus } = props
    21→
    22→  const mode = useCommentMode()
    23→
    24→  const isLogged = useIsOwnerLogged()
    25→
    26→  const sessionReader = useSessionReader()
    27→
    28→  useEffect(() => {
    29→    if (sessionReader) {
    30→      setCommentMode(CommentBoxMode['with-auth'])
    31→    }
    32→  }, [sessionReader])
    33→
    34→  return (
    35→    <ErrorBoundary>
    36→      <CommentBoxProvider
    37→        refId={refId}
    38→        afterSubmit={afterSubmit}
    39→        initialValue={initialValue}
    40→      >
    41→        <div
    42→          className={clsxm('group relative w-full min-w-0', className)}
    43→          data-hide-print
    44→        >
    45→          <SwitchCommentMode />
    46→
    47→          <div className="relative w-full">
    48→            {isLogged ? (
    49→              <CommentBoxLegacy autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    50→            ) : mode === CommentBoxMode.legacy ? (
    51→              <CommentBoxLegacy autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    52→            ) : (
    53→              <CommentBoxWithAuth autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    54→            )}
    55→          </div>
    56→        </div>
    57→      </CommentBoxProvider>
    58→    </ErrorBoundary>
    59→  )
    60→}
    61→
    62→const CommentBoxLegacy: Component<{ autoFocus?: boolean }> = ({
    63→  autoFocus,
    64→}) => (
    65→  <AutoResizeHeight>
    66→    <CommentBoxLegacyForm autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    67→  </AutoResizeHeight>
    68→)
    69→
    70→const CommentBoxWithAuth: Component<{ autoFocus?: boolean }> = ({
    71→  autoFocus,
    72→}) => {
    73→  const isReaderLogin = !!useSessionReader()
    74→
    75→  return (
    76→    <AutoResizeHeight>
    77→      {!isReaderLogin ? (
    78→        <CommentBoxSignedOutContent />
    79→      ) : (
    80→        <CommentBoxAuthedInput autoFocus={autoFocus} />
    81→      )}
    82→    </AutoResizeHeight>
    83→  )
    84→}
    85→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comments.tsx`

```text
     1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { BusinessEvents } from '@mx-space/webhook'
     4→import type { FC } from 'react'
     5→import { memo, useEffect } from 'react'
     6→
     7→import { ErrorBoundary } from '~/components/common/ErrorBoundary'
     8→import { BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView } from '~/components/ui/transition'
     9→import { useTypeScriptHappyCallback } from '~/hooks/common/use-callback'
    10→import { WsEvent } from '~/socket/util'
    11→
    12→import { Comment } from './Comment'
    13→import { CommentBoxProvider } from './CommentBox/providers'
    14→import { CommentProvider, useUpdateComment } from './CommentProvider'
    15→import type { CommentBaseProps } from './types'
    16→
    17→export const Comments: FC<CommentBaseProps> = ({ refId }) => {
    18→  return (
    19→    <ErrorBoundary>
    20→      <CommentProvider refId={refId}>
    21→        {useTypeScriptHappyCallback(
    22→          (data) => {
    23→            // sort by pin
    24→            const comments = data?.pages.flatMap((data) => data.data)
    25→
    26→            return (
    27→              <ul className="min-h-[400px] list-none space-y-4">
    28→                {comments.map((comment) => (
    29→                  <BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView key={comment.id}>
    30→                    <CommentListItem commentId={comment.id} refId={refId} />
    31→                  </BottomToUpSoftScaleTransitionView>
    32→                ))}
    33→                <CommentEventHandler refId={refId} />
    34→              </ul>
    35→            )
    36→          },
    37→          [refId],
    38→        )}
    39→      </CommentProvider>
    40→    </ErrorBoundary>
    41→  )
    42→}
    43→
    44→const CommentListItem: FC<{ commentId: string; refId: string }> = memo(
    45→  function CommentListItem({ commentId, refId }) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <CommentBoxProvider refId={refId}>
    48→        <Comment commentId={commentId} />
    49→      </CommentBoxProvider>
    50→    )
    51→  },
    52→)
    53→
    54→const CommentEventHandler = ({ refId }: { refId: string }) => {
    55→  useEffect(() => {
    56→    const currentTitle = document.title
    57→
    58→    // 当标签页回复前台状态时，将标题重置
    59→    const onVisibilityChange = () => {
    60→      if (document.visibilityState === 'visible') {
    61→        document.title = currentTitle
    62→      }
    63→    }
    64→    document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    65→
    66→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_CREATE, (data) => {
    67→      if (
    68→        data.ref === refId && // 如果标签页在后台
    69→        document.visibilityState === 'hidden'
    70→      ) {
    71→        document.title = `新评论！${currentTitle}`
    72→      }
    73→    })
    74→    return () => {
    75→      cleaner()
    76→      document.removeEventListener('visibilitychange', onVisibilityChange)
    77→    }
    78→  }, [refId])
    79→  const updateCommentUI = useUpdateComment()
    80→  useEffect(() => {
    81→    const cleaner = WsEvent.on(BusinessEvents.COMMENT_UPDATE, (data) => {
    82→      updateCommentUI({
    83→        id: data.id,
    84→        text: data.text,
    85→      })
    86→    })
    87→    return () => {
    88→      cleaner()
    89→    }
    90→  }, [updateCommentUI])
    91→  return null
    92→}
    93→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/hooks.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useInfiniteQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     5→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
     6→
     7→export function useCommentsQuery(refId: string) {
     8→  const key = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
     9→  const { data, isLoading, fetchNextPage, hasNextPage } = useInfiniteQuery({
    10→    queryKey: key,
    11→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey, pageParam }) => {
    12→      const page = pageParam
    13→      const [, refId] = queryKey as [string, string]
    14→      const data = await apiClient.comment.getByRefId(refId, {
    15→        page,
    16→      })
    17→
    18→      return data.$serialized
    19→    },
    20→
    21→    meta: {
    22→      persist: false,
    23→    },
    24→    getNextPageParam: (lastPage) =>
    25→      lastPage.pagination.hasNextPage
    26→        ? lastPage.pagination.currentPage + 1
    27→        : undefined,
    28→    getPreviousPageParam: (firstPage) => firstPage.pagination.currentPage - 1,
    29→    initialPageParam: 1 as number | undefined,
    30→  })
    31→
    32→  return {
    33→    data,
    34→    isLoading,
    35→    fetchNextPage,
    36→    hasNextPage,
    37→  }
    38→}
    39→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`

```text
     1→import './Comment.css'
     2→
     3→import type { CommentModel } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     4→import clsx from 'clsx'
     5→import { atom, useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
     6→import { m } from 'motion/react'
     7→import type { FC, PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
     8→import {
     9→  createContext,
    10→  memo,
    11→  use,
    12→  useCallback,
    13→  useLayoutEffect,
    14→  useMemo,
    15→  useRef,
    16→} from 'react'
    17→import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    18→
    19→import { Avatar } from '~/components/ui/avatar'
    20→import { FloatPopover } from '~/components/ui/float-popover'
    21→import { BlockLinkRenderer } from '~/components/ui/markdown/renderers/LinkRenderer'
    22→import { RelativeTime } from '~/components/ui/relative-time'
    23→import {
    24→  getStrategyIconComponent,
    25→  UserAuthStrategyIcon,
    26→} from '~/components/ui/user/UserAuthStrategyIcon'
    27→import { softSpringPreset } from '~/constants/spring'
    28→import type { AuthSocialProviders } from '~/lib/authjs'
    29→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    30→
    31→import { CommentActionButtonGroup } from './CommentActionButtonGroup'
    32→import { CommentMarkdown } from './CommentMarkdown'
    33→import { CommentPinButton, OcticonGistSecret } from './CommentPinButton'
    34→import {
    35→  CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext,
    36→  useCommentById,
    37→  useCommentByIdSelector,
    38→  useCommentMarkdownContainerRef,
    39→  useCommentReader,
    40→} from './CommentProvider'
    41→
    42→export const Comment: Component<{
    43→  commentId: string
    44→  className?: string
    45→}> = memo(function Comment(props) {
    46→  const { commentId, className } = props
    47→  const comment = useCommentById(commentId)
    48→
    49→  if (!comment) return null
    50→  // FIXME 兜一下后端给的脏数据
    51→  if (typeof comment === 'string') return null
    52→  return <CommentRender comment={comment} className={className} />
    53→})
    54→const CommentRender: Component<{
    55→  comment: CommentModel & { new?: boolean }
    56→}> = (props) => {
    57→  const { comment, className } = props
    58→
    59→  const elAtom = useMemo(() => atom<HTMLDivElement | null>(null), [])
    60→  const isSingleLinkContent = useMemo(() => {
    61→    const trimmedContent = comment.text
    62→    if (!trimmedContent) return false
    63→    const isSingleLine = trimmedContent.split('\n').length === 1
    64→    const isURL = URL.canParse(trimmedContent)
    65→
    66→    return isSingleLine && isURL
    67→  }, [comment.text])
    68→  const reader = useCommentReader(comment.readerId)
    69→
    70→  const {
    71→    id: cid,
    72→
    73→    text,
    74→    key,
    75→    location,
    76→    isWhispers,
    77→    url,
    78→    source,
    79→  } = comment
    80→
    81→  const avatar = reader?.image || comment.avatar
    82→  const author = reader?.name || comment.author
    83→  const parentId =
    84→    typeof comment.parent === 'string' ? comment.parent : comment.parent?.id
    85→
    86→  const authorUrl = useMemo(() => {
    87→    if (url) return url
    88→    if (source === 'github' && reader?.handle) {
    89→      return `https://github.com/${reader.handle}`
    90→    }
    91→    return null
    92→  }, [url, source, reader?.handle])
    93→
    94→  const authorElement = authorUrl ? (
    95→    <a
    96→      href={authorUrl}
    97→      className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all"
    98→      target="_blank"
    99→      rel="noreferrer"
   100→    >
   101→      {author}
   102→    </a>
   103→  ) : (
   104→    <span className="max-w-full shrink-0 break-all">{author}</span>
   105→  )
   106→
   107→  const CommentNormalContent = (
   108→    <div
   109→      className={clsx(
   110→        'comment__message',
   111→        'relative inline-block rounded-xl text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   112→        'bg-zinc-600/5 dark:bg-zinc-500/20',
   113→        'max-w-[calc(100%-3rem)]',
   114→        'rounded-tl-sm md:rounded-bl-sm md:rounded-tl-xl',
   115→        'ml-4 px-3 py-2 md:ml-0',
   116→        // 'prose-ol:list-inside prose-ul:list-inside',
   117→      )}
   118→    >
   119→      <CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext>
   120→        <CommentMarkdown>{text}</CommentMarkdown>
   121→
   122→        <EditedCommentFooter commentId={comment.id} />
   123→      </CommentMarkdownContainerRefContext>
   124→
   125→      <CommentActionButtonGroup commentId={comment.id} />
   126→    </div>
   127→  )
   128→  return (
   129→    <>
   130→      <CommentHolderContext value={elAtom}>
   131→        <m.li
   132→          initial={
   133→            comment['new']
   134→              ? {
   135→                  opacity: 0,
   136→                  scale: 0.93,
   137→                  y: 20,
   138→                }
   139→              : true
   140→          }
   141→          transition={softSpringPreset}
   142→          animate={{
   143→            opacity: 1,
   144→            y: 0,
   145→            scale: 1,
   146→          }}
   147→          data-comment-id={cid}
   148→          data-reader-id={comment.readerId}
   149→          data-parent-id={parentId}
   150→          className={clsx('relative my-2', className)}
   151→        >
   152→          <div className="group flex w-full items-stretch gap-4">
   153→            <div
   154→              className={clsx(
   155→                'flex shrink-0 self-end md:relative md:w-9',
   156→                'absolute top-2',
   157→              )}
   158→            >
   159→              <Avatar
   160→                shadow={false}
   161→                imageUrl={avatar}
   162→                alt={`${author}'s avatar`}
   163→                className="size-6 select-none rounded-full bg-zinc-200 ring-2 ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-zinc-800 md:size-9"
   164→              />
   165→              {source &&
   166→                !!getStrategyIconComponent(source as AuthSocialProviders) && (
   167→                  <div className="center absolute -right-1.5 bottom-1 flex size-3.5 rounded-full bg-white ring-[1.5px] ring-zinc-200 dark:bg-zinc-800 dark:ring-black">
   168→                    <UserAuthStrategyIcon
   169→                      strategy={source as AuthSocialProviders}
   170→                      className="size-3"
   171→                    />
   172→                  </div>
   173→                )}
   174→            </div>
   175→
   176→            {/* Header */}
   177→            <div
   178→              className={clsx(
   179→                'flex flex-1 flex-col',
   180→                'w-full min-w-0 items-start',
   181→              )}
   182→            >
   183→              <span
   184→                className={clsx(
   185→                  'flex items-center gap-2 font-semibold text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200',
   186→                  'relative w-full min-w-0 justify-center',
   187→                  'mb-2 pl-7 md:pl-0',
   188→                )}
   189→              >
   190→                <span className="ml-2 flex grow flex-col flex-wrap items-start gap-0.5 md:flex-row md:items-center md:gap-2">
   191→                  {authorElement}
   192→                  <span className="-mt-1 flex min-w-0 shrink select-none flex-wrap items-center space-x-2 md:mt-0 md:self-end">
   193→                    <span className="inline-flex shrink-0 text-[0.71rem] font-medium opacity-40">
   194→                      <RelativeTime date={comment.created} />
   195→                    </span>
   196→                    <span className="break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-30">
   197→                      {key}
   198→                    </span>
   199→                    {!!location && (
   200→                      <span className="min-w-0 max-w-full truncate break-all text-[0.71rem] opacity-35">
   201→                        来自：{location}
   202→                      </span>
   203→                    )}
   204→                    {!!isWhispers && <OcticonGistSecret />}
   205→                  </span>
   206→                </span>
   207→
   208→                <span className="shrink-0">
   209→                  <CommentPinButton comment={comment} />
   210→                </span>
   211→              </span>
   212→
   213→              {/* Content */}
   214→              {isSingleLinkContent ? (
   215→                <div className="relative inline-block">
   216→                  <BlockLinkRenderer
   217→                    href={text}
   218→                    accessory={
   219→                      <CommentActionButtonGroup
   220→                        commentId={comment.id}
   221→                        className="bottom-4"
   222→                      />
   223→                    }
   224→                    fallback={CommentNormalContent}
   225→                  />
   226→                </div>
   227→              ) : (
   228→                CommentNormalContent
   229→              )}
   230→            </div>
   231→          </div>
   232→        </m.li>
   233→
   234→        <CommentBoxHolderProvider />
   235→      </CommentHolderContext>
   236→      {comment.children && comment.children.length > 0 && (
   237→        <ul className="my-2 space-y-2">
   238→          {comment.children.map((child) => (
   239→            <Comment key={child.id} commentId={child.id} className="ml-9" />
   240→          ))}
   241→        </ul>
   242→      )}
   243→    </>
   244→  )
   245→}
   246→
   247→const CommentHolderContext = createContext(atom(null as null | HTMLDivElement))
   248→
   249→const CommentBoxHolderProvider = () => {
   250→  const ref = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
   251→  const commentBoxHolderElementAtom = use(CommentHolderContext)
   252→  useLayoutEffect(() => {
   253→    jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, ref.current)
   254→
   255→    return () => {
   256→      jotaiStore.set(commentBoxHolderElementAtom, null)
   257→    }
   258→  }, [commentBoxHolderElementAtom])
   259→  return <div ref={ref} />
   260→}
   261→
   262→export const CommentBoxHolderPortal = (props: PropsWithChildren) => {
   263→  const portalElement = useAtomValue(use(CommentHolderContext))
   264→
   265→  if (!portalElement) return null
   266→
   267→  return createPortal(props.children, portalElement)
   268→}
   269→
   270→const EditedCommentFooter: FC<{
   271→  commentId: string
   272→}> = ({ commentId }) => {
   273→  const editedAt = useCommentByIdSelector(
   274→    commentId,
   275→    useCallback((comment) => comment?.editedAt, []),
   276→  )
   277→  const ref = useCommentMarkdownContainerRef()
   278→
   279→  const lastNode = useMemo(() => {
   280→    if (!ref) return null
   281→    return ref.lastChild
   282→  }, [ref])
   283→  const lastNodeIsParagraph = useMemo(() => {
   284→    if (!lastNode) return false
   285→    return lastNode.nodeName === 'P'
   286→  }, [lastNode])
   287→
   288→  if (!editedAt) return null
   289→
   290→  const InlineEl = (
   291→    <FloatPopover
   292→      type="tooltip"
   293→      triggerElement={
   294→        <span className="ml-2 text-xs text-zinc-500">(已编辑)</span>
   295→      }
   296→    >
   297→      <div>
   298→        <span>编辑于</span>
   299→        <RelativeTime date={editedAt} />
   300→      </div>
   301→    </FloatPopover>
   302→  )
   303→  if (!lastNodeIsParagraph) return <div className="[&_*]:!ml-0">{InlineEl}</div>
   304→
   305→  return createPortal(InlineEl, lastNode as HTMLDivElement)
   306→}
   307→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useInfiniteQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'
     2→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
     5→import { buildCommentsQueryKey } from '~/queries/keys'
     6→
     7→export function useCommentsQuery(refId: string) {
     8→  const key = useMemo(() => buildCommentsQueryKey(refId), [refId])
     9→  const { data, isLoading, fetchNextPage, hasNextPage } = useInfiniteQuery({
    10→    queryKey: key,
    11→    queryFn: async ({ queryKey, pageParam }) => {
    12→      const page = pageParam
    13→      const [, refId] = queryKey as [string, string]
    14→      const data = await apiClient.comment.getByRefId(refId, {
    15→        page,
    16→      })
    17→
    18→      return data.$serialized
    19→    },
    20→
    21→    meta: {
    22→      persist: false,
    23→    },
    24→    getNextPageParam: (lastPage) =>
    25→      lastPage.pagination.hasNextPage
    26→        ? lastPage.pagination.currentPage + 1
    27→        : undefined,
    28→    getPreviousPageParam: (firstPage) => firstPage.pagination.currentPage - 1,
    29→    initialPageParam: 1 as number | undefined,
    30→  })
    31→
    32→  return {
    33→    data,
    34→    isLoading,
    35→    fetchNextPage,
    36→    hasNextPage,
    37→  }
    38→}
    39→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  ElementNode,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  RangeSelection,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import {
     8→  $getRoot,
     9→  $getSelection,
    10→  $getState,
    11→  $isElementNode,
    12→  $isLineBreakNode,
    13→  $isRangeSelection,
    14→  $isTextNode,
    15→} from 'lexical'
    16→
    17→import { blockIdState } from '../plugins/BlockIdPlugin'
    18→
    19→export interface BlockAnchor {
    20→  mode: 'block'
    21→  blockId: string
    22→  blockType: string
    23→  blockFingerprint: string
    24→  snapshotText: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→export interface RangeAnchor {
    28→  mode: 'range'
    29→  blockId: string
    30→  blockType: string
    31→  blockFingerprint: string
    32→  snapshotText: string
    33→  quote: string
    34→  prefix: string
    35→  suffix: string
    36→  startOffset: number
    37→  endOffset: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
    41→
    42→export type AnchorError =
    43→  | 'no-selection'
    44→  | 'cross-block'
    45→  | 'collapsed'
    46→  | 'no-block-id'
    47→  | 'not-root-block'
    48→
    49→export type AnchorResult<T> =
    50→  | { ok: true; anchor: T }
    51→  | { ok: false; error: AnchorError }
    52→
    53→function computeBlockFingerprint(block: ElementNode): string {
    54→  const text = block.getTextContent()
    55→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    56→  let hash = 5381
    57→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    58→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    59→  }
    60→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function $getRootBlock(node: LexicalNode): ElementNode | null {
    64→  const root = $getRoot()
    65→  let current: LexicalNode | null = node
    66→  while (current) {
    67→    const parent: ElementNode | null = current.getParent()
    68→    if (parent === root && 'getChildren' in current) {
    69→      return current as ElementNode
    70→    }
    71→    current = parent
    72→  }
    73→  return null
    74→}
    75→
    76→function $resolveSelectionPoint(
    77→  selection: RangeSelection,
    78→  which: 'anchor' | 'focus',
    79→): { node: LexicalNode; offset: number } {
    80→  const point = selection[which]
    81→  const node = point.getNode()
    82→
    83→  if ($isElementNode(node)) {
    84→    const children = node.getChildren()
    85→    if (point.offset < children.length) {
    86→      return { node: children[point.offset], offset: 0 }
    87→    }
    88→    const last = children.at(-1)
    89→    if (last && $isTextNode(last)) {
    90→      return { node: last, offset: last.getTextContentSize() }
    91→    }
    92→    return { node, offset: 0 }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  return { node, offset: point.offset }
    96→}
    97→
    98→function $getTextOffsetInBlock(
    99→  block: ElementNode,
   100→  targetNode: LexicalNode,
   101→  targetOffset: number,
   102→): number {
   103→  let offset = 0
   104→
   105→  function walk(node: LexicalNode): boolean {
   106→    if (node.is(targetNode)) {
   107→      offset += targetOffset
   108→      return true
   109→    }
   110→    if ($isTextNode(node)) {
   111→      offset += node.getTextContentSize()
   112→    } else if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) {
   113→      offset += 1
   114→    } else if ($isElementNode(node)) {
   115→      for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   116→        if (walk(child)) return true
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  for (const child of block.getChildren()) {
   123→    if (walk(child)) break
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return offset
   127→}
   128→
   129→function $buildBlockAnchorData(block: ElementNode): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   130→  const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   131→  if (!blockId) {
   132→    return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  return {
   136→    ok: true,
   137→    anchor: {
   138→      mode: 'block',
   139→      blockId,
   140→      blockType: block.getType(),
   141→      blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   142→      snapshotText: block.getTextContent().slice(0, 300),
   143→    },
   144→  }
   145→}
   146→
   147→export function buildBlockAnchor(
   148→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   149→  blockKey?: string,
   150→): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   151→  return editor.read(() => {
   152→    if (blockKey) {
   153→      const node = $getRoot()
   154→        .getChildren()
   155→        .find((c) => c.getKey() === blockKey)
   156→      if (!node || !('getChildren' in node)) {
   157→        return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   158→      }
   159→      return $buildBlockAnchorData(node as ElementNode)
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    const selection = $getSelection()
   163→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   164→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
   168→    const block = $getRootBlock(anchorNode)
   169→    if (!block) {
   170→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    return $buildBlockAnchorData(block)
   174→  })
   175→}
   176→
   177→export function buildRangeAnchor(
   178→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   179→): AnchorResult<RangeAnchor> {
   180→  return editor.read(() => {
   181→    const selection = $getSelection()
   182→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   183→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   184→    }
   185→
   186→    if (selection.isCollapsed()) {
   187→      return { ok: false, error: 'collapsed' }
   188→    }
   189→
   190→    const anchorBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.anchor.getNode())
   191→    const focusBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.focus.getNode())
   192→
   193→    if (!anchorBlock || !focusBlock) {
   194→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    if (anchorBlock !== focusBlock) {
   198→      return { ok: false, error: 'cross-block' }
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    const block = anchorBlock
   202→    const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   203→    if (!blockId) {
   204→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const anchorPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'anchor')
   208→    const focusPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'focus')
   209→
   210→    let startOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   211→      block,
   212→      anchorPoint.node,
   213→      anchorPoint.offset,
   214→    )
   215→    let endOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   216→      block,
   217→      focusPoint.node,
   218→      focusPoint.offset,
   219→    )
   220→
   221→    if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   222→      ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   223→    }
   224→
   225→    const text = block.getTextContent()
   226→    const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   227→    const prefix = text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset)
   228→    const suffix = text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50)
   229→
   230→    return {
   231→      ok: true,
   232→      anchor: {
   233→        mode: 'range',
   234→        blockId,
   235→        blockType: block.getType(),
   236→        blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   237→        snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   238→        quote,
   239→        prefix,
   240→        suffix,
   241→        startOffset,
   242→        endOffset,
   243→      },
   244→    }
   245→  })
   246→}
   247→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./packages/rich-editor/src/plugins/BlockIdPlugin.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import {
     3→  $addUpdateTag,
     4→  $getRoot,
     5→  $getState,
     6→  $setState,
     7→  createState,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { useEffect } from 'react'
    10→
    11→export const blockIdState = createState('blockId', {
    12→  parse: (v: unknown) => (typeof v === 'string' ? v : ''),
    13→})
    14→
    15→const NORMALIZATION_TAG = 'block-id-normalization'
    16→
    17→export function BlockIdPlugin() {
    18→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    19→
    20→  useEffect(() => {
    21→    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ tags }) => {
    22→      if (tags.has(NORMALIZATION_TAG)) return
    23→
    24→      editor.read(() => {
    25→        const children = $getRoot().getChildren()
    26→        let needsUpdate = false
    27→        const seen = new Set<string>()
    28→
    29→        for (const child of children) {
    30→          const id = $getState(child, blockIdState)
    31→          if (id === '' || seen.has(id)) {
    32→            needsUpdate = true
    33→            break
    34→          }
    35→          seen.add(id)
    36→        }
    37→
    38→        if (!needsUpdate) return
    39→
    40→        editor.update(
    41→          () => {
    42→            $addUpdateTag('history-merge')
    43→            const children = $getRoot().getChildren()
    44→            const seen = new Set<string>()
    45→
    46→            for (const child of children) {
    47→              let id = $getState(child, blockIdState)
    48→              if (id === '' || seen.has(id)) {
    49→                id = crypto.randomUUID()
    50→                $setState(child, blockIdState, id)
    51→              }
    52→              seen.add(id)
    53→            }
    54→          },
    55→          { tag: NORMALIZATION_TAG },
    56→        )
    57→      })
    58→    })
    59→  }, [editor])
    60→
    61→  return null
    62→}
    63→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import 'client-only'
     2→
     3→import { nanoid } from 'nanoid'
     4→import { createFetch } from 'ofetch'
     5→
     6→import PKG from '~/../package.json'
     7→
     8→import { createApiClient, createFetchAdapter } from './shared'
     9→
    10→const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
    11→const isServerSide = typeof window === 'undefined'
    12→const uuidStorageKey = 'x-uuid'
    13→const uuid = nanoid()
    14→
    15→const globalConfigureHeader = {} as any
    16→const globalConfigureSearchParams = {} as any
    17→
    18→if (isServerSide) {
    19→  globalConfigureHeader['User-Agent'] =
    20→    `NextJS/v${PKG.dependencies.next} ${PKG.name}/${PKG.version}`
    21→}
    22→
    23→export const $fetch = createFetch({
    24→  defaults: {
    25→    timeout: 8000,
    26→    credentials: 'include',
    27→    headers: globalConfigureHeader,
    28→    onRequest(context) {
    29→      // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-destructuring
    30→      let headers: any = context.options.headers
    31→      if (headers && headers instanceof Headers) {
    32→        headers = Object.fromEntries(headers.entries())
    33→      } else {
    34→        headers = {}
    35→      }
    36→
    37→      headers['X-Session-Uuid'] =
    38→        globalThis?.sessionStorage?.getItem(uuidStorageKey) ?? uuid
    39→
    40→      context.options.params ??= {}
    41→      Object.assign(context.options.params, globalConfigureSearchParams)
    42→
    43→      if (isDev && isServerSide) {
    44→        console.info(`[Request]: ${context.request}`)
    45→      }
    46→
    47→      context.options.headers = headers
    48→    },
    49→    onResponse(context) {
    50→      if (isDev && isServerSide) {
    51→        console.info(`[Response]: ${context.request}`, context.response.status)
    52→      }
    53→    },
    54→  },
    55→})
    56→
    57→export const apiClient = createApiClient(createFetchAdapter($fetch))
    58→export const attachFetchHeader = (key: string, value: string | null) => {
    59→  const original = globalConfigureHeader[key]
    60→  if (value === null) {
    61→    delete globalConfigureHeader[key]
    62→  } else {
    63→    globalConfigureHeader[key] = value
    64→  }
    65→
    66→  return () => {
    67→    if (original === undefined) {
    68→      delete globalConfigureHeader[key]
    69→    } else {
    70→      globalConfigureHeader[key] = original
    71→    }
    72→  }
    73→}
    74→
    75→export const setGlobalSearchParams = (params: Record<string, any>) => {
    76→  clearGlobalSearchParams()
    77→  Object.assign(globalConfigureSearchParams, params)
    78→}
    79→
    80→export const clearGlobalSearchParams = () => {
    81→  Object.keys(globalConfigureSearchParams).forEach((key) => {
    82→    delete globalConfigureSearchParams[key]
    83→  })
    84→}
    85→export const isReactClient = true
    86→
    87→if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    88→  Object.defineProperty(window, 'api', {
    89→    get() {
    90→      return apiClient
    91→    },
    92→  })
    93→}
    94→
```

```text
     1→import 'server-only'
     2→
     3→import { cookies, headers as nextHeaders } from 'next/headers'
     4→import { createFetch } from 'ofetch'
     5→
     6→import PKG from '~/../package.json'
     7→import { REQUEST_LOCALE } from '~/constants/system'
     8→
     9→import { createApiClient, createFetchAdapter } from './shared'
    10→
    11→const isDev = process.env.NODE_ENV === 'development'
    12→
    13→export const $fetch = createFetch({
    14→  defaults: {
    15→    timeout: 8000,
    16→    credentials: 'include',
    17→    async onRequest(context) {
    18→      const cookie = await cookies()
    19→
    20→      // eslint-disable-next-line prefer-destructuring
    21→      let headers: any = context.options.headers
    22→      if (headers && headers instanceof Headers) {
    23→        headers = Object.fromEntries(headers.entries())
    24→      } else {
    25→        headers = {}
    26→      }
    27→
    28→      const cookieHeader = cookie
    29→        .getAll()
    30→        .map((c) => `${c.name}=${c.value}`)
    31→        .join('; ')
    32→      if (cookieHeader) {
    33→        headers['cookie'] = cookieHeader
    34→        context.options.cache = 'no-store'
    35→      }
    36→
    37→      context.options.params ??= {}
    38→
    39→      if (isDev) {
    40→        console.info(`[Request/Server]: ${context.request}`)
    41→      }
    42→
    43→      const { get } = await nextHeaders()
    44→
    45→      const ua = get('user-agent')
    46→      const ip =
    47→        get('x-real-ip') ||
    48→        get('x-forwarded-for') ||
    49→        get('remote-addr') ||
    50→        get('cf-connecting-ip')
    51→
    52→      if (ip) {
    53→        headers['x-real-ip'] = ip
    54→        headers['x-forwarded-for'] = ip
    55→      }
    56→
    57→      headers['User-Agent'] =
    58→        `${ua} NextJS/v${PKG.dependencies.next} ${PKG.name}/${PKG.version}`
    59→
    60→      // Add x-lang header from URL (more reliable than getLocale during RSC navigation)
    61→      const referer = get('referer') || get('x-invoke-path')
    62→      const locale = get(REQUEST_LOCALE)
    63→
    64→      if (isDev) {
    65→        console.log('locale extracted:', locale, 'from referer:', referer)
    66→      }
    67→
    68→      headers['x-lang'] = locale
    69→
    70→      context.options.headers = headers
    71→    },
    72→    onResponse(context) {
    73→      if (isDev) {
    74→        console.info(
    75→          `[Response/Server]: ${context.request}`,
    76→          context.response.status,
    77→        )
    78→      }
    79→    },
    80→  },
    81→})
    82→export const apiClient = createApiClient(createFetchAdapter($fetch))
    83→
    84→const Noop = () => null
    85→export const attachFetchHeader = () => Noop
    86→
    87→export const setGlobalSearchParams = Noop
    88→export const clearGlobalSearchParams = Noop
    89→
    90→export const isReactServer = true
    91→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./apps/web/src/lib/fetch/shared.ts`

```text
     1→import type { IRequestAdapter } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     2→import createClient, { allControllers } from '@mx-space/api-client'
     3→import type { $fetch } from 'ofetch'
     4→
     5→import { API_URL } from '~/constants/env'
     6→
     7→type FetchType = typeof $fetch
     8→export const createFetchAdapter = (
     9→  $fetch: FetchType,
    10→): IRequestAdapter<typeof $fetch> => ({
    11→  default: $fetch,
    12→  get(url: string, options) {
    13→    const { params } = options || {}
    14→    return $fetch(url, {
    15→      method: 'GET',
    16→      query: params,
    17→    })
    18→  },
    19→  post(url: string, options) {
    20→    const { params, data } = options || {}
    21→    return $fetch(url, {
    22→      method: 'post',
    23→      query: params,
    24→      body: data,
    25→    })
    26→  },
    27→  put(url: string, options) {
    28→    const { params, data } = options || {}
    29→    return $fetch(url, {
    30→      method: 'put',
    31→      query: params,
    32→      body: data,
    33→    })
    34→  },
    35→  patch(url: string, options) {
    36→    const { params, data } = options || {}
    37→    return $fetch(url, {
    38→      method: 'patch',
    39→      query: params,
    40→      body: data,
    41→    })
    42→  },
    43→  delete(url: string, options) {
    44→    const { params, data } = options || {}
    45→    return $fetch(url, {
    46→      method: 'delete',
    47→      query: params,
    48→      body: data,
    49→    })
    50→  },
    51→})
    52→export const createApiClient = (
    53→  fetchAdapter: ReturnType<typeof createFetchAdapter>,
    54→) =>
    55→  createClient(fetchAdapter)(API_URL, {
    56→    controllers: allControllers,
    57→    getDataFromResponse(response) {
    58→      return response as any
    59→    },
    60→  })
    61→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     8→} from '@mx-space/api-client'
     9→import type { InfiniteData } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    10→import { useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'
    11→import { produce } from 'immer'
    12→import type { ExtractAtomValue } from 'jotai'
    13→import { atom, useAtomValue } from 'jotai'
    14→import { atomWithStorage, selectAtom } from 'jotai/utils'
    15→import type { PropsWithChildren } from 'react'
    16→import { use, useCallback } from 'react'
    17→
    18→import { useIsOwnerLogged } from '~/atoms/hooks/owner'
    19→import { apiClient } from '~/lib/request'
    20→import { getErrorMessageFromRequestError } from '~/lib/request.shared'
    21→import { jotaiStore } from '~/lib/store'
    22→import { toast } from '~/lib/toast'
```
