 `./packages/rich-editor/src/utils/comment-anchor.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  ElementNode,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  RangeSelection,
     6→} from 'lexical'
     7→import {
     8→  $getRoot,
     9→  $getSelection,
    10→  $getState,
    11→  $isElementNode,
    12→  $isLineBreakNode,
    13→  $isRangeSelection,
    14→  $isTextNode,
    15→} from 'lexical'
    16→
    17→import { blockIdState } from '../plugins/BlockIdPlugin'
    18→
    19→export interface BlockAnchor {
    20→  mode: 'block'
    21→  blockId: string
    22→  blockType: string
    23→  blockFingerprint: string
    24→  snapshotText: string
    25→}
    26→
    27→export interface RangeAnchor {
    28→  mode: 'range'
    29→  blockId: string
    30→  blockType: string
    31→  blockFingerprint: string
    32→  snapshotText: string
    33→  quote: string
    34→  prefix: string
    35→  suffix: string
    36→  startOffset: number
    37→  endOffset: number
    38→}
    39→
    40→export type CommentAnchor = BlockAnchor | RangeAnchor
    41→
    42→export type AnchorError =
    43→  | 'no-selection'
    44→  | 'cross-block'
    45→  | 'collapsed'
    46→  | 'no-block-id'
    47→  | 'not-root-block'
    48→
    49→export type AnchorResult<T> =
    50→  | { ok: true; anchor: T }
    51→  | { ok: false; error: AnchorError }
    52→
    53→function computeBlockFingerprint(block: ElementNode): string {
    54→  const text = block.getTextContent()
    55→  const input = text.slice(0, 200) + String(text.length)
    56→  let hash = 5381
    57→  for (let i = 0; i < input.length; i++) {
    58→    hash = ((hash << 5) + hash + (input.codePointAt(i) ?? 0)) | 0
    59→  }
    60→  return (hash >>> 0).toString(16)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function $getRootBlock(node: LexicalNode): ElementNode | null {
    64→  const root = $getRoot()
    65→  let current: LexicalNode | null = node
    66→  while (current) {
    67→    const parent: ElementNode | null = current.getParent()
    68→    if (parent === root && 'getChildren' in current) {
    69→      return current as ElementNode
    70→    }
    71→    current = parent
    72→  }
    73→  return null
    74→}
    75→
    76→function $resolveSelectionPoint(
    77→  selection: RangeSelection,
    78→  which: 'anchor' | 'focus',
    79→): { node: LexicalNode; offset: number } {
    80→  const point = selection[which]
    81→  const node = point.getNode()
    82→
    83→  if ($isElementNode(node)) {
    84→    const children = node.getChildren()
    85→    if (point.offset < children.length) {
    86→      return { node: children[point.offset], offset: 0 }
    87→    }
    88→    const last = children.at(-1)
    89→    if (last && $isTextNode(last)) {
    90→      return { node: last, offset: last.getTextContentSize() }
    91→    }
    92→    return { node, offset: 0 }
    93→  }
    94→
    95→  return { node, offset: point.offset }
    96→}
    97→
    98→function $getTextOffsetInBlock(
    99→  block: ElementNode,
   100→  targetNode: LexicalNode,
   101→  targetOffset: number,
   102→): number {
   103→  let offset = 0
   104→
   105→  function walk(node: LexicalNode): boolean {
   106→    if (node.is(targetNode)) {
   107→      offset += targetOffset
   108→      return true
   109→    }
   110→    if ($isTextNode(node)) {
   111→      offset += node.getTextContentSize()
   112→    } else if ($isLineBreakNode(node)) {
   113→      offset += 1
   114→    } else if ($isElementNode(node)) {
   115→      for (const child of node.getChildren()) {
   116→        if (walk(child)) return true
   117→      }
   118→    }
   119→    return false
   120→  }
   121→
   122→  for (const child of block.getChildren()) {
   123→    if (walk(child)) break
   124→  }
   125→
   126→  return offset
   127→}
   128→
   129→function $buildBlockAnchorData(block: ElementNode): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   130→  const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   131→  if (!blockId) {
   132→    return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   133→  }
   134→
   135→  return {
   136→    ok: true,
   137→    anchor: {
   138→      mode: 'block',
   139→      blockId,
   140→      blockType: block.getType(),
   141→      blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   142→      snapshotText: block.getTextContent().slice(0, 300),
   143→    },
   144→  }
   145→}
   146→
   147→export function buildBlockAnchor(
   148→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   149→  blockKey?: string,
   150→): AnchorResult<BlockAnchor> {
   151→  return editor.read(() => {
   152→    if (blockKey) {
   153→      const node = $getRoot()
   154→        .getChildren()
   155→        .find((c) => c.getKey() === blockKey)
   156→      if (!node || !('getChildren' in node)) {
   157→        return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   158→      }
   159→      return $buildBlockAnchorData(node as ElementNode)
   160→    }
   161→
   162→    const selection = $getSelection()
   163→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   164→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
   168→    const block = $getRootBlock(anchorNode)
   169→    if (!block) {
   170→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   171→    }
   172→
   173→    return $buildBlockAnchorData(block)
   174→  })
   175→}
   176→
   177→export function buildRangeAnchor(
   178→  editor: LexicalEditor,
   179→): AnchorResult<RangeAnchor> {
   180→  return editor.read(() => {
   181→    const selection = $getSelection()
   182→    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
   183→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-selection' }
   184→    }
   185→
   186→    if (selection.isCollapsed()) {
   187→      return { ok: false, error: 'collapsed' }
   188→    }
   189→
   190→    const anchorBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.anchor.getNode())
   191→    const focusBlock = $getRootBlock(selection.focus.getNode())
   192→
   193→    if (!anchorBlock || !focusBlock) {
   194→      return { ok: false, error: 'not-root-block' }
   195→    }
   196→
   197→    if (anchorBlock !== focusBlock) {
   198→      return { ok: false, error: 'cross-block' }
   199→    }
   200→
   201→    const block = anchorBlock
   202→    const blockId = $getState(block, blockIdState)
   203→    if (!blockId) {
   204→      return { ok: false, error: 'no-block-id' }
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const anchorPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'anchor')
   208→    const focusPoint = $resolveSelectionPoint(selection, 'focus')
   209→
   210→    let startOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   211→      block,
   212→      anchorPoint.node,
   213→      anchorPoint.offset,
   214→    )
   215→    let endOffset = $getTextOffsetInBlock(
   216→      block,
   217→      focusPoint.node,
   218→      focusPoint.offset,
   219→    )
   220→
   221→    if (startOffset > endOffset) {
   222→      ;[startOffset, endOffset] = [endOffset, startOffset]
   223→    }
   224→
   225→    const text = block.getTextContent()
   226→    const quote = text.slice(startOffset, endOffset)
   227→    const prefix = text.slice(Math.max(0, startOffset - 50), startOffset)
   228→    const suffix = text.slice(endOffset, endOffset + 50)
   229→
   230→    return {
   231→      ok: true,
   232→      anchor: {
   233→        mode: 'range',
   234→        blockId,
   235→        blockType: block.getType(),
   236→        blockFingerprint: computeBlockFingerprint(block),
   237→        snapshotText: text.slice(0, 300),
   238→        quote,
   239→        prefix,
   240→        suffix,
   241→        startOffset,
   242→        endOffset,
   243→      },
   244→    }
   245→  })
   246→}
   247→
```

Now I have all the information needed. Let me write a comprehensive plan that covers:

1. **Core API fix**: Remove `.omit({ anchor: true })` from CommentDto
2. **Web anchor utilities**: Extract block info from serialized state, build anchors from DOM


3. **Anchor state management**: Set up Jotai atoms to track pending anchors and display state

6. **Comment highlighting**: Use CSS Custom Highlight API to visually mark range comments
7. **Comment creation flow**: Thread the anchor data through the entire creation pipeline
8. **Comment display**: Render anchor information in the comment cards

Now I'll write this plan out to the plan file.
</details></think>

   109→
   110→- 添加 `CommentsPage` import

   118→
   119→### 8. `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/demo.css`
   120→
   121→添加 comments 相关样式：
   122→
   123→```css
   124→/* Comments page layout */
   125→.comments-layout { display: flex; gap: 24px; align-items: flex-start; }
   126→.comments-editor { flex: 1; position: relative; }
   127→.comments-sidebar { width: 320px; flex-shrink: 0; position: sticky; top: 88px; }
   128→
   129→/* Gutter */
   130→.comment-gutter { position: absolute; top: 0; right: -40px; width: 32px; }
   131→.comment-gutter-btn { ... }
   132→.comment-gutter-count { ... }
   133→
   134→/* Selection popup */
   135→.comment-selection-popup { position: fixed; z-index: 100; ... }
   136→
   137→/* Sidebar cards */
   138→.comment-card { ... }
   139→.comment-card-active { ... }
   140→.comment-quote { font-style: italic; color: var(--demo-text-muted); ... }
   141→

   144→::highlight(comment-highlight-active) { background: rgba(51, 166, 184, 0.35); }
   145→```
   146→
   147→## Key Design Decisions
   148→
   149→1. **CSS Custom Highlight API** for range 高亮：零 DOM 污染，不修改 Lexical 节点树。Chrome 105+ 支持，dev demo 足够。
   150→2. **children 注入模式**：所有交互组件作为 `<ShiroEditor>` 的 children，自然获得 LexicalComposer context。
   151→3. **Portal 策略**：SelectionCommentPopup portal 到 body（viewport 定位），BlockCommentGutter 在容器内绝对定位（相对定位）。
   152→4. **状态提升**：所有 comment state 在 CommentsPage 管理，通过 props 下传。无需额外 context。
   153→5. **独立页面**：不在 EditorPage 堆叠功能，新建 Comments 页面保持关注点分离。
   154→

   157→1. `pnpm --filter @haklex/rich-editor-demo dev` — 启动 dev server

   160→4. 选中文本 → 出现浮动按钮 → 点击 → 输入评论 → sidebar 显示，编辑器高亮引用文本
   161→5. hover sidebar 评论卡 → 编辑器中对应高亮加深
   162→6. 删除评论 → 高亮消失
   163→7. Lint: `npx eslint packages/rich-editor-demo/src/pages/CommentsPage.tsx packages/rich-editor-demo/src/components/comments/*.tsx`
   164→

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-27 14:38:24Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="Write"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Write**</summary>

```md
# Comment Anchor System for Web App (apps/web)

## Context

Demo 中已验证划线(range)+段落(block)评论的 UI 模式。Core API (mx-core) 已实现 anchor 的存储、验证、re-anchor 逻辑。现需将此功能集成到 `apps/web`，仅对 `contentFormat === 'lexical'` 的文章启用。

**现有基础**：
- `WithArticleSelectionAction` 已实现划词弹窗 → 打开 CommentModal → 以 blockquote 引用选中文本
- `CommentModal` → `CommentBoxRoot` → `useSendComment` 完整的评论创建链
- Core service `createComment()` 已调用 `resolveAnchorForCreate()` 处理 anchor
- `@haklex/rich-editor` 已导出 `CommentAnchor`, `BlockAnchor`, `RangeAnchor` 类型

**阻塞项**：Core `CommentDto` 使用 `CommentSchema.omit({ anchor: true })`，导致 anchor 被 zod 校验剥离。

## Serialized State 中的 blockId

Lexical `createState('blockId', ...)` 序列化在节点 JSON 的 `$` key 下：
\```json
{ "type": "paragraph", "version": 1, "children": [...], "$": { "blockId": "uuid" } }
\```

## Step 1: Core DTO Fix

**File**: `mx-core:apps/core/src/modules/comment/comment.schema.ts:67`

\```diff
- export class CommentDto extends createZodDto(CommentSchema.omit({ anchor: true })) {}
+ export class CommentDto extends createZodDto(CommentSchema) {}
\```

移除 `.omit({ anchor: true })`。anchor 在 CommentSchema 中已是 optional，无破坏性。

## Step 2: Anchor State Atoms

**New file**: `apps/web/src/atoms/comment-anchor.ts`

\```typescript
import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
import { atom } from 'jotai'

// 正在创建的评论的 anchor（用户点击划词/block 评论按钮时设置）
export const pendingCommentAnchorAtom = atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)
\```

## Step 3: Anchor 工具函数（纯 DOM）

**New file**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts`

从 serialized state + DOM 构建 anchor，不依赖 Lexical runtime。复用 demo 中的纯 DOM 逻辑：

- `extractBlockInfos(content: string)` — 解析 serialized state JSON，提取每个 root child 的 `{ index, blockId, type, textContent, fingerprint }`
- `findBlockIndex(contentEl: Element, node: Node): number` — 在 `.rich-content` children 中定位包含 node 的 block
- `getTextOffset(container: Element, targetNode: Node, targetOffset: number): number` — DOM TreeWalker 计算文本偏移
- `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection(sel: Selection, contentEl: Element, blockInfos: BlockInfo[]): RangeAnchor | null`
- `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex(blockInfos: BlockInfo[], index: number): BlockAnchor | null`
- `computeBlockFingerprint(text: string): string` — djb2 hash（与 core 一致）

## Step 4: Comment 创建流程传递 Anchor

### 4a. CommentBaseProps 添加 anchor

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/types.ts`

\```diff
+ import type { CommentAnchor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
  export interface CommentBaseProps {
    refId: string
    afterSubmit?: () => void
    initialValue?: string
    autoFocus?: boolean
+   anchor?: CommentAnchor | null
  }
\```

### 4b. CommentBox providers 添加 anchor atom

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx`

在 `createInitialValue()` 中添加 `anchor: atom<CommentAnchor | null>(null)`。

`CommentBoxProvider` 接收 `anchor` prop，初始化时设置 atom 值。

### 4c. CommentBoxRoot 传递 anchor

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx`

将 `props.anchor` 传给 `CommentBoxProvider`。

### 4d. useSendComment 包含 anchor

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx`

在 `mutationFn` 中读取 anchor atom。传入 API 调用的 data 对象：

\```typescript
const anchor = jotaiStore.get(anchorAtom)

// For anonymous comment:
const commentDto: CommentDto & { anchor?: CommentAnchor } = { text, author, mail, avatar, source, url }
if (anchor) commentDto.anchor = anchor as any

// For owner comment via proxy:
apiClient.comment.proxy.owner.comment(refId).post<CommentModel>({
  data: { text, source, ...(anchor ? { anchor } : {}) },
})
\```

提交成功后清除 anchor atom。

## Step 5: WithArticleSelectionAction 构建 RangeAnchor

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx`

新增 props: `contentFormat?: string`, `content?: string`

当 `contentFormat === 'lexical'` 且用户点击 "引用评论" 时：
1. 从 DOM selection 中调用 `buildRangeAnchorFromSelection()`
2. 将 anchor 存入 `pendingCommentAnchorAtom`
3. 传给 `CommentModal` 的 `anchor` prop

对非 lexical 内容保持现有行为（blockquote 引用）。

### MarkdownSelection 传递 contentFormat/content

**File**: `apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/pageExtra.tsx`

`MarkdownSelection` 从 `useCurrentPostDataSelector` 读取 `contentFormat` 和 `content`，传给 `WithArticleSelectionAction`。

类似修改 notes 和 pages 中的 `MarkdownSelection`。

## Step 6: CommentModal 传递 Anchor

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/shared/CommentModal.tsx`

`CommentModalProps` 添加 `anchor?: CommentAnchor | null`。传给 `CommentBoxRoot`。

当有 anchor 时，在 CommentBoxRoot 上方显示 anchor 预览（引用文本或 block 引用指示）。

## Step 7: Block Comment Button

**New file**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentBlockButton.tsx`

仅在 lexical 内容上启用。在文章内容区域监听 mousemove：
- 定位当前 hover 的 `.rich-content` 子元素（block）
- 在 block 右侧边缘显示浮动评论按钮（绝对定位）
- 点击：调用 `buildBlockAnchorFromIndex()`，打开 CommentModal 并传入 anchor

此组件需要 `containerRef`（指向 `.rich-content` 的父级容器）和 `blockInfos`。

### 集成位置

**File**: `apps/web/src/app/[locale]/posts/(post-detail)/[category]/[slug]/PostLexicalRenderer.tsx`

在 `MainLexicalContent` 外层包装一层，添加 `CommentBlockButton`：

\```tsx
export const PostLexicalRenderer = () => {
  const content = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.content)
  const refId = useCurrentPostDataSelector((data) => data?.id)
  if (!content) return null
  return (
    <LexicalCommentWrapper content={content} refId={refId}>
      <MainLexicalContent content={content} className="min-w-0 w-full" />
    </LexicalCommentWrapper>
  )
}
\```

`LexicalCommentWrapper` 提供 containerRef、blockInfos、渲染 `CommentBlockButton` 和 `CommentAnchorHighlight`。

## Step 8: CSS Custom Highlight for Range Comments

**New file**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx`

效果组件（返回 null），使用 CSS Custom Highlight API：
- 接收 `containerRef`、`blockInfos`、`comments`（从 query 读取）
- 过滤出有 range anchor 的评论
- 对每个 range comment，通过 blockId 找到 blockInfos 中的 index → DOM child
- DOM TreeWalker 定位 startOffset/endOffset → 创建 Range
- 注册到 `CSS.highlights` (`comment-highlight`)
- 无 Highlight API 时 graceful fallback

### CSS 样式

**File**: `apps/web/src/styles/tailwindcss.css` 或独立 CSS 文件

\```css
::highlight(comment-highlight) {
  background: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 15%, transparent);
  text-decoration: underline;
  text-decoration-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-accent, #33a6b8) 50%, transparent);
  text-underline-offset: 2px;
}
\```

## Step 9: 获取带 Anchor 的评论数据

评论列表由 `CommentProvider` → `useCommentsQuery(refId)` 获取。返回的 `CommentModel` 在 API 层（`@mx-space/api-client`）当前无 anchor 类型。

**处理方式**：在 web 端将 API 返回的 comment 断言为带 anchor 的类型：

\```typescript
type CommentWithAnchor = CommentModel & { anchor?: CommentAnchor }
\```

`CommentAnchorHighlight` 从 comment query cache 中读取 comments（通过 `useQueryClient().getQueryData()`），提取有 anchor 的评论。

## Step 10: Comment Card 显示 Anchor 信息

**File**: `apps/web/src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx`

在 `CommentRender` 中，当 comment 有 anchor 时：
- Range anchor: 在评论文本前显示引用文本（quote），斜体浅色
- Block anchor: 显示 "评论了某段落" 指示文字

轻量修改，不改变现有布局。

## Files Summary

### mx-core (1 file)
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| `apps/core/src/modules/comment/comment.schema.ts` | 移除 CommentDto 的 anchor omit |

### apps/web - New files (3)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `src/atoms/comment-anchor.ts` | pendingCommentAnchorAtom |
| `src/components/modules/comment/anchor-utils.ts` | 纯 DOM anchor 构建工具 |
| `src/components/modules/comment/CommentAnchorHighlight.tsx` | CSS Custom Highlight 效果 |

### apps/web - Modified files (9)
| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `src/components/modules/comment/types.ts` | anchor prop |
| `src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/providers.tsx` | anchor atom |
| `src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/Root.tsx` | 传递 anchor |
| `src/components/modules/comment/CommentBox/hooks.tsx` | API 调用含 anchor |
| `src/components/modules/comment/Comment.tsx` | 显示 anchor 信息 |
| `src/components/modules/shared/WithArticleSelectionAction.tsx` | 构建 RangeAnchor |
| `src/components/modules/shared/CommentModal.tsx` | 传递 anchor |
| Post/Note/Page pageExtra.tsx (3 files) | 传递 contentFormat/content |
| PostLexicalRenderer.tsx (+ Note/Page equivalents) | 包装 LexicalCommentWrapper |

## Verification

1. Core: `CommentDto` 不再 omit anchor — 手动检查 schema
2. `pnpm --filter @shiro/web dev` 启动 web dev server
3. 打开 lexical 格式文章 → 划词 → 弹窗出现 "引用评论" → 点击 → Modal 打开，显示 anchor 预览 → 提交 → 评论创建成功（API 含 anchor 字段）
4. 文章内 range 评论对应文本出现下划线高亮
5. 鼠标悬浮 block → 右侧出现评论按钮 → 点击 → Modal 打开 → 提交 block 评论
6. 评论卡片显示 anchor 信息（引用文本 / 段落指示）
7. Markdown 格式文章保持原有行为不变
8. Lint: `pnpm --filter @shiro/web lint` 仅检查修改文件

```
